review_text:
I enjoyed my stay at Derek place. Thank you Derek for your hospitality Beautiful❤️ Lovely, quirky 1st floor apartment overlooking a canal. Great place for a couple to use as a base for exploring this fantastic city. Note: the stairs are steep- but the location is worth it!
Very well located for public transport and walking distance to all the main attractions in central Amsterdam.
Derek was helpful, attentive and responsive. I stayed for a few weeks at Derek's place and had a fantastic time. Super convenient, close to shops, cafes, restaurants, and bars. Easy access to the Joordan and a close walk to anywhere in the city. The apartment itself is spacious, comfortable and well decorated, it has that true feeling of staying in someone's place, you really feel like a local! And with a large kitchen, and washing machine, it's suitable for self-sufficient longer stays. Derek was super accommodating, he helped me with my luggage (before and after), and made sure that I was comfortable throughout. Would stay again in a heartbeat. Mukemmel lokasyon, evdeki her detay incelikle secilmis. Çok beğendim. We spent a wonderful week at Derek's place. Very easy to get to via public transportation from the airport. Derek was responsive to messages and met us when we arrived to hand over keys and gave a quick tour. The apartment was very clean and beautifully decorated, the kitchen had everything we would need if we wanted to cook.
I love the Dutch configuration of having the shower in its own huge room and separate room for the toilet.
The balcony was a lovely place to sit in the afternoon sunshine.
The neighborhood was within walking distance to Museumplien, Melkweg, lots of restaurants, grocery stores, public transportation.
Would stay here again! Derek, foi um anfitrião maravilhoso, muito gentil e prestativo. Sempre disponível para ajudar, sempre que necessário.

Abbiamo avuto il piacere di essere stati i primi ospiti a soggiornare nell’appartamento di Frank, in una casa del 1800, nel mese di Aprile. La casa è meravigliosa, arredata con ottimo gusto e con molta cura per i particolari. Dal momento in cui siamo entrati ci siamo sentiti come se fossimo a casa; l’appartamento è bellissimo, fornito di tutto. Letti molto comodi, bagno con doccia e con vasca, wireless perfetto. Stare seduti sul divano, leggendo un libro e guardando i tetti delle case, sorseggiando una tazza di the, è stata un’esperienza rilassante che non dimenticheremo. La terrazza piena di piante e fiori regala momenti di benessere e pace. Frank ci ha dato tanti consigli ed è sempre stato disponibile e cordiale. La posizione è eccezionale, a 10 minuti a piedi dalla stazione centrale, in una via tranquilla che arriva a un canale, da cui partire per esplorare la città. Siamo stati benissimo in questa casa, speriamo di poterci ritornare. Grazie a Frank e Julian per averci ospitato. Frank’s place was a dream!  It is beautifully appointed, has everything you could possibly need during your stay and is perfectly located on a quiet, cute street very close to Centraal and many other walkable spots. Frank is a very responsive host which is also very nice. We hope to return and absolutely recommend to other guests. Until next time!

mooi appartement, precies zoals op de foto's en de advertentie. alles wat je nodig hebt. misschien geen keuken maar de rest is aanwezig. goed genoten. This flat in Amsterdam is super close to the train station and easy to find. Place was very cute with a lovely canal view, and had a couple of good restaurants and cafes around.
Communication was very quick and easy, and so was check-in/check-out.
The sofa bed wasn’t the comfiest, and we only had one sink in the whole place. Sleeping masks recommended since blinds weren’t blackout. It was a nice place to stay. View of the canals definitely the best highlight. Communication with Annemien was super effective. She responded fast and always positively trying to accommodate us even better. Quiet street even though it is in the city center. Easy walk to the grocery store, or to catch a the train/tram. As other reviews point out, steep stairs make it hard to bring luggage up as described in her descriptions and other reviews, nothing the host can do though. This was a beautiful place, we had canal views out of two sides of the room. It would have been easy to sit by the windows and watch the world go by but we also had to get out and explore Amsterdam. If I ever moved to Amsterdam, I would love to live in a place like this. Nous avons passé un super week end, l'appartement est proche de tout nous avons tous fait à pied. Annemien a toujours été réactive, R.A.S ! A lovely apartment with great views and walkable location to old Amsterdam. A nice bathroom with a full sized tub. We had a lovely stay! Annemein has a super cozy place with stellar view, was perfect for us after staying for hotel for too long. We enjoy the interior (wooden table is great), the location and her hospitality. Beautiful stay. Très bien situé, propre, typique d’Amsterdam. Les escaliers étroits, petites marches (typiques d’Amsterdam) au deuxième étage. À savoir si quelqu’un de votre groupe a de la difficulté à se déplacer. L’hôte était parfaite, le logement propre, du café, et tout ce qu’il faut pour se laver. En prime, un petit lave vaisselle! Je recommande À+ for a short weekend getaway in amsterdam this is a perfect place to stay! theres a bike rental just down the street with reasturants and attractions all around it was ideal. the property itself was beautiful inside and with the surrounding areas. couldnt recommend more!

Sarah è stata molto gentile e precisa nelle indicazioni, la casa è spaziosa e luminosa e si trova in un quartiere bellissimo e pieno di natura! Ci siamo trovati molto bene sia nell'appartamento di Sarah che nella zona circostante, molto tranquilla ma completa di tutti i servizi! Consigliato!

Beautiful apartment in a fantastic location - super easy to get in to the centre, but a much more relaxed area to stay for when the hustle and bustle of tourists gets too much.
Hinde was a really great host - easy to contact and very helpful when needed. I felt like she went above and beyond to ensure we were happy and comfortable for our stay in her place.
Thanks Hinde and I'm sure we'll be back in Amsterdam before long! Nous avons passé un très bon séjour dans l'appartement de Hinde et ça petite tribu!
Elle nous a aidée du début à la fin, elle a toujours répondu rapidement à nos questions (beaucoup)!
Prévenante, souriante (on l'a même vu en vrai! Hinde's apartment was perfect for my friend and I during our week long stay in Amsterdam. Des Baarsjes was a perfect neighborhood, just far away enough from the city center to escape the crowds (and we didn't even go during peak tourist season), but right around the corner from several tram stops. There are several great restaurants and cafes in the neighborhood as well. We did not get to meet Hinde, but check in was very easy with their very flexible neighbor! Would stay here again, definitely. Very nice apartment, everything we needed. Hinde was very helpful with everything and sorted out all our questions. Thank you! Hinde's home was exactly as she has described. Beautifully and tastefully done up house. We had a great stay at Hinde's place and loved every moment spent there. The house is in convenient locality and 10-15 min distance from city centre by Tram/bus.
Whilst we found the house a bit cramped, but you will see everything is on it's right place and isn't an obstruction. The house needs special care if you have small child, it would be good to be upfront with Hinde. The house is on the 3rd floor with no lift, be mindful if you are travelling with heavy luggage.
A great stay for our visit at Amsterdam. Everything was great staying here! I loved the house and location. It was convenient to get pretty much anywhere in Amsterdam. Would recommend to couples or a very small group of people. по факту, жильё во многом не соответствует тому,что заявлено Great apartment close to city center. Charming decoration/ real home. Everything you need. Big place can welcome at least 5 people. Communication with owner and arrival was super easy. Very nice in general :) We had a wonderful time at Hinde's place. Would definitely recommend this place to others. It is close enough to transportation & has required amenities & shops close by. Great space! Plenty of space for the 3 of us (couple +1) staying there. I actually opted to sleep on the couch bc it was so big and comfortable! There is balcony access which is lovely, and the apartment is a very cozy and in a great location. Hinde was very accommodating, responded quickly, check in was easy, all great things!

Tivemos uma experiência maravilhosa em sua casa! A localização é excelente, tudo estava muito limpo e bem organizado. Meus filhos adoraram a oportunidade de ficar em uma casa típica holandesa — foi algo especial que tornou a viagem ainda mais autêntica. Muito obrigado pela hospitalidade e atenção. Esperamos voltar um dia!

Maison cosy dans 1 quartier paisible , au pied du tram menant directement au centre ville . Décoration soignée , tout confort , propreté irréprochable . Parfaite communication avec Rose , hôte attentionnée . Adresse que je recommande chaudement Clean and comfortable. Clear instructions about everything. Kitchen has everything you need and Roos is super-responsive if you have questions. A bit out of the way but easy tram ride to center of town and very good value for money. Great apartments! Great Roos! Great Amsterdam! We had lovely family holidays! Thank you! Everything you need for a stay., A quiet location yet easy to get to downtown on Tram 2. Roos and Diego are very responsive to questions before and after your stay. I'd stay here again. Accoglienza molto cordiale, disponibilità, facilità di contatti, in casa funziona tutto. La casa non è dedicata esclusivamente alla ricezione turistica in quanto vissuta, ma di questo neppure vi accorgete. Everything went perfectly during our stay.
Roos and Diego gave us a lot of information. The house is very pretty and furnished with taste, pleasant to live. It is 5 minutes from the tram serving Amsterdam. It is also very easy to reach the airport.
We highly recommend this address. We stayed 4 night in Roosmarijn home during new year holidays. Everything was perfect. The house is pretty cool and very well located: although it is in the suburb area of Amsterdam there is the tram stop within 2 minute walking. The tram (every 7 min) is direct to the center. We appreciate a lot the hospitality of the family and their organization, in fact the communication was super easy and quick and the place looks exactly like it does on the pictures. Would absolutely recommend to stay there! Ένα πολύ ωραίο σπιτι με καλούς χορούς και πλήρες εξοπλισμένο,με πάντα ζεστό νερό και ζεστούς χορούς .Σε μια ισχύ γειτονιά με την στάση του τραμ πολύ κοντά και τα καταστήματα για την τροφοδοσία σας. Gorgeous house in a quiet, but well-connected area. All the appliances you could ask for and the neighbours are lovely. The host gave us lots of information on the surrounding area which was really useful. Thank you Roos! Hôte très accueillante. Emplacement idéal à côté du terminus du tramway numéro 2 qui dessert tous les lieux touristiques d’Amsterdam. Parking gratuit devant le logement. Lits confortables. Accès extérieur terrasse agréable pour se détendre. Magasin AH à proximité très pratique. Merci roosemajin !

A great location and a very comfortable unit. Great host communication and would definitely stay again Great place to stay in a lovely part of central Amsterdam, nice restaurants very close by, not far from Vondelpark.
Place was lovely for a short stay, would stay again The place was exactly as we expected. The location was superb and was only a 5 minute walk away if that to town/restaurants!
It was very spacious and had an amazing bathroom. The bed was super comfortable, and the coffee machine was great. The hosts were super helpful and responsive when needed.
The check in and lack of keys took a stress away from being out & felt very modern. Nice hospitality It was a great stay I recommend this place, very well situated, also comfy bed. In general very good. Vielen Dank, es hat uns sehr gut gefallen! Camera con macchina del caffè e necessario anche per mangiare all’interno eventualmente. Letto molto comodo e pulizia perfetta anche della moquette.
Calda nel lato della camera nelle ore più calde perchè esposta al sole, ma come comunicato dall’host non vi sono i permessi per poter mettere l’aria condizionata.
Host disponibilissimo e rapido sia nelle risposte che nel venire all’alloggio in caso di necessità.
Posizione veramente ottima per muoversi nella città, vicina anche a zone attive la sera ma perfettamente silenziosa. A lovely apartment, great location! A very nice neighbourhood and a peaceful street, easy access to the city’s hustle and bustle. We enjoyed our stay. :) Très bon séjours et très beau logement merci infiniment

Dan a toujours été très réactif aux messages et demandes d’informations. Il nous a fait visiter le logement et remis les clés en personne. L’appartement sur deux étages est situé dans une maison avec une entrée indépendante, petite terrasse. Il est très agréable à vivre, traversant, lumineux, dans un environnement calme. Il est spacieux, décoré avec beaucoup de goût et on s’y sent tout de suite comme à la maison. Les chambres sont grandes et les literies de bonne qualité. La salle de bains a une douche et une baignoire. Et nous avons adoré la collection de disques vinyles ! Il est très bien situé dans Amsterdam. Nous reviendrons ! Daan’s flat is very well located next to a park and to the Rijksmuseum, in a quiet and cosy neighborhood, with restaurants nearby.
The flat is comfortable and nicely decorated, with charm and personality.
Daan did everything possible to make our stay easy and pleasant. Very family friendly home. Close to restaurants, tram stations. Place is as described and photos. Would love to stay here again when come to Amsterdam. We stayed at Daan's house for a week and it was a great time. House was great in a convenient location near a big park. Our family goes to the park every evening. very convenient to go to places including restaurants and grocery stores. Daan and his wife were very responsive to our communication. Our flight was cancelled and rescheduled and we had to check in the 2nd day of our reservation and Daan had been very flexible and even gave us some refunds for not staying in his house the first day of our reservation. We all loved his house during our stay. We were thankful that we were able to rent this space. It was in a good location with buses nearby and easily walkable to other locations.
We appreciated the washer, dryer and drying rack to get some laundry done before we headed home.
It did have a lot of stairs but it is an upper apartment so that is to be expected.
Overall, we enjoyed staying here and appreciated the room that we had. A wonderful home — bright, spacious, clean, comfortable. Fabulous location. Daan is an excellent host. Communicated clearly and was flexible and helpful. Highly recommend! We had a wonderful stay at Daan's beautiful home. It is spacious, stylish, full of light. And larger than it looked in the photos! This was like what Airbnb used to be in the early days - the opportunity to stay in someone's actual home and step into another life for a moment. Daan himself met us at the apartment (another rarity these days) and we felt lucky to stay in such a comfortable apartment. My daughters loved all the toys and used borrowed their kids' scooters to get around. I loved drinking coffee on the balcony each morning. The neighborhood is perfect; not touristy, but with easy walking or tram access to all the big sights and so close to the beautiful Vondelpark. The kitchen was fully stocked and Daan had left us some basics - eggs, onions, tomatoes - that we gratefully used. For us this was an Airbnb ideal: a stay that is grounded in a sense of place and integrated into the life of the city and with a little exchange with people who love the place and make it their home. Convenient location for access to park space, museums, and restaurants. Easy tram ride away from most tourist attractions we wanted to see.
Spacious and nicely decorated, making it feel very comfortable. All the baby amenities on site was very helpful for us to minimize extra packing.
Daan was an excellent host - meeting us and helping us carry our suitcases up the steep flights of stairs. Also accommodated our early check in since we arrived early by plane with kids. Responsive and resolved any issues we had very quickly.
I would mention there’s no AC, so it was pretty warm during the day with the temp in 20s. And the bathroom upstairs is slightly dated. But otherwise I have no complaints.
My family had a good time staying here and would recommend it. Vi har hatt en fantastisk opphold i leiligheten til Daan og familien. Det var virkelig som å få oppleve å være lokal i en meget fin familielighet. Barna elsket stedet - alle lekene og de fine soverommene.
Området var også helt supert - en kjempefin gate, med nærhet til matbutikk og trikkestopp, og et stort pluss for nærhet til Vondelpark!
Daan svarte alltid raskt og var lett å kommunisere med. Perfect home away from home. Daan’s house had all the amenities we needed for our family to keep functioning as normal in another country. Very close to local restaurants and shops and a stones throw from Vodelpark which we spent lots of time in! We felt right at home the whole time we were Amsterdam.

We had a lovely stay here - amazing location, the studio had everything we needed and Piet was very helpful and even let us check in early, which we really appreciated! Thank you Piet for a great stay. The location is excellent. I was able to walk to the rijk museum and the Van Gogh museum. It was also an easy walk to the city centre. I had been taking the tram until i noticed that i could walk there. My friend and I had a great stay at Piet’s place! The location was super close to a tram stop which made transportation very efficient. The Airbnb was spacious and clean. This was the perfect place to come home to after a long day of sightseeing in Amsterdam. Amazing property, great location and able to walk to most parts of the city very comfortably.
Public transport is very simple and easy to use. 100% would recommend Piet’s place is very close to Vondelpark, shops and Museumplein. The room is spacious and very tastefully decorated with high-end furniture. The doors open up fully to the outdoor area and the room is light and sunny. Piet is a great host, friendly and welcoming. The place is easy to find once you see the gate. Perfect sized studio for a long weekend. Close to a super market, restaurants and bars. Also easily walkable to transport links into the main centre of amsterdam. Very helpful, would recommend Excellent central location with easy walkability to Leidseplein, Vondelpark, Museumplein, or short tram ride to other sights. Groceries at AH, and great beer bar, Gollem's, both right around the corner. Wonderful Focaccia at Focacceria, just down Overtoom. Pastries from Simon Meijssen! Great place in Amsterdam. We loved the neighborhood and the proximity to the park. We would stay here again! Fantastic location and super friendly host Piet was an excellent host. My flight got in far before check in time and he was able to accommodate me earlier than the check in time listed. The place itself was very nice as well. Would highly recommend staying!

Noortje’s place was absolutely PERFECT for our stay in Amsterdam. It was exactly as described and was such a nice apartment. The location is excellent for travelers, being so close to multiple team lines, and there are supermarkets, a beautiful produce stand, and delicious restaurants within a block.
What made our stay truly special was our lovely hosts Noortje and Daan. They were so kind and communicative and very responsive to our questions. Plus they made some great recommendations for “must see” sights and restaurants while we were in town. We’d stay there again in a heartbeat. Thank you!! Nortje answered emails very promptly. She made suggestions about what to do and where to eat. (Go to Pastis! The staff are very friendly, the food is so good and the vibe in great.)
Nortje kindly let us check out a few hours late, enabling us to squeeze in extra cycling fun on our last day.
(There’s a bike rental a block away.)
The location is very good. I liked being on the ground floor. It was good not to have to carry suitcases up masses of stairs.
Thank you Nortje! Everything was as mentioned. It was a really nice place to stay for the week end Solo traveler from the USA that stayed at Noortje and Daan's place for 3 weeks in Sept/Oct 2023. Friendly, local neighborhood with limited tourists and easy walking, bike and tram access to all of Amsterdam. Super clean, modern house with very responsive and friendly hosts. Canal out the front door and private yard/garden out the back. Highly recommended and would return myself. Thanks Noortje and Daan! LOCATION, LOCATION, LOCATION! This apartment is located the perfect distance from all downtown activities without being in the middle of all the noise and hustle. The backyard space is peaceful and feels private. Lots of great restaurants and grocery shopping in the area and the tram stops just two minutes from the apartment. Do not hesitate to book! Such an amazing stay!! Apartment was clean and spacious, the outdoor terrace was the perfect touch, location was great, and Noortje was very quick to respond. Highly recommend! We had a fantastic week at Noortje’s home. The space is very comfortable with a large couch and tv, beautiful private patio including nosey neighborhood kitty, comfortable bed, and fully equipped kitchen. Extremely walkable and safe location with an abundance of cafes/restaurants and stores in the neighborhood. Noortje was very accommodating and a great host!

Unser Aufenthalt in Mardous Haus war sehr angenehm und wir können es absolut weiterempfehlen! Das Haus ist sehr schön am Ende eines Docks gelegen. Um die Ecke gibt es sogar die Möglichkeit schwimmen zu gehen im Meer. Die Anbindung an die Innenstadt ist ebenfalls sehr gut. Es fährt eine Tram und ein Bus. Wir hatten unsere Fahrräder dabei und waren mit diesen innerhalb von 10 Minuten in der Stadt. Die Nachbarschaft ist sehr freundlich und ruhig. Mardou's home is lovely, cozy, well equipped and perfect for two or three people. super quiet, close to the water, lots of shops nearby, as well as public transport, so easy to get into town and back and shop for food on the way. Mardou is super flexible, very friendly and helpful and one couldn't imagine a more thoughtful host. we loved staying in a house full of books and films and a kitchen for people who like cooking, as it felt just like our home. I am sure we will come again! highly recommended... Beautiful location of The house! Very nice home and easy to get around with public transport! Mardou’s place was in a really interesting neighbourhood within walking distance of the city - if you like to walk ! It took a while but we enjoyed taking in the sights on the way. Shops close by . We felt very at home - many thanks 😊 The home was great for a family of three. Location was as advertised and is located in a quiet family friendly neighborhood. I recommend having bikes to quickly access the city. This is a great spot for exploring! house is bright and airy, neighbour is great and close cycle to centraal station.
One thing to note: the second bedroom is very small and access to the higher bunk bed is a bit of a squeeze, so really only recommend for smaller adults. Mardou was very nice and responsive. The apartment was in a very nice part of town with easy connections. Her home is beautiful and very well decorated with unique art. We had a wonderful time in Amsterdam and this house just added to the stay. The house was very comfortable, close to markets, and public transportation. Beautiful views of the water right outside the front door. This was an eclectic home filled with books and film posters.
Mardou was responsive and welcoming, a great host. Mardou war ein super Host.
Sie hat immer sofort aus Anfragen reagiert.
Was besonders toll war das Sie von sich aus an Kleinigkeiten gedacht hat die für uns als reisende Familie wichtig waren.
Möglichkeiten für Kindersicherungen und Kleinigkeiten für die Kinder waren super mitgedacht.
Ihre freundliche und zuvorkommende Art hat uns die Ankunft in Amsterdam verschönert.
Die Lage der Wohnung ist großartig wenn man es gewohnt ist in einem ruhigeren Vorstadtbereich zu leben.
Die Kanäle und der Zugang zum Wasser sind großartig.
Die Wohnung bietet alles was man benötigt um sich sofort wohl zu fühlen.
Kann den Aufenthalt an jeden weiter empfehlen der es gerne schön in seinem Urlaub hat.
Danke Mardou, es war ein schöner Urlaub bei dir. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Mardou's house in Amsterdam. From the moment we arrived, Mardou was warm and inviting, making us feel right at home. The house itself felt like a true home away from home—comfortable, cosy, and well-appointed with everything we needed.
Located in a very safe and quiet area, the house is perfectly situated close to shops, supermarkets, and local amenities. It gave us the chance to live like a local while still being within easy reach of everything Amsterdam has to offer. We couldn't have asked for a better experience and would highly recommend staying here!

Juliette was fantastic, very helpful. The apartment was absolutely amazing, even better than the photos. All the appliances worked perfectly, the shower was perfect, good pressure, easy to adjust the temperature. We really had an amazing time in Amsterdam and Juliette’s apartment was a big part of that . The view of Brouwersgracht from the living room was beautiful and the rear view from the bedroom was quite magical. A previous review mentioned that the bed was small.. We did not think so, it was absolutely perfect, very clean, comfortable and spacious. I would highly recommend both Juliet as a host and the apartment.. quite simply, wonderful Excellent place and a very convenient location. Very close from everything and Juliette is super helpful, responsive and accommodating. Will surely rent it again. Of all the places we stayed during our 3 week trip in. Europe, Juliette's place felt the most like home. It was spacious, comfortable, and had great views. Location was perfect. Short walk from train station, and we were able to walk to so many things. Would highly recommend. Loved Juliette's apartment. It was quiet, peaceful, well-equipped and in a beautiful location on the canal. Great host. Highly recommend it and would stay again next time we're in Amsterdam. A perfect perch above one of Amsterdam's most beautiful canals. Ideally situated for walking through the historical streets and appreciating the unique aesthetic. The apartment is located close to the stations and restaurants- very handy. Loved staying here- thank you! Fantastic stay! Amazing apartment with an incredible canal view. Perfect amount of space for my husband and I. All the hotspots are easily walkable, including access to the train station.
Be ready for the stairs - they’re incredibly steep, more like a ladder! We laughed about it and just took an extra minute or so to haul our luggage up/downstairs. A small price to pay to stay in a canal house!
Would recommend this apartment 10x over! An extraordinary light-filled getaway - and our favorite thing: a beautiful elm tree out the window where parrots feed on the blossoms!
So peaceful - a large sunny space to do yoga, great shower with good pressure and plenty of hot water, a comfy bed, and light, light, light from all directions.
Every time we came back to the apartment we told each other how lucky we were to have found this place. Superbe appartement, au coeur du plus beau quartier d'Amsterdam ! Un long WE pour découvrir Amsterdam dans le charmant appartement de Juliette. Tout était parfait et conforme à la description. Juliette est une hôte réactive et pleins de bons conseils.Le quartier est super, tout est à proximité ( dont la gare!) , l’escalier à l’entrée peut surprendre mais on s’y fait sans problème. Un grand merci à elle et nous ne manquerons pas de revenir dans son appartement pour une autre escapade. We loved our stay. The apartment location could not have been better! Juliette was so kind when we needed to make a last-minute adjustment to our reservation, and was helpful in getting us settled. While it is a bit rocky getting up the stairs, the space is cozy and clean -- highly recommend!

Jesse’s apartment is an amazing place to stay to get a local prospective of Amsterdam. It is spotlessly clean, cozy, and spacious. Jesse was a great host and gave incredible recommendations for the neighborhood which has everything you need/want just down the block. Highly recommend to anyone for a seamless traveling experience.

Wonderful stay at Laurent’s place. Everything as described. The apartment was very comfortable and in a really nice and quiet area. Obviously you need to take the bus (15 minutes walk) to arrive Amsterdam city centre, but the area is nice and the public transport works quite well. Thanks to Laurent and his wife for the detail instructions and recommendations for the city !! Härligt vistelse! Kom en natt tidigare, och de var så vänliga och släppa in oss ändå! Väldigt trevliga och hjälpsamma. Muy buena estancia. es una habitación grande y original en una zona tranquila aunque bastante aislada y siempre hay que ir con Uber, que no siempre está disponible,los anfitriones son muy amables.
no hay televisión This was a lovely place to stay. So peaceful being just outside the centre of Amsterdam, but just a short cycle into the centre and with the added fun of a 2 minute ferry crossing (free of charge). The bed was so comfortable and it was lovely to be able to open the windows and get a breeze (although air con is available). The view across fields with cows and ducks is lovely. Everything was clean and Laurent and Joanne even provide the things you need for a simple, tasty breakfast (for free). We found lovely local restaurants to eat at too. We'd certainly return! The apartment is very nice. Wonderful views out the windows. Host is very helpful. The stairs are a little tight but we made it work with two large suitcases. Had a wonderful stay for our first trip to Amsterdam. The house is located on a quiet street with an amazing farm view. About a 15 minute walk to the bus stop and 30 minutes to the ferry.
Laurent and family were very welcoming and made sure we had every we needed. We highly recommend staying here on a visit to Amsterdam. Beds were very comfortable and everything was clean. They had plenty of basic amenities and were very responsive when we needed anything. We would definitely stay here again. Really friendly family! Very clean apartment and very nice neighborhood!
Laurent is a nice host as well Laurent und Joanne waren sehr nett. Es hat alles Problemlos funktioniert, vorallem die Kommunikation war sehr gut. Das Apartment ist vorallem gut, wenn wann bei der ndsm-werft etwas machen will. zur Innenstadt ist es etwas weiter, sodass man öffenltiche Verkehrsmittel benutzen muss (oder noch viel besser, ein Fahrrad). Allerdings ist es dort sehr ruhig und wunderschön.
Es wurde sich von host um alles gekümmert, es war sehr einladend.
Es ist keine Unterkunft zum Feiern oder ähnliches, sondern um wirklich gemütlich zur Ruhe zu kommen.
Sehr zu empfehlen.

1. es wurde sehr viel angebrochenes Essen hinterlassen, sodass wir zu 6. nur wenig Platz im Kühlschrank hatten. ( nett gemeint, aber es sah teilweise nicht sehr appetitlich aus)
2. kein Platz in den Schränken oder irgendwo um eigene Sachen zu verstauen.
3. ein Bett wirkte nicht frisch bezogen und unsere Gastgeberin ist nicht gut mit der Kritik umgegangen.
Insgesamt war der Aufenthalt gut, die Lage war super, alles gut zu Fuß zu erreichen.

great location right next to tram location. clean and well provided for accomodation. The accommodation is lovely and spacious, with ample room for our family of 4. A great place, would highly recommend! This is my favorite airbnb! Super close to public transit so it is easy to get to restaurants and activities! Peet is extremely friendly and helpful! Like most Airbnb spots, there are charms and quirks.   
Charms: Great location, quiet street near the city center. Hosts were beyond friendly.
Quirks: The 150-year old unit was renovated randomly over its life, yielding an eclectic appearance. New paint needed most everywhere. The spiral staircase, while stunning, is capital-T-Treacherous, narrow and slippery especially with its high gloss paint.  If you aren’t clutching the handrail, the next stop could be an ambulance ride. The plumbing is improper, leaving each bathroom ALWAYS smelling like the sewer which vented freely into each. My least favorite aspect is the unit is directly upstairs from the owners.  We had no plans of anything resembling noise or a party, but hearing THEIR dog, smelling their dinner, hearing doors close and the floors squeak, we knew they could hear us as well. Wanting to be polite left us perpetually whispering and tiptoeing, feeling like we were 14 years old with our parents bedroom beneath. Peet’s place was great - perfect location and comfortable. Very good El apartamento de Bart se encuentra en un barrio encantador y tranquilo, con un vecindario familiar, supermercados y un gran parque, además de buen acceso al transporte (a 20 minutos del centro). La terraza con vistas al jardín fue lo mejor de la estancia, lástima que no estuviera más cuidada. La cocina equipada y completa. El anfitrión fue amable.
Sin embargo, encontramos varios aspectos negativos, (ya comentados con el anfitrión): la ducha acumulaba mucha cal y se desprendía de la pared, la tapa del váter se soltaba con facilidad, la cama del dormitorio rosa era demasiado pequeña para dos adultos, las sábanas estaban muy desgastadas y los armarios ofrecían poco espacio para una larga estancia. La limpieza y mantenimiento en general muy mejorable.
En conjunto, el apartamento no corresponde con la impresión que transmiten las fotos del anuncio, en ellas se percibe un estado más nuevo y cuidado. Por el precio pagado, consideramos que no estuvo a la altura de la comodidad esperada. This apartment is super cute, comfortable and close to lots of great spots for coffee, wine and more. What a treat to stay in such a large houseboat on the Amstel River in Amsterdam! Whatever shortcomings this place may have are greatly outweighed by the insane location and the view along the river. Also, keep in mind that the stairs are VERY steep. One of us was unable to manage the interior stairs easily. It was all worth it though, as it's a dream location. Although this was a unique experience with a great location, our group didn’t enjoy our stay. There were so many spiders inside the boat and I woke up with so many bite marks on my body (from the spiders or from something else). Also, even though the description mentions that there is no air conditioning, I want to let everyone who is booking this in the summer/hotter months know that it will feel like an OVEN inside the boat. It was so EXTREMELY HOT during the day that we had to leave the boat and come back at night when it was much cooler. You also can’t leave windows open when you leave, so you have to wait for the place to cool down once you return and open the windows. There are three mini fans available, but they don’t do much other than blow that hot air on you. Also, the shower door didn’t close correctly, so we had to find ways of keeping it closed while each person showered. We met the neighbors, who were extremely friendly and sat outside during the evening, which has a great view. Overall, this experience was… interesting. I wouldn’t book again. Thanks! We'd love to come back and wouldn't hesitate one bit to book again. Thank you! The house itself is really nice, large living room to hang out, beautiful kitchen, and generally a cozy vibe with lots of plants. Our only problem was the children’s bunk bed, but the place is for families after all! They even arranged an extra mattress to help with that.
We didn’t meet Cassandra in person, but check-in and check-out were very much painless and flexible. The limited interaction I had with her was very pleasant and I felt that she wanted us to enjoy our stay.
Overall, I can definitely recommend this AirBnB, especially for families with kids!

Beide waren sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend. Das Zentrum ist von der Unterkunft sehr gut mit den bereitgestellten Rädern zu erreichen. Auch mit der Bahn kommt man gut in das Zentrum von Amsterdamm. nous y dormons très bien, tout et confortable.
le logement est agréable.

We had a great stay, unfortunately i didnt ask how to use the electric mosquito protection device correctly, sorry again for that ;) My sister and I absolutely loved our stay in the Park view Studio. The accommodation was very clean, comfortable and suited us perfectly whilst the delightful patio garden was an added bonus. Marloes and Gabriel were the perfect hosts, so kind, friendly and helpful. We really enjoyed being able to borrow bikes to explore the area further and can recommend a visit to Molen Van Sloten. Learn how Amsterdam keeps dry! Fascinating. Wir waren sehr zufrieden mit unserem Aufenthalt. Die Gastgeber waren sehr freundlich und es war alles wie beschrieben. Mit dem Fahrrad ist man in 20 Minuten im Zentrum von Amsterdam. Das Auto kann auf einem Parkplatz abgestellt werden. Die kleine Wohnung bietet alles was man braucht und wir würden auf jeden Fall nochmal wiederkommen. It was absolutely amazing stay. Gabriel and Marloes are great hosts. They were so kind and helpful with everything. They gave us local recommendations and helpful instructions about everything. We felt right at home and enjoyed every minute. The room was spotless and had everything we needed for a pleasant stay. Gabriel was so kind and helped us with the bikes which we very appreciated. Thank you for everything, would love to stay there again. Die Unterkunft war sehr schön & sauber. Gabriel & Marloes haben unsere Fragen gerne beantwortet und uns geholfen die Straßenbahn in die Innenstadt zu finden. Das Airbnb ist nah gelegen an der Innenstadt. Tout était parfait ! Marli a été adorable et nous a accueillis avec bonne humeur et bienveillance malgré notre arrivée tardive. Le logement est adorable et très propre. Merci encore ! Heerlijk verblijf in een rustige buurt. Gratis gebruik van fietsen was ideaal voor de stad.

Dene is a great host, very helpful and responsive, with great insights on the local area and clear instructions.
The apartment is as described, in a very peaceful, residential area and very safe, with easy access to the centre and great for our family visit.
The accommodation was excellent, lovely comfy beds and always had plenty of hot water.
Its is a ground floor apartment, so there can be "noise" from the flats above, which is normal if you're used to living in apartments.
Thank you Dene for letting our family enjoy your place. Dene was extremely helpful and gave great recommendations for local things to do and dining! The home itself is beautiful and cozy. I would love the chance to stay here again when I return to Amsterdam! Thank you Dene :) Absolut liebevoll eingerichtete Wohnung, ebenerdig und komplett ruhig gelegen. Vom Wohnzimmer Sofa aus blickt man auf eine der Grachten ☀️. Straßenbahnlinie 12 in wenigen Gehminuten und damit unkomplizierte und schnelle Erreichbarkeit aller wichtigen Bereiche im Stadtzentrum.
Der Aufenthalt war perfekt und wir kommen gerne wieder! lovely apartment in a beautiful and quiet part of Amsterdam with great transport access. Dene was responsive and explained check in/check out perfectly We loved our stay at Dene’s place, the location was perfect. Very peaceful neighbourhood with shops and cafes nearby but still not far from the centre at all. The apartment was super clean and we felt very at home there. Definitely would recommend to anyone wanting to visit Amsterdam. The location was perfect, in a quiet area but still convenient to get around on public transport & close to the city centre. What you see in photos is what you get - the place is cosy, neat, not cluttered. And it's important for us not to have to drag our luggage up any stairs. It covers all our checklist points.
Dene & her husband are super friendly, considerate & helpful. Always responsive to our needs even though they are on vacation themselves far away from home. We definitely recommend this place. Красивая уютная квартира с отдельным входом . Очень удобно что на первом этаже. Мне все понравилось возможно еще вернусь. Но немного дорого Wow!! What a beautiful airbnb!! I couldn’t have asked for a better stay. I came with two friends and we were a bit hesitant about Amsterdam because we wanted to be close to everyone but also feel safe. Dene and her home was the best place we could’ve asked for. It was super easy to take public transportation and the area is safe and walkable. Only about one metro line away from major parts and it felt super young and vibey. The house itself is super big and clean and has a lot of space. It was extremely clean and I would come back!! Dene's place is perfectly situated on the Amstelkanaal, on the edge of De Pijp with the tram stop around the corner. It is peaceful but a short walk/tram ride to everything Amsterdam has on offer.
I can definitely recommend their place. Dene’s place is a 5-7 min walk to the 4 and 12 metro lines. Really easy to get in and around the city. Super clean and high end, yet homey, furnishings. You can tell a lot of thought and care went into its design. Fast wifi. Lots of nearby restaurants and 2 supermarkets nearby. Everything was so comfortable I felt right at home.
Dene is a fabulous host! Wine and stroopwafels provided on arrival ❤️! Checked in a couple times to make sure I wasn’t having any trouble. Gave lots of good local recommendations and resource material for the home was conveniently provided.
Some occasional noise from the upstairs neighbors and the bedroom window faces the street where people park, so you can hear people going to/from their cars/bikes, but otherwise very peaceful.

Très propre , paisible et bien placé Amazing and cosy house in a quiet area. Lieke is a great and helpful host.
Thanks for having us! Nous avons passé un très beau séjour chez Lieke !
La maison était très bien optimisée, équipé et très propre.
Lieke nous a chaleureusement accueilli et nous la remercions.
Nous vous recommandons vivement cette location ! Lieke’s place is beautiful. My family felt right at home and the kids loved the place. It is nice and quiet, but easy to get to Amsterdam. A great option for families who want a bit more space. A casa de Lieke é linda! Além de muito bem decorada, tem ótimas camas, um ótimo chuveiro, cozinha completa e um quintal espaçoso e lindo.
Lieke foi muito gentil no check-in, nos explicou tudo com exatidão.
Recomendo fortemente para grupos de 4 pessoas. Sehr schöne gemütliche und sauber Unterkunft im Norden Amsterdams. Lieke war sehr freundlich und die Kommunikation hat sehr gut funktioniert. Wir hatten eine schöne Zeit und würden gerne wiederkommen. Wir waren für ein Wochenende bei Lieke und Dave in Amsterdam. Das Haus war super, man hat sich auf Anhieb wohl gefühlt. Ein Supermarkt ist direkt um die Ecke und die Gegend ist sehr ruhig. Zu Fuß ist es nicht weit bis zur NDSM Werft, wo man sich den Tag& Abend vertreiben kann. Von dort aus fährt ebenfalls die kostenlose Fähre rüber zum HBF und man ist direkt im Zentrum von Amsterdam. Wir hatten einen super Aufenthalt und kommen bestimmt wieder. We had a fantastic stay, we wished we stayed longer. certainly a home away from home. Easy to get to city centre in 25-30 mins. Close to supermarket. Lieke and Dave were amazing hosts! The best ever! Will definitely be back! We really enjoyed our stay in Amsterdam. The house was lovely, and the location meant it was straightforward to get into the centre of Amsterdam. Wir fühlten uns sehr wohl im Haus. Sehr stilvoll eingerichtet und mit vielen nützlichen Gegenständen ausgestattet. Der Spielplatz direkt vor der Tür war natürlich super für die Kids. Auch eine sehr schöne Umgebung.

Muy bien ubicado, algo de ruido en las mañanas temprano. Beautiful location, easy walk to anything you need, room was spacious and clean. Wonderful stay and wonderful host. Great place, very good location, clean, easy check in, i really recommend this place for a family of 4!
The lighting in the apartment is not strong enough, mainly in the bathroom, but Jasper promised it will be fixed. Loved our stay here! The place is big, open and really clean. Great spot too – it’s nice and quiet but everything you need is close by. There’s a flea market just around the corner on Saturdays and an amazing vegan bakery/coffee shop on the corner (worth the hype!). Just a heads-up, it’s all open plan with no separate bedroom, so privacy is a bit limited – but perfect if you don’t mind that. Would happily stay again. great area and great home! very responsive. will be back! Rapport qualité prix inacceptable (presque 240€la nuit). La localisation est parfaite, l’appartement est au rez de chaussé et de plein pied. Sur toute la rue (magnifique par ailleur) le seul avec du mobilier HS et divers ordures devant, c'est celui là ! L’appartement ne n’est pas un ! pas de cuisine, sauf une bouilloire et une cafetière moisi. L’appartement est rempli d’humidité, l’odeur y est très forte et il y’a des traces de moisi sur les murs, et derrières les rideaux. La Literie est complètement HS, on s’enfonce dedans, on peut presque imaginer les précedents locataires. Pas de wifi, et ce malgré nos demandes auprès de Jasper (ou notre interlocuteur qui n’est peut être même pas le proprietaire). Des travaux y etaient prévu sans que nous soyons informés, résultat, impossible de faire la sieste de notre bébé l’apres midi et réveil a 7h10 le 2eme jour.
En résumé, appartement à but lucratif. Dommage qu’on ne pas joindre les photos pour étayer le commentaire.
A fuire ! Amazing location, close to great cafes, bakeries, bars and restaurants. Stay here if you’re keen to check out boutique shop, as well as galleries/museums and avoid the tourist traps of Amsterdam.
Apartment was clean and really spacious. Great location, great place. Not recommended. I wish I could leave a good review, but I cannot. The apartment is very dark, stuffy, and there are very few lights. The paint is peeling on the ceiling in the main room, and there is mould in the bathroom. The back patio is not taken care of properly, which makes it barely usable. There is a kitchen (as shown in the pictures) but it is not really functional except to store food and wash dishes. There is neither stove nor oven. The coffee maker and the kettle were very dirty and we did not want to use them.
I don't understand how it can be claimed that the apartment is new and renovated. Perhaps it newly available, and the floors were beautiful, but that's basically it.
The whole time we were there, the wifi was not working. I tried communicating several times with Jasper and his staff and no one was able to fix it. All we got were generic messages about the network name and password, and that was not the problem with it. Very poor communication. Jasper’s house is amazing and clean
I recommend

Excellent sejour. Le logement est une maison mitoyenne comme un triplex avec un exterieur dans le style des maisons locales on se sent beaucouo mieux qu’a l’hotel. Accueil avec du vin et des petits gateaux. Nous etions une famille avec 2 enfants. Nous n’avons pas vu Donate mais elle reste joignable et un voisin etait la pour ouvrir les lieux. Le quartier est ideal car proche du centre en transports, populaire et mixte, il y a un marché, des restos, de la nourriture locale, vietnamienne, turque, mexicaine… des bars sympas ( bar botanique, et chez Lola ( ou il y a des coktails fantastiques en dose et saveurs par rapport a Paris). Il est facile de visiter les musees ( reserver certains a l’avance) , la ville, les parcs, le zoo a partir de chez Donate. Il y a le chat majestueux de la famille qui vit sur place et mes enfants ont joue avec lui. Nous n’avons pas eu le temps de sortir de la ville ou de prendre le ferry pour aller de l autre coté. Peut etre une prochaine fois… Jolie maison dans un quartier sympathique. Bien équipée. Très bon accueil par Donate. Facile d'accès par les transports en commun.
Le Tropenmuseum a côté vaut le détail détour. Wir haben die Tage in Amsterdam im Haus von Donate sehr genossen. Das Haus ist sehr individuell und wohnlich eingerichtet. Es ist gut ausgestattet, liegt zentral und zugleich ruhig und hat einen schönen Garten. Wir haben uns von der ersten Sekunde an zuhause gefühlt und können die Unterkunft nur empfehlen! Nous venons de passer une superbe semaine chez Donate avec notre fille de 2 ans.
La maison est très très bien desservie par les transports en commun (3 lignes de tramways et 1 ligne de train) à proximité immédiate et qui desservent à la fois le centre ville, la gare centrale et l’aéroport.
De plus, un marché se tient tous les jours (sauf le dimanche) sur la place adjacente à la maison.
La maison est très agréable à vivre et baignée de lumière. Elle dispose de tous les équipements nécessaires.
Donate est très réactive et attentionnée : des petits cadeaux nous attendaient !
Petit plus : le chat Francki est très gentil et patient.
Nous recommandons les yeux fermés ! Hermoso hogar!! No nos falto nada. Donate siempre estuvo á disposición nuestra. El barrio es excelente para todo lo que necesitas. Supermercados, transporte y muy cuidado todo. Super recomendable el lugar, la zona y por sobre todo Amsterdan, enamorado de esta ciudad y de todo lo que vimos. A casa de Donate é muito bem localizada, muito espaçosa e confortável. A localização perto da estação de trem é super conveniente, tanto na chegada e saída da cidade como para realizar os passeios por Amsterdam.
As dicas de restaurante e passeios deixada pela Donate também foram úteis. Ela foi gentil em nos deixar biscoitos e uma garrafa de vinho para a nossa chegada.
Tivemos um pequeno problema de barulho com uma festa no vizinho, mas acredito que tenha sido um episódio isolado. Relatei para Donate e ela prontamente nos respondeu. Passar 5 dias na casa da Donate foi uma ótima experiência em família. Nos sentimos como moradores locais e a casa possui um aconchego familiar e uma atmosfera muito tranquila. A decoração é muito bonita e as crianças amaram a casa e os brinquedos que estavam disponíveis e as deixaram bastante entretidas, assim como o gato Frenkie, sempre muito querido.
O bairro onde a casa se encontra é muito interessante, com muitos restaurantes e ótimos mercados.
A facilidade de acesso a toda parte de Amsterdam através do transporte público e a existência nas proximidades de uma estação de trem que nos levou diretamente ao aeroporto tornou tudo ainda mais simples.
Agradecemos à linda família da Donate por abrir a sua casa para a nossa família e ainda nos deixar um presentinho de boas vindas. Lovely stay here. Initially I was a bit surprised and uncomfortable that it was the owners actual house rather than a holiday property (had all their own personal belongings in it) but that was just my failing to understand the listing properly. When we settled in it was a nice place to stay in a quiet neighbourhood with nice restaurants and it felt safe. Overall, a great stay with no issues. El alojamiento estuvo muy bien y cumplió con todas nuestras expectativas. La ubicación es excelente, muy cerca del transporte público, lo que facilita moverse por la ciudad.Tambien está cerca de una área comercial con supermercados y restaurantes muy cerca. La cocina está muy bien equipada, ideal si te gusta cocinar durante tu estadía.
Como puntos a tener en cuenta: el baño del dormitorio principal no tiene puerta, lo que puede resultar incómodo para algunas personas de otras culturas. Frenkie (el gato) es muy tranquilo y amigable, pero suele buscar mimos por la mañana... ¡y a veces lo hace mordiendo los pies! Si no eres amante de los gatos, quizás este no sea el lugar ideal para ti.
En general, fue una buena experiencia. Donate y su familia nos recibieron con unas galletitas de miel típicas, champagne y una postal con una nota de bienvenida. Nos pareció muy amoroso de su parte. Die Unterkunft befindet sich in Amsterdam-Oost inmitten eines sehr belebten und interessanten Viertels. In unmittelbarer Nachbarschaft befinden sich unzählige Restaurants, Einkaufsmöglichkeiten, der volkstümliche Dappermarkt und der Oosterpark. Es handelt sich um eine schmale, dreistöckige Stadtwohnung, die ansonsten von Donate und ihrer Familie bewohnt wird. Die Wohnung ist sehr schön eingerichtet und bietet alles, was man für einen Aufenthalt in Amsterdam braucht. Insbesondere die Main-Coon-Katze Frenkie hat es uns und unseren Kindern angetan. Die Kommunikation mit Donate und die Schlüsselübergabe waren sehr unkompliziert. Wer nicht auf der Suche nach einer anonymen Ferienunterkunft, sondern nach einer authentischen Stadtwohnung ist, dem kann ich die Unterkunft wärmstens empfehlen. Insbesondere für Familien mit kleineren Kindern bietet die Wohnung alles, was man für einen angenehmen Amsterdam-Aufenthalt braucht ...

All ok except the heater i dont think it is working. it was an absolutely amazing stay, me and my best friend had an fabulous time staying at the Limehouse, it was in a great area, not too far from the center and there were loads of restaurants and cafes near it, the surroundings were to die for, one of the most beautiful places I've ever been. 10/10 would stay again 100% cant recommend enough. :) Great place and great location Alles war gut zu Fuß erreichbar. Die Umgebung war auch sehr schön und ein Supermarkt ist auch direkt gegenüber. Die Unterkunft war sauber und war zufriedend ausgestattet, jedoch wäre ein Kühlschrank schön gewesen.

Das Rauchen auf der Terrasse ist nicht erlaubt. I booked the place only 3 hours from my actual arrival to Amsterdam - was quick and easy!
Also, the room was very clean and hygienic.
10/10 will definitely book again. Die Unterkunft hatte eine hervorragende Lage. Es war wie ein Hotelzimmer mit Bett, Bad und Fernseher. Keine kleine Küche oder Kühlschrank. Auf der Therasse durfe nicht geraucht werden, was ärgerlich ist. Auf dem Bild hatte es nämlich einen Aschenbecher.
Ansonsten alles sauber und schönes Badezimmer. The check-in instructions were clear and accurate, and the location was easy to find. Room was exactly as described, wirh a hairdryer, fan, bins, hot shower, towels and coffee. We were very comfortable and had privacy while still getting to access the city easily. Thank you LimeHome! Great, modern apartment, with a sparkling bathroom and cozy bed. Situated nicely near tram & bus routes to more easily access places more distant. Still very walkable to the heart of the city, and prime attractions like Rijksmuseum & surrounding musea. Logement très sympa. propre dans l'ensemble afin juste une serviette avec une tache de sang et un extérieur avec des mégots sinon top. Merci The place is great to spend all day exploring and come back at night to shower and sleep. Has a smart TV to watch Netflix. The communication is through a third party which is a downside but overall great stay

Nice place, great location El apartamento de Adrianne y Luc está en una ubicación fantástica y nos hemos sentido muy bien en el. No nos a faltado de nada, además nos dejaron indicaciones de lugares, tanto para visitar como para comer que nos ido de lujo. Luc & Adrienne are lovely people and it was an absolute treat to stay at their gorgeous apartment while we explored Amsterdam. The location was unbeatable, our hosts were thoughtful and flexible, and it made for a fabulous trip. Cannot recommend enough - if you're thinking about it, you should book it immediately! Adrienne's apartment is clearly a place that has been lived in, and so has quite a bit of charm and individuality. She has decorated it tastefully and it is a comfortable place to stay. The area is both safe and pleasant, and her communication is excellent. Would highly recommend the host and apartment.

Super luxury apartment that was even better than our expectations. It was spacious, light, very modern and had everything we might need for our stay. The location was one minute from the tram and four minutes to the metro to get into the centre of town in less than ten minutes. The location is next to a park and local supermarkets, coffee shops and even a gelata.
The street where the apartment is situated is super quiet but a big shopping street was one minute around the corner so super convenient. There is a great Greek taverna one minute away - Romios Grieke Taverna - where we got some delicious take away meals.
It was easy to step outside the front door and walk into the centre of town along the canals past beautiful buildings from the 1600 - 1700s. Five minutes away the Albert Cuyp which is one of the biggest street markets I have ever seen and a neighbourhood full of bars, cafes and restaurants.
I am already planning my next trip to Amsterdam I had an amazing stay at Frank's place and would highly recommend it to anyone visiting the area. Frank was an exceptional host - he was extremely accommodating and always available to answer any questions I had. He went above and beyond to ensure that my stay was comfortable and enjoyable.
The location is perfect - just a few minutes from the subway and right across the street from the trolley, making it easy to get around the city. The apartment itself was clean, cozy, and had everything I needed for a comfortable stay.
Overall, I could not have asked for a better experience. Thank you, Frank, for being such a wonderful host! If I'm ever in the area again, I will definitely be staying at your place. Frank's house is an absolute gem! The contemporary design and impeccable furnishings create a truly modern and stylish ambiance. Every corner exudes cleanliness, making the stay incredibly comfortable. The outdoor space adds a delightful touch, perfect for enjoying the surroundings.
The locations is amazing, it's a prime spot that couldn't be more ideal, with tons of things to do in the area. Convenience meets luxury in the heart of the area.
On top of that Frank is an amazing host! Super easy to communicate with, friendly and ever accommodating.
We had the best time, thank you Frank! Very nice apartment. I recommend it! Spacious apt that was centrally located. We loved walking around to great restaurants and bars, and it was easy to take subway or tram to where we wanted to go.

It was a pleasure to stay at Quintis’ garden pies a terre. Close to metro with easy access to airport and Amsterdam Central station. Close to the best of De Pjip as well. Would stay here again. Très agréable séjour chez Quintus, je recommande vivement ce logement, il est parfait et très bien placé dans Amsterdam !! Quintus was great, he was super kind and helpful, the apartment was cozy and clean. our stay at The Garden Pied a Terre was delightful. quintus was great at communicating with us and we were able to check in with ease. The place looked just like the pictures and we were delighted with the extra treats that he left for us.
the location was great for seeing the city of Amsterdam. it's an easy walk to the Rijksmuseum and there were several cafes, bars and restaurants in the neighborhood. in addition the metro and a couple of tram lines were at the corner.
the apartment was very quiet and the blackout curtains made it easy to sleep in! We really enjoyed staying at the Pied-a-terre. It had everything we needed, was well equipped and comfortable. We loved the area and tried several of the local bars and cafés recommended by Quintus. It was also in a great location for the Rijksmuseum and there were plenty of transport options for going to other parts of the city. Quintus was easy to communicate with and very welcoming. We would stay here again. A charming, well-kept garden suite, a few steps below grade but with lovely natural light, so it doens't feel submerged. The location, in the historic district, is absolutely spectacular. All the major and smaller museums are within easy (and beautiful) walking distance and the views at every turn - of the canals and centuries-old streets and houses - are absolutely fantastic. You absolutely have the feeling of the place in the best possible way. The space is, as described, part of the owner's house, functionally completely private from the house. but does contain personal items stored in the space. The kitchen is clean and minimal, not for cooking. Communication with the host was excellent. Quintus is a very gracious and helpful host. His place is in a fabulous location near museums, shops, restaurants, canals. Access to the unit is very easy and the location is very quiet. Highly recommended! Quintus è un padrone di casa meraviglioso. L'appartamento è molto bello, arredato con gusto e la pulizia è impeccabile. La posizione è tranquilla e centralissima. Molti supermercati e ristoranti a pochi passi di distanza. Molto comodo anche per la vicinanza alla fermata della metropolitana.. Quintus' accommodation is absolutely amazing! Very aesthetically furnished and clean. We have actually been to amsterdam many times and this time it was so special because the location of the accommodation is so central! You can walk everywhere and there are super cute cafes and bars nearby. You feel like you live there and that's the best way to explore amsterdam. What we also noticed positively is that the location is very quiet. The booking was also very uncomplicated and really helpful. We will definitely come back and have already recommended it to all our friends! Thank you Quintus for the great time!
Warm regards Kristina Loved the space. Quintus was very responsive and helpful. Everything was perfect. Would definitely stay there again

Rutger was great. Very helpful and the place was clean. The stairs were difficult but they helped us so it wasn’t a problem. Nice neighbohood, great location, very nice hosts. Rutger foi gentil e atencioso desde o princípio. Nos recebeu no check in e mostrou sua casa com cuidado.
A localização eh boa, a poucos minutos do centro.
Apartamento confortável e bastante silencioso.
Recomendamos a estadia! Great host. Convenient location and apartment was exactly what we were looking for. Thanks again Rutger! I loved staying in Rutgers home! He was a fantastic host and checked in to make sure I had everything I need. He was even flexible with check in time/dates when I had to make some changes to my itinerary. I would definitely stay here again. this place is a gem, so lucky to found this place, fortunately this place is very baby friendly with lots of toys.
kitchen is complete, so easy to make breakfast for the whole family with lots of kitchen tools.
location is the star of this review, easy to get to the central with lotsss of great restaurant and coffee spot Very nice apartment, great location. The beds are very comfortable. The communication very Rutger is very easy, he was very helpful with restaurant. We had a great stay! Beautiful and clean apartment on a quiet street, very pretty view and lots to do in the area. Rutger was welcoming, flexible and responsive. Highly recommend Rutger was an exceptional host. He met us upon arrival on a Holiday weekend. l'appartamento si trova in una zona molto tranquilla con una fermata del bus a 2 minuti a piedi sotto casa molto utile per muoversi. Nice stay. The view of the apartment is wonderful! Peaceful neighborhood near the center with a view of the canal and a yoga studio across the street. Sanne is very kind and easy to work with. La localisation permet d’accéder facilement aux différents quartiers d’Amsterdam à pied. Les instructions de Nathalie sont claires. Nathalie est très agréable et réactive également. The location was great only 30 minutes walk away from the centre. We felt very safe and comfortable. Would definitely rebook if we went back to Amsterdam Appartement très bien situé pour un séjour à Amsterdam. Nous avons reçu un accueil chaleureux de la part de Bart !
Nathalie et Bart ont été réactifs et nous ont partagé de bonnes recommendations.

je recommande chaleureusement ce bel appartement 😊. The flat was lovely, in a peaceful area of Amsterdam and near public transportation

Excellent location and apartment. Felt like it was our home. Great neighbourhood and helpful staff. A great place to stay. Really, really wonderful. Very kind and communicative host. The space was beautiful and better than we imagined. Would come stay again. Super logement, nous sommes ravis de notre séjour, disponible et arrangeant, l’hôte a été parfait !
Je recommande vivement pour un séjour à Amsterdam ! Spacious but pricey. Quiet and friendly location but there are no restaurants or bars close by and supermarkets are limited. Micha is super friendly and very helpful, we hope to stay again next summer!
Thanks so much :) Unser Aufenthalt in Michas Haus war wunderbar, das Haus ist toll ausgestattet und wir haben uns sofort wohlgefühlt. Das Airbnb lädt zu einem gemütlichen Beisammensein ein. Der Weg in die Stadt ist mit Bus und Metro möglich, manchmal fährt der Bus nur alle 15 Minuten (die Bushaltestelle ist nur drei Minuten entfernt), sodass man etwas mehr Zeit einplanen muss. Wer mit viel Gepäck reist, muss sich darauf einstellen, dass es nicht viel Stauraum gibt. Auch für meine Hündin war die Unterkunft ideal, es gab einige Grünflächen und die Gegend ist auch im Dunklen gut beleuchtet. Die Kommunikation mit Micha war sehr angenehm, freundlich und hilfreich. L'abitazione è estremamente accogliente, adatta sia per coppie di adulti sia per famiglie con bambini. Se siete fortunati come lo siamo stati noi, il giardinetto è stupendo per due chiacchere in totale relax. La posizione è comodissima per spostamenti con i mezzi pubblici (la fermata dell'autobus è a pochi minuti a piedi) e per acquisti ai supermercati. M. è inoltre disponibile e sempre veloce nelle comunicazioni. Super raccomandato! Micha ist ein sehr freundlicher Gastgeber. Unser Check-In war unkompliziert und Micha war jederzeit erreichbar. Die Unterkunft war genauso wie beschrieben. Ein liebevoll gestalteter kleiner Garten gibt Gelegenheit kurz der stadt-Hektik zu entfliehen. Anbetracht der Preise, die auf dem Wohnungsmarkt in Amsterdam herrschen, war das Preis-Leistungsverhältnis in Ordnung.
Vielen Dank Micha für alles, wir hatten eine tolle Zeit. Beau logement. Bien situé.
Parfait pour un voyage en famille. Wir hatten eine ganz tolle Zeit in diesem wunderschönen und sauberen Haus. M. hat immer schnell auf Fragen reagiert und war stets freundlich. Die Gegend war ruhig und der Garten war perfekt für gemütliche Abende. Die Nachbarn waren ruhig und super nett. Ein rundum gelungener Aufenthalt.

Great central place to stay to visit the many sites of Amsterdam. The room had a cool character and was very comfortable. We appreciated the friendly welcome and advice. Would certainly stay again. for the rest it is very stylish with soft mattresses, beautiful bed cloths, spacious bathroom with douche and bathtub, great washing machine, gigantic living-room with kitchen that allowed us to be all together in one room doing own things. Dutch Masters is even more perfect than their write-up states.
First, location: we always stay in the city center. After all, what can be better than actually living, if only for a short while, in an UNESCO World Heritage site? The street was quiet and lovely. A block and a half away around the corner is both a decent grocery store and a Metro stop. At the other end of the block is, of all things, a card shop. Not too many people mail cards anymore but after visiting this place, I decided to revive the practice. This is not Hallmark. These are works of art. The place is worth a gander.
The building: The entire interior has been upgraded but retains all the charm of its heritage. The keyless entry system is a treat! A touch of the fob opens and closes the front door. No standing around fighting a key and your bags. (Same is true leaving. You hit a button and the door opens and closes.) the system also automatically turns on the hall and stair lights. The same fob allows you to open your apartment door without fussing with a keyhole, doorknob, groceries, etc. and yes, when you step out of the apartment, the hall and stair lights come on automatically and stay on until you leave the building.
The apartment: Lovely and equipped with everything you need! Plenty of places to store your things, lots of comfortable seating, plenty of towels, ready hot water. We lacked for nothing.
We stayed in the Van Gogh apartment. (Each apartment is named and decorated for a Dutch artist.). The apartment faced an exquisite formal back garden. Although the flowers were not yet in bloom, the host kept bowls of fresh flowers on the tables outside. A set of three huge windows with a window seat, wide enough for a nap, provided light and relaxation. (We watched a pair of wood doves build their nest.) Dutch Masters did a great job of modernizing the space while keeping architectural details - moldings, original stained glass.
The service: Christel met us when we arrived ( using the excellent taxi service they recommended) to give us key fobs and a tour, pointing out how everything worked. There is also a book with all the same information. Next to the book was a lively assortment of jams, cookies, and chocolates. Neither of us drink coffee but the apartment had the correct type of cup things used by the coffee machine.
The mattress was soft but supportive. The bed linens were crisp and soft.
The staff: We had very little need to interact with them but everyone was helpful and smiling when we did.
Really, everything was top notch - quiet, comfortable and high quality. We try to get to Amsterdam every year during tulip season. I highly recommend this Airbnb for anyone who wants a quiet private and spacious place, while only a few minutes away from all of the excitement of the city center. maison magnifique, familiale et chaleureuse.
le cadre est paisible. les hôtes sont très aimables. Wow! Incredible home, incredible hosts, incredible experience. Our family had a really fun and pleasant stay at this unique property. The house itself was very comfortable and we enjoyed being able to sit on the deck and relax along the water after a long day of sight seeing. The host, Michiel, was very helpful with local tips and information about the house. If you're family is looking for a different kind of Amsterdam experience, I definitely recommend this house. We stayed at Michiel's place for a week and absolutely loved the location. The house is located in the North end which is much less touristy and quieter. The free ferry and the Metro station are about a 20 minute walk away so it's easy to get around and explore. The immediate neighbourhood is beautiful and unique. Michiel and his family care about making sure we had a great experience. Didn't want to leave. 😆 Fantastic place to stay in Amsterdam!
The view and the terrace is nothing but perfect

The place was very clean, cozy, well located. The host was friendly and helpful. I recommend this place! Lovely apartment, the stairs are very challenging especially with bags but once you’re inside, it’s amazing! We had a great stay at this apartment! Very kind hosts! We loved the outdoor sitting area and the accessible location. great location, good price. Would come back here again Tony was helpful and welcoming. Sehr saubere Unterkunft, freundlicher Empfang und alles absolut unkompliziert. Gerne wieder! amazing place. great hosts.

The accommodation exceeded our expectations. The location is perfect for exploring Amsterdam. Having its own private entrance is really a bonus. A very spacious and clean apartment. Rogier was extremely helpful and made us very welcome. Highly recommended. Great place, good communication. Very clean and livable. Would stay again We stayed in Rogier’s place for just under two weeks. The flat is very well situated in west, a stones throw from Food Hallen, nice bars and cafes and also a very short cycle ride to other nice areas in the city. It could have been a little cleaner but Rogier was very helpful regarding our check in as we were caught in terrible traffic and had to check in late and the flat is very spacious. Two other points to note as I don’t remember these being mentioned in the listing - there is a noisy bar a couple of doors down that plays loud music so be wary if you’re a light sleeper, the stairs are also typical Dutch stairs and very steep with the bathroom on a separate floor to the bedroom in case that’s of concern! All in all though, this place was fine for us whilst we waited for our permanent flat to become available. Roomy apartment in an excellent location with all the necessities for a longer stay I spent 2 weeks on vacation at Rogier’s apartment in the Oud West neighborhood of Amsterdam. Rogier was an outstanding and accommodating host. The check-in process was easy. He was very responsive during the visit when needed. The apartment was in a great location with easy access to restaurants, cafes, and great parks. The apartment was nicely furnished and had all the necessary supplies making our stay easy and enjoyable. I would stay there again during my next visit to Amsterdam. It felt like home, was really comfy and the location is amazing, it is really close to lots of restaurants and coffees, and the neighborhood is pretty quite and welcoming. Rogier's apartment is in the true essence of Airbnb (his own home). This is one of the reasons we were attracted to staying there.
Unfortunately we were not sent the full address of the apartment. When clicking on the Airbnb link it gave us co-ordinates which sent us to the wrong address. Thankfully it was just the next street. Rogier was very helpful and very responsive and got us to the right address quickly.
I don't think the description expresses enough how steep the stairs are in the apartment. We've been to Amsterdam before so have been exposed to the steep stairs but if you haven't then some people may find them a problem. There are 2 sets of steep stairs up to Rogier's living/dining/kitchen area as well as the toilet. Another steeper set of stairs takes you to the bedroom and shower/bathroom.
Overall the apartment is a good space and in a lovely area however it does need some love and attention and unfortunately I found it be not very clean. We had a great stay, the apartment felt like home right away. Super comfy, well equipped, and in a beautiful neighborhood that's quiet but still close to lots of restaurants, cafes, and parks.
The check-in was smooth, and the host was very responsive and helpful whenever we needed anything. Everything was clean and nicely furnished, and it had all the little things that make a stay easy and pleasant.
Would definitely recommend it and stay again :) Thanks Rogier The apartment was exactly as pictured. It was very comfortable with good seating throughout. The bed was comfortable and there is air common the bedroom if you need it. There is also a comfortable back porch outside the bedroom.

Rogier was very friendly and helpful. He’s a really nice guy.
The neighborhood is very quiet because it is not a pass through to other places. There are several good restaurants very close and an excellent gelato shop on the same block. Various trams are a short walk.
There is a nice bicycle rental place on the next block. A bicycle ride is essential in Amsterdam.
One caution: this is a traditional Dutch house with very steep and narrow stairways. There are two such stairways up to the living room area. The stairs to the bedroom are even steeper and turn a corner. If you have any mobility issues you may want to think carefully about this.
But overall, this is a great place. Highly recommended. Rogier's apartment is a beautiful spot. Clean, well furnished, with all the amenities you need, even AC in the bedroom, which is not trivial for Amsterdam. Beautiful terrace withba viewvon the roofs is a bonus.
Just on the beautiful Bellamyplein with a gorgeous view.
Rogier is a very welcoming and responsive host, met me in person, helped with my heavy suitcase, and cared throughout the stay.
Warmly recommended.

Bis auf das teilweise schmutzige Geschirr war alles so wie im Vorfeld abgesprochen 👍 This is such a great spot in a great neighbourhood. Apartment was really lovely and has a great feel. Boede fem dage i lejligheden, hvor vi havde det fantastisk. Alt var meget rent og i orden, hyggelig indrettet med personligt præg, ingen IKEA PRÆG og Ryan havde skabt rigtig god plads, med tomme hylder, skuffer og stativ til vores tøj og bagage. Sengen er god og fast, se sov dejligt.
Hyggelig gårdhave, som vi nød meget da vi var heldigt med godt vejr.
Ryan har været super fin at kommunikere med hele vejen igennem, helt enkelt og uproblematisk. Der er opsat nøgleboks, så indcheckning var helt tryg og rolig.
Beliggenheden er fantastisk, ganske kort til byen, og selv om lejligheden er i gadeplan, er det helt stille og roligt.
Vi giver Ryan og Charlottes lejlighed, vores aller allerbedste anbefalinger.

Maisonnette très charmante avec extérieur, literie très confortable. Communication facile avec l'hôte. We had a lovely stay. Slightly unequipped for a Christmas lunch in terms of oil, pepper etc, but a quick trip to the grocery store sorted that out.
matched the description, 4 minute walk from a tram that takes 20 minutes to get to centraal station.

Highly recommended! It was a beautiful stay in the apartment!

A diamond in Amsterdam! Apartment hotel reasonably close to the centre of Amsterdam. Good size room. Kitchen with everything you need to cook a meal. Loved the place, it was quite and chill with the view on the river, loved it Lugar 10/10, tranquilo, todo lo tienes cerca, la cama súper cómoda, Entrée dans le logement très simple, et nous avons pu arriver en avance, ce qui était vraiment appréciable. Gros plus : les casiers pour laisser les valises, très pratiques ! Communication avec l’hôte ultra fluide. Petits bémols : quelques défauts de propreté (poussière), climatisation à l’étage assez faible donc il faisait chaud, surtout avec un bébé — heureusement, ventilateurs disponibles. Eau chaude un peu capricieuse le soir. Escaliers assez raides, prudence.

Jalmar’s place was so comfy and clean! It was easy to get around and check in was seamless. He was flexible about check in hours and communicated well! I would recommend this for sure. Jalmar is a super responsive and friendly host and accommodated us both during check in and checkout. We absolutely loved Nanja’s beautiful home. It was perfect for our family vacation in Amsterdam. j'y retournerai sans doute. Great location! Less expensive than some other Air Bnbs nearby. Host was responsive and kind, and the accommodations were adequate. The reviews and comments regarding the stair access to the apartment are not exaggerating. The staircase access to the apartment is absolutely DREADFUL.
