Sinon rien à dire, je conseille ce logement Everything was perfect! This is a five-star review for a five-star rental. The hosts are kind, considerate people. The apartment is beautiful, clean, and comfortable. The location is convenient and quiet.
The Apartment
It’s new, modern, and well-outfitted. The beds were comfortable and the sheets were soft. It has plenty of space to stretch out, cook a meal, and relax after a day of exploring Amsterdam and the surrounding area.
The Location
NDSM-Werf is just cool. It’s short walk to the GVB Ferries (which are frequent and free) that will take you to Centraal Station and other locations across the river. When you tire of the crazy Centrum crowds, returning to Amsterdam-Noord is chill and relaxing.
The Hosts
Joshua, the owner, is as nice as could be. He helped us adjust the thermostat via video call and checked in on us to make sure we were comfortable. His co-host Jason is equally nice and enthusiastic. Your comfort is their priority. They are responsive and friendly.

Would definitely recommend this place and I look forward to staying here again sometime! Joshua’s place is lovely, photos don’t do it justice , he was very responsive to our needs

Casa perfetta posizione ottima Bewertungstitel: Schlechte Organisation, fehlende Leistungen und unangenehme Umgebung
Unser Aufenthalt war leider in mehreren Punkten enttäuschend. Bei der Ankunft war der vereinbarte Schlüsselkasten leer – stattdessen erhielten wir den Schlüssel von einer uns nicht angekündigten Person, ohne klare Kommunikation oder Einweisung.
In der Unterkunft war zunächst Toilettenpapier vorhanden, doch nach drei Tagen war es aufgebraucht. Nach unserer Nachfrage wurde uns zugesichert, dass in 15 Minuten neues gebracht werde – es kam jedoch nie etwas.
Laut Beschreibung war ein Frühstück inbegriffen, was auch einer der Gründe für unsere Buchung war. Trotz mehrfacher Nachfrage – sogar telefonisch direkt beim Vermieter – wurde nie Frühstück angeboten oder geliefert. Es erfolgte keinerlei Reaktion auf unsere Rückmeldung.
Zusätzlich roch es im Hausflur dauerhaft stark und beißend – sehr unangenehm, und nicht durch Lüften zu beheben. Für den hohen Preis haben wir deutlich mehr erwartet. The guy we met was pleasant enough, showed us to the room and explained if we want to get out to the outdoor bit we have to climb out the window and that if we wanted to smoke in room we can(we didn’t, we don’t smoke). Bathroom was nice enough, although shower leaked if in too long. Like I say the stay was ok, the constant weed smell throughout the property gets a bit much.
probably not worth the money overall but we had a good weekend. Todo muy bien. Notre séjour chez Mario s’est très bien passé.

A highly recommended accommodation environment with outstanding features that can be sailed A wonderful sailing experience with the most charming captain and crew, in outstanding views and within Amsterdam. Best part of our 3 week vacation to the Netherlands! We cooked together, played together, and cried together. Sandra learns quickly how we were capable of helping sail the Markermeer, and seems like she's been an instructor long enough to know how to bring out the best in people. Plus the boat is very clean, very well maintained, and the listing is a very accurate representation of what the facilities will be like. Absolutely amazing.  My wife and I and our four older children spent three nights with Sandra and had a blast.  We started our trip in Enkhuizen (about an hour from Amsterdam by car) and spent the day in a really cool fishing village, which Sandra was able to get us entrance into at no cost since we were passengers of one of the antique ships.  Over the course of the next three days, we sailed to Urk, Hoorn, the island of Marken, and finally departed in Monnickendam. Blessed with beautiful weather, our days were a mix of restful relaxation, combined with moments of intense excitement and energy as we sailed the boat.  We also got to explore each of the cities we visited (Hoorn was our favorite) and see much more of the the Netherlands than just Amsterdam.  If you have the opportunity to take this amazing adventure, understand that you will be much more than just a passenger - you are also the CREW!  Our only regret was that we didn't book more days.  Thank you Sandra!

ce logement atypique à la décoration surannée a été notre havre de paix dans Amsterdam bouillonnante. Nous reviendrons avec grand plaisir. My friend and I enjoyed our stay here! One of our last nights we stayed up because of noise from the neighbors, but otherwise a peaceful area of the city. Would stay here again - thank you! We expected the boat to be quirky and it was. Initially, it was fun but we only stayed 2 nights out of our expected 7 nights. We left due to serious comfort and safety concerns. The floor in the kitchen was squishy under the rug and there was a musty smell that led us to think there may be a mold issue. The power plugs were overloaded and connected to devices through many extension cords. There were throw rugs piled on top of each other creating a tripping hazard. Comfort-wise, some of the chairs were broken and most were worn and torn. Really, there was no comfortable chair to sit in. The bed was comfortable but there was no place at all to put clothes in the bedroom. Finally, there was a sign on the wall indicating that strangers might come to the door and asking us not to allow them in. This is related to the fact that there are restrictions on airbnbs and the owner did not want to be found in violation. The sign also said that this could result in burglary (not sure why). Wir haben sehr schöne Tage in Amsterdam verbracht.

We enjoyed our visit and the location provided easy access to all we came to see. мы предполагали, что в квартире мы сможем пользоваться не только своей комнатой на 3 этаже, но и общим залом на втором этаже. к сожалению это было невозможно сделать, потому что хозяин был всегда в квартире и нам это было некомфортно. Мне кажется, нужно при описании жилья исключить зал, как общую комнату, тогда гости будут понимать, что в их распоряжении только спальня, а в зале постоянно находится хозяин. так же очень сильно впечатление испортила стройка, которая идет рядом с квартирой, было очень шумно . работы начинались в 7 утра и это были громкие работы перфоратором, от чего спать совершенно невозможно было утром. Kevin was an incredible host! Super thoughtful, kind, responsive, and generous. He was accommodating to an early check-in, which made our arrival so much smoother. Highly recommend this place to make your stay in Amsterdam smooth and enjoyable. Will be returning in the future! Wonderful place with a wonderful host! First time visiting Amsterdam and would gladly spend another trip at Kevin's home. It is a great room, close to local transportation and in the heart of downtown. Loved the room. Very cozy. Felt comfortable ans loved the super tall ceiling and big windows. It is very central, close to everything you would want to do in the city and also it was noisy at night but it didn’t bother us very much (very understandable as well)
Would love to stay again. Kelvin is such a warm and welcoming host, and it was a real treat to meet his adorable cats. The apartment is beautifully decorated with great taste, which made my stay very comfortable and enjoyable. The location is also super convenient, making it easy to get around the city. I would definitely love to stay here again in the future Kevin’s place was amazing! I highly recommend staying here, perfect location and fantastic history! We had a wonderful stay at this apartment!
The place is very clean, cozy, and feels like home. There is a magnificent view of the church right from the bedroom window. The location is perfect – close to the centre and good restaurants, but not noisy neighbourhood. Kevin is very friendly and kind. We would definitely recommend this apartment and would be happy to come back again! We loved our stay at Kevin’s place! It was like a dream come true — a beautiful attic room in Amsterdam with an old world feel, big windows, a church bell right outside, and beautifully furnished. And there was SO much space! Big comfy bed, couch, plenty of room to spread out (rare for Europe). And the location is very walkable in the center of everything, 15 mins walk from the central train station. Kevin and his partner were so welcoming and kind, even made us coffee in the morning. But the best part was their beautiful cat! We would love to come back and stay again.

Hands down the best airbnb experience I've ever had. My family and I spent six weeks at Mirjam and Pim's apartment and fell in love with the neighborhood, Vondelpark, and the beautiful flat itself. It used to be a school and the unit, in particular, was once two classrooms with ~15' ceilings, which was renovated into a 2br loft. Pretty much the only thing cooler than the place itself were the hosts--we ended up hanging out w Mirjam and Pim whenever we had a chance. They are lovely, warm, and inspiring people. I really hope to see them again down the line. Pim, made us feel at home right away. Communication was excellent. And they certainly have the best equipped kitchen I have ever had in a holiday apartment. It was a joy to cook there. A Really beautiful apartment in a great part of town. Tucked away from the centre but still only a stones throw away. Good local bars and restaurants. loads of useful tips from Pim. And the best Bath ever! We had wonderful Vacation here, and Pim is a warm landlordy . He had a Perfect kitchen for us can made some meal like in my home.⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ / BRIEF REVIEW / Fabulous space, fabulous location, fabulous host, highly recommended.
/ LONG REVIEW / My partner and I spent 3 weeks in this apartment over the holidays with our friend. This is a beautiful apartment, and Pim & Mirjam have filled it with many beautiful things. There are a few changes since the photos were taken — the second bed (the small brass bed in the photos) has been replaced with a larger folding bed, and there is now a tv where the grey sofa sits in the photos. The kitchen is as good as we hoped, and we made many a wonderful feast in the apartment. The internet is stable and fast, and the bed is large and on the softer side. The bathtub is fantastic. Pim is the owner and resident of the apartment (not a management company), and you will not find a nicer, more helpful, more communicative host. We loved our time in the old schoolhouse and highly recommend it. Bedankt, Pim! O imóvel é maravilhoso! Próximo a tudo, transporte público, supermercados e atrações turísticas! Me senti em casa realmente !!! ❤️ An incredible apartment, in a fantastic location, with the perfect host!
We couldn't have asked for more. The apartment was sparkling clean, with an incredible kitchen if you enjoy cooking, tonnes of natural light and close to transport. The area is nice and quiet but still very close to shops and delicious restaurants.
Pim is a super responsive and very helpful host.
Would highly recommend staying here and definitely would do so again myself!
Thanks Pim and Mirjam! x Pim hosts you in a unique industrial style loft, with access to everything you'll need. The place is easily accessible by tram and bike, and the area has great cafes and restaurants just around the corner. Pim is super open and friendly, which made checkin and out really smooth. 10/10 recommended stay :) We stayed for 2 weeks to get a feel for living in Amsterdam as we consider our upcoming relocation and Pim's place certainly allowed us to do all that and more. It's a great, industrial-type loft apartment located in a fantastically local neighborhood, but with just the right amount of retail and restaurants around the corner.
Also it has the benefit of being very close to Vondelpark for morning jogs or just lazing around the park taking in the scenery. Also conveniently close to the city center by bike or tram, so you'll definitely feel away from the craziness but 100% part of the city.
Finally, if you're a cook--or plan to cook while you're renting here, I will say this is THE best kitchen I've ever seen in Amsterdam -- or anywhere in a European Air BnB for that matter (most are the size of a postage stamps with no prep space or severely lacking in cooking accessories). Pim's kitchen is a cook's dream. Everything you can possibly imagine (from woks to juicers) is there and there's a ton of ethnic and organic grocery stores in the nearby vicinity. You'll feel like you haven't left your kitchen at home.
Finally, as others have said, Pim is a fantastic host--always around for any minor question you may have--he'll never make you feel like a bother. Definitely a 5 star stay! Pim made us feel right at home!
The apartment is spacious and very comfortable, situated in a gorgeous building that used to be a school. Fully equipped with everything you need and more.
Highly recommend Pim as a host and his wonderful place! The neighborhood is lovely, and the apartment itself is very nice. Pim kindly agreed to let me check in early. However, the promised bottle of wine and bolognese sauce never arrived.
When I got into the apartment, there were 2 baited mousetraps in the kitchen. When I asked about it, Pim acknowledged that there were mice. I would have left, but my circumstances were such that it was impossible logistically.
As Pim was out of the country, his friend Steve was his substitute host. He wasn't able to show me how to work the tv or the sound system. On one occasion when I locked myself out, no one was available to let me in, so I had to rely on a neighbor to break into apartment.
It's a great place, but not well managed. I would not stay there again.

. The location of the apartment is super in Amsterdam West closing famous spots of the city. Public transportation is just 2 minutes' walk.
The apartment itself is quite bright with nice view. You got everything you need like at home. Plus welcoming Guro, you even don't wanna step out and just sit at balcony with a cup of coffee all day long.
The best experience ever here. Thanks Guro and see you next time! Appartement très propre et une hôte très à l’écoute The place was very tidy and cozy, we really enjoyed our stay. The host was very friendly and responsive. Location is great, with great transport connections, it takes about 20 minutes to city centre. Wir waren zu dritt in der Wohnung, und waren von der Lage und der liebevollen Einrichtung sehr angetan, zudem ist Guro sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit, die Unterkunft liegt optimal für alles was wir per Fahrrad unternommen haben, es hat rundum alles fabelhaft gepasst. We definitely want to visit Guru again. Guro ga estado muy pendiente de cada cuestion planteada, la ubicación era ideal para visitar la ciudad y nos sentimos como en casa. También nos dio muchos buenos consejos. Volveremos!!!

Additionally, Numa (the host) promised me free luggage storage and then rescinded with only a 10% discount with a local storage company saying “mistakes happen”. I’ll run in the other direction if I ever see another Numa listing. So tiny and so nice place 🫶🏽 This was one of the worst Airbnb experiences I’ve had.
Before arrival I was told not only that I couldn’t check in early (fine), but that my room wouldn’t even be ready on time. When I asked to at least leave my bags, I was told to take them to a paid storage facility, meaning extra Ubers and fees, which is unreasonable. When I finally checked in, the apartment was dirty: hair in the bed and bathroom, stained carpet that hadn’t been vacuumed, cobwebs on the walls, and a bad smell. The ground floor window didn’t close properly, letting in mosquitoes. The photos don’t match, décor, blankets, and plants shown were gone, paint was peeling, and the place felt run down. It was also loud at all hours: pipes rattled above the bed whenever anyone used water, plus constant traffic noise from the main street (not disclosed). I asked to leave and get a refund, sent photos as requested, and then the host ignored me. Misrepresented, dirty, and overpriced. Ótimo

Fantastic hotel, would highly recommend! Our stay with Volkshotel was wonderful! The rooms looked exactly like the pictures and were very comfortable. l'hôtel était génial dans l'ensemble. seul petit bémol, j'ai très mal dormi car étant situé au premier étage, j'ai entendu jusqu'à au moins 4h du matin la musique du dj (une soirée était organisée au -1) j'ai donc passé une très mauvaise nuit.
par contre, le sauna, le bain chaud situé sur le rooftop étaient bien agréable et le petit déjeuner buffet très bon

amazing appartement with space and confort. Nothing much to add. perfect place with kind hosts. We'll come back! 😙😙 Merci à Michel pour avoir été flexible pour notre arrivée. Appartement très agréable avec le toit ouvrant sur une terrasse, je recommande !!

We had an absolutely wonderful stay! It was like a home from home. Stef was an amazing host, always happy to answer questions and very responsive. The apartment has a local train station which makes it easy to get around!

Thanks once again!
We loved our stay Our stay was lovely. The flat was cosy and the decor was tastefully done. We enjoyed the extras of ambient lights and a speaker. Thanks for having us! Stef & Linda were great hosts, they were very helpful and responsive even leading up to our stay.

The location is about 20-30 minutes to the city center and easy to navigate. The apartment matched the pictures! The apartment is comfy and cozy, and the hosts being so friendly and responsive was the best part! Thanks again! Merci ! Very nice and comfortable apartment, 10-15min walk from tram & trains to city center. We had a great stay!

Overall, we enjoyed our stay and appreciated the cozy space and well-equipped kitchen. zona tranquila

lovely apartment. clean and cozy. walkable to everything. Wonderful space! I enjoyed my stay here! One of the most beautiful airbnb’s i’ve ever stayed in. Such a treat! I feel so lucky to have found this apartment to stay in during our vacation in Amsterdam. This was my first visit to Amsterdam, but Elizabeth provided me with answers to all of my questions and made some wonderful suggestions for things to see and do. Staying in this lovely apartment was the icing on the cake to a wonderful vacation in Amsterdam. Very much so enjoyed this Airbnb! Eliza was a great host, the apartment was perfect.
It's in a very nice location close to the 3 tram (if you want to go to Oost, Museumplein, de Jordaan, etc.) and even closer to the 4 tram (if you want to go to Centrum or Rivierenbuurt). You will love this Airbnb. Best air b&b I've stayed at in ages!! Fantastic central location and nice neighbourhood too. The place was spotless, comfortable and welcoming, we had everything we needed. Communication was prompt and friendly. Amsterdam is wonderful to just wander around and stumble across places along with all the museums etc. From our holiday we can recommend a number of eating / drinking places. We ordered food in with Uber-eats on two evenings.
Dignita towards the centre, fab brunch café (bookable in advance, they do accept some walk-ins, go early!). Travelling back and forth on the trams was really easy, and there are lots of good food shops near the house for home cooking. The house kitchen has everything you could need (we had a chef in our party - so he was happy. And so were we!). I enjoyed making the fresh coffee so much, that I ordered the same espresso pot for myself at home :).

Recomiendo que alquilen la casa no se arrepentirán

Une bonne adresse à retenir! 这处民宿距公交车站很近，乘车去各个景点游玩很方便。各种生活用品齐全使用方便，室内干净整洁，周围安静，距离超市很近，还有面包房和非常好的海鲜店和肉食店，房主能及时回复我提出的各类问题，为我提供好玩的景点信息，我们在这住了12天，非常愉快！这处民宿位于3楼没有电梯楼梯较陡，年长的或腿脚不便的游客在选择时要考虑到这点。 Really lovely apartment. In walking distance to bars, bakeries and restaurants but also very quite. Everything was very clean and bed was very comfortable.
Apartment is up 3 flights of steep stairs so wouldn’t be suitable for all. Inge‘s flat is an incredible deal. Very comfortable, an impressive living room, and a balcony that is perfect on sunny days. The neighborhood is very quiet and relaxed while also having lots of great options for food, and it‘s a nice reprieve after a day in the city. Inge is an awesome guest who is very flexible and helpful. One of my best AirBnB experiences ever.

Très bon appartement pour 6 personnes, dommage qu’il n’y ai pas de toilette au rez de chaussée. ✨ Great host , great location . Had everything we needed . Great Airbnb for a weekend away Appartamento molto bello, pulito e curato.
Self check-in molto comodo e efficiente.
La zona è comoda, a meno di 10 min a piedi dalla stazione centrale
Consigliato! Logement impeccable, propre, beau, très bien situé, près du centre mais dans une rue calme.
L’Arrivée est simple et les instructions sont claires. Todo perfecto y muy limpio. El apartamento se encuentra bien ubicada, cerca de la estación de bus y metro. Es cómodo y amplio. La comunicación con el anfitrión siempre fue rápida.
Cuando hice la reserva no especificaron que debía pagar un adicional de 73 euros. Pensé que todos los impuestos estaban incluidos en el precio inicial. We had a great time Nice and comfortable Séjour sympa, malheureusement la douche était bouché et le pommeau de douche était cassé.

We felt very comfortable at Florine's place. it was specious and clean. There are some great restaurants and cafes close by, and the train is also right outside the door. Really lovely apartment. Light, airy, stylish and comfortable. Nice little balcony. Great part of town too. It was quite a last minute booking and Florine was really helpful in making it all work for us. Would definitely recommend and would gladly stay again. Such a cozy place and such an incredible neighborhood! Also Florine is such a kind host. Wonderful stay! The apartment was spotless, stylish, and had everything we needed. The host was super helpful and check-in was smooth. Great location too — quiet but close to everything. Would definitely come back! Florine was the best Airbnb host I have had in traveling to over 20 cities over 10 years with Airbnb. She was highly communicative, had great local tips, and made her space an Oasis in Amsterdam. Could not recommend enough. My husband and I loved Florine’s apartment. The back balcony is so dreamy and the neighborhood is charming. We felt right at home. Florine was incredibly helpful and had great recommendations for things to do in the neighborhood. My mom and I had a fantastic stay in Amsterdam! The apartment was lovely, with a great balcony and a perfect location near public transport and bike rentals. The host was very communicative, offered lots of local recommendations, making our stay easy and enjoyable. We highly recommend this spot and would definitely stay again! The apartment is in a good location very close to the public transport and within easy walking distance to a wide variety of restaurants (including vegan options) along the canals. The open plan living room with a view to mature trees in the central courtyard garden enriches the delightfulness of the place. While the apartment is on the first floor, people with mobility challenges who are visiting Amsterdam for the first time should be aware of the ‘Dutch Stairs’ which are narrower and harder to traverse than standard stairs, and well advised to take this into consideration in booking any apartments in Amsterdam. We had a pleasant stay at Florine's apartment, which is not far from the museums district. ホストとのコミュニケーションはスムーズでチェックインや滞在中のリクエストにすぐに対応してくれました。
部屋は広く、明るく、清潔で、オシャレなインテリアに気分が上がりました。
トラムの駅にも近く、楽に移動が出来ました。

My stay at Flip and Cherelle's apartment was everything I could have ever asked for!
From the beginning of my request throughout until the end of my stay, I couldn't have picked a better place, host and location! The communication was superb and quick!
The apartment was absolutely beautiful from top to bottom, everything I needed was there, the amenities to decor was very tasteful!
This apartment is definitely unique and I felt so lucky to stay here (especially at such short notice)
I would highly recommend this apartment to anyone who is here for a short break away like mine! I would definitely choose this apartment if I was to return to Amsterdam!
Thank you both :) The apartment is charming and the stay was comfortable and enjoyable, the owners of the apartment are nice and pleasant.
We will be happy to come again. Loved Flip’s place— in a private and quiet neighborhood. We loved staying in typical Amsterdam home. It was close to canals and we could walk to most places. Beautiful place in a wonderful neighborhood! Truly the perfect apartment for our Amsterdam stay! We really enjoyed the quiet and beauty of this particular street while also being very easily walkable to things to do and multiple tram/bus stations.
Both patios were lovely and a nice way to relax between the many things we packed into our first visit to Amsterdam. The bed and couch were both super comfy, the kitchen and bathrooms were also very nice and well appointed. Flip and Cherelle left great recommendations as well, our absolute favorite was La Perla 🍕 and the Jordaan neighborhood in general. We’d stay here again in a heartbeat and recommend to others looking for a similar peaceful yet central retreat. The stairs should be considered if that will be a problem for any renters but the listing is very clear about that and steep stairs are everywhere throughout city. We thought the beautiful roof top patio and lovely skylights were well worth the leg work out ;) Thank you Flip and Cherelle for sharing your beautiful home with us! Flip‘s spacious apartment (two floors, roof terrace, comfy sofa) is the perfect starting point to explore the city. Trams and busses are right closeby, it was surprisingly quiet during the night for being this close to the centre. We had a fantastic long weekend in Amsterdam. Flip’s apartment was perfect, so comfortable and spacious, in a friendly and well served neighbourhood. Well equipped kitchen, lovely roof terrace, comfy sofa and bed. We enjoyed the local restaurants and cafes and it was quick and easy to walk to the more historic areas, great market and fabulous places to eat and drink in the Jordaan and 9 streets areas. Would highly recommend. Great stay for a few days in Amsterdam... wish we could have stayed longer as this felt like home while we were there.
Very accommodating hosts! Highly recommended. Perfect location if you want to be close to the centre but not in the centre. Great neighbourhood restaurants within walking distance.
Cosy and comfortable apartment. Great 5th floor patio.
Please note the door to the unit is on the second floor(3) and the unit is actually on the 3 rd and 4th (4th and 5th). No elevator. The place was beautiful, far more spacious that the pictures would suggest. The location was fantastic, great coffee shops, restaurants and public transport on the doorstep (also a reasonable walk into the city centre) Flip was friendly, helpful and really accommodating.

Nice place The flat was light and airy, and the benefit of being the top floor meant it was quiet and had good views. Check-in was easy and Iwan provided recommendations for brunch and dinner places. There were several coffee pods and a coffee machine available, and a clear fridge. Transport there from the airport was easy, and its on a direct tramline into the centre- taking about 25 minutes.
The sofa bed was fine if a little lumpy. I would recommend the stay. Wir waren für einen Städtetrip in Amsterdam. Zu Fuss erreicht man die Tramstation super innert 2 Minuten und ist somit innert 15-20 Minuten direkt im Stadtzentrum. Die Lage ist sehr friedlich und schön, man findet auch unweit von der Unterkunft gute Cafés um bestmöglichst in den Tag zu starten. Rundum eine Unterkunft, an der es an nichts fehlt! Amazing stay with Iwan. Tucked away in quaint neighborhood. Uber easily accessible to the main part of the city but lots of restaurants/ cafes/ and grocery store within walking distance. Lots of stairs going up to apartment but Iwan was so kind to help us with our bags on arrival which made check in a breeze. He was very responsive as well. Apartment has multiple hatch windows which give Beautiful panoramic views of the city. Would stay here again and recommend to all. Although the apartment was further away from the main city center, the location was in a safe and peaceful environment. The apartment was clean and had all the described amenities. Iwan was extremely helpful and responsive especially regarding the luggage given the extremely steep stairs. It would be good to note that a picture of your passport has to be provided at the time of check in. Other than that, we thoroughly enjoyed our stay! Lovely stay, nice area with great places to eat ( breakfast in Malva and dinner in D&A hummus bistro). Very easy to find and close to the airport connections( no. 4 to rai and then train straight to schipol).
Very clean and Iwan was great with communication. Nice apartment, nice host 15 mins from centre Had a great stay at Iwan’s place, he was already very responsive and helpful. The apartment is nice and the windows bring a lot of natural light into the house.
After reading reviews initially I had thought the amount of stairs and floors was going to be too much, and to be honest it’s not bad at all.
Would stay again for sure! Iwan's place was perfect for our stay in Amsterdam. Amazing apartment, great location and very friendly host! We were able to easily cook our breakfasts and walk to restaurants. Check-in was very smooth and communication was easy throughout our stay. Highly recommend! I had a lovely time staying at Iwan’s place. It had great views, brilliant transport links to the centre and it was lovely and clean. Iwan was an attentive host with quick response times and recommendations. The flat was lovely, just be mindful it is on the top floor so there are great views but only accessible by stairs, so may not be suitable for everyone. Overall, a brilliant place and we had a great stay, would definitely come back.

We hebben echt genoten van ons verblijf in dit prachtige appartement. Bij aankomst werden we aangenaam verrast door de leuke attentie die voor ons klaar stond. De hele accommodatie was erg schoon en gezellig, waardoor we ons meteen thuis voelden. De locatie is ideaal, met gemakkelijke toegang tot alles in de stad. We kunnen deze plek ten zeerste aanbevelen en kijken ernaar uit om hier in de toekomst weer te verblijven. Bedankt voor een geweldige ervaring! Close walk to the city ce Nice place. User friendly.
Good area, easy to access public transit. 15 to 25 mins to most attractions.
Lots of restaurants and cafe around
A good spot to stay while in Amsterdam 👍 We had an absolutely incredible stay at Maxime's place in Amsterdam! The location couldn't have been more perfect. The flat itself was exactly as described—actually, it exceeded our expectations in every way. It was very clean, beautifully decorated, and equipped with everything we could possibly need.
Maxime was the perfect host, always checking in to ensure we had everything we needed and offering helpful tips and advice for our stay. Her attentiveness truly made our trip special. We couldn't have asked for a better experience and will definitely be returning on our next visit to Amsterdam. Thank you, Maxime! Perfect apartment in a great location! Really enjoyed our stay 😊 Maxime's apartment was in a great location, super close to the tram to get to old town. The apartment was immaculately clean, kitchen well stocked, very comfortable bed and very close to grocery and restaurants (and beautiful Rembrandt Park). They have just remodeled so everything was brand new. We like to meet our hosts and we were fortunate to meet Maxime for check in and she went over everything with us. A great base for a short stay.

Sehr schöne Wohnung in ruhiger Lage. Supermarkt in Fußweite genauso wie öffentliche Verkehrsmittel. Saubere, übersichtlich und aufgeräumte Wohnung mit allem, was man braucht. Der Balkon zum Innen Garten lässt einen fast vergessen, dass man in einer riesigen Stadt ist. Wir hatten ein schönes Wochenende und waren sehr zufrieden!

This place is the perfect location for exploring Amsterdam!! We were able to walk everywhere, and the apartment is right around the corner from a main street with tram service. There are restaurants everywhere to try.
The neighbors upstairs were pretty heavy footed which did keep us awake a few nights but nothing crazy, just usual foot traffic in an older building. Apartment was very quiet otherwise.
The apartment was clean and well appointed and we were very comfortable staying there. Nous avons passé un super séjour dans l’appartement de Otto qui est très spacieux et propre. Emplacement idéal dans le meilleur quartier d’Amsterdam. Otto est réactif, disponible et arrangeant ( nous avons pu lui laisser nos bagages même si nous avions rendu le logement). Nous recommandons sans problème! We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Otto’s place. Great location for our needs. We had a great stay. Location was perfect for visiting the centre of Amsterdam. We walked to the museums and to Central Station without too much effort and got to see a lot more than taking the metro. The 397 bus from Schiphol got us to Rijksmuseum and we walked to Otto’s via the market.
Good pizzas at the restaurant next door, ideal place for people watching and seeing the swifts fly around the church. We eventually got an icecream at Massimos when they opened at 10am - otherwise a 30 min wait until 11pm! A very successful visit. Très bon week-end dans ce grand studio ! Il y a tout ce qu’il faut pour y passer un bon séjour. Literie confortable, appartement spacieux, salle de bain spacieuse également. Je recommande sans hésitation ! Great place, Great attention from Otto Always From the get go, Otto was proactive with his communication, super friendly and approachable. Gave super clear instructions and let us know in advance what was going on in the neighbourhood. Great recommendations for restaurants and cafe's and sightseeing. He was quick to respond and so helpful. We would definitely recommend staying at the Little Town House and if we are ever in Amsterdam again, we will stay again. Thanks Otto! Otto was great to communicate with. The apartment was a perfect fit for what we needed while in Amsterdam. Well equipped and in a nice, walkable area. Highly recommend this place! We absolutely loved our experience staying at this AirBnB. The location couldn't have been better with lots of great cafes, bars, and restaurants nearby. The location is in more of a residential area, but it's very easy to get around to all of the touristy areas, either by walking or by taking the tram. We were able to stumble upon plenty of hidden gems that we wouldn't have otherwise found if we stayed in the heart of the city. The place is very clean and has all of the basic essentials. We would definitely recommend anyone to stay here. Great place to stay! Very comfortable and cute in a nice neighborhood of Amsterdam. Had no issues during my stay.

Great location. Stylish house. Kid friendly. Spacious living area. There was a bit of construction across the road which was a bit disruptive and an eye sore but will hopefully conclude soon. We had a lovely time at the house. We loved staying at Daan’s place! The location is great and it has a nice back yard, the kitchen was amazing. The main bedroom was very comfortable. One thing to note is the two guests bedrooms have children’s beds in them but Daan provided us with an air mattress for one of the rooms and our third guest slept on the couch which was very wide and long so she was comfortable. The listing does state the guest beds are children’s I just booked quickly without realizing. The space was really cute and thoughtfully decorated, we would definitely stay again. Fantastic location. Walking distance through the jordaan to the 9 straatjes and town. Also very close to deli shop and supermarket on the same street and the foodhallen short walk too. We visited with kids and flat had all kids gear as owner has 2 little ones. Garden a massive win in the city too. Would recommend. Daan is an excellent host and this is a wonderful house in a perfect location! Exactly as described and great for families with young kids. Daan was extremely helpful getting us checked in and making sure everything was right. Thanks for sharing your lovely home with us! Our family of four had such a lovely week in Amsterdam with Daan’s house as our home base. Their kids are around the same age as ours which made it even more perfect for us! It was spacious, clean, cozy, and in a great central location for our adventures. The back garden and balcony were both a retreat for us and a place to play in the fresh air for our kids. Daan was very communicative and gave great neighborhood recommendations. Would definitely recommend!

We had a lovely time at Janneke’s apartment. The apartment was as beautiful as in the pictures and was in a great location with lots of amenities as well as transport links. We can recommend this apartment to anyone coming to Amsterdam. Janneke and Michiel were great hosts and provided lots of tips for what to do in Amsterdam. Je recommande ce logement.
Janneke est très sympa et disponible.
Le logement correspond bien aux photos, les volumes sont agréables et l appartement soigne. Il y a tout à disposition.
Le calme de ce quartier paisible est tres appreciable, en particulier avec une telle proximité au cœur d Amsterdam, très accessible de l appartement en vélo ou en Tram. The inside of the Airbnb, clean, great view & everything you needed. Finding the Airbnb was confusing, we messaged the host for clearer directions luckily a response right away. However the keys to the door of the Airbnb weren’t working at all-we attempted for an hour to get the door opened till the host called a locksmith where we waited for another hour of the arrival then waited for the locksmith to get the door open, replace the locks & keys as this was our place/ responsibility. Arrived at the Airbnb around 11ish & stayed till 2ish dealing with all of this upon arrival of a holiday & the locksmith wasn’t even done when we left after dropping our belongings. Later that night-same day we couldn’t even get into the building with the keys we had- luckily we could buzz in a neighbor to let us in the building & explain. But this made us want to not deal with Airbnb & we recommend maybe not this one if you want something less stressful & less complex & in a newer building. Le logement proposé par Janneke presente de rares prestations, il est bien decoré, la cuisine très fonctionnelle, on s'y sent comme a la maison. La literie est confortable, l'appartement très lumineux. Nous y etions avec notre fille de 20 mois, qui a profité de la place pour jouer aisement.
Le centre ville est a 15 minutes en tram. Janneke a été très disponible et reactive tout au long de notre séjour. Elle a su repondre a nos questions et s'est assurée que notre sejour se passe bien, nous reviendrons avec plaisir! tutto perfetto. host gentile, appartamento grande e con tutte le comodita. dista circa mezzora a piedi dal centro, quindi comodo se ti piace camminare. consigliato

Luc is a very flexible host.
The apartment is perfect for a few days or even a longer stay, equipped with all the necessary appliances.
It is close to shopping and dining options and easily accessible from the city center. Great stay here! Luc was super helpful.
The place was amazing, felt right at home. Having a washer and dryer was a game changer especially with traveling around.
Workspace as well was awesome too!
Would highly recommend! 🔥

David & Josje are exceptional hosts. Clear communication and very responsive. Their beautiful home was even more spacious than expected. Location is perfect to walk or catch a tram to the center. Not only very stylish, but also functional and an urban sanctuary with a spacious garden. I can highly recommend this place. the house was great and David was a very helpful host. we were traveling with an infant and he provided so much extra gear and went above and beyond to make our lives so much easier. the house itself is very well-located, within 10 min walking to lots of interesting sites, restaurants, bars, etc and is beautiful and comfortable. we especially enjoyed having the garden to relax in

This is a very spacious and clean apartment, has lift access and was good for the kids . We were welcomed by Paula's friend who assisted us checking in and the location is good, we used the bus and tram to get around, and there is off street parking too. Paula left us useful information about the local area and the city, we'd happily stay there again. Very nice and clean place. The Apartment is in the east of the city, bus 22 from central station, only about 2km, so its very convinient. Paula was an excellent host and we appreciated staying in the flat. Wir haben 4 Nächte in Paulas Wohnung begeistert verbracht. Die Wohnung und die Ausstattung sind genau, wie auf den Fotos und in der Beschreibung zu sehen. Die Lage ist hervorragend zentral. ( zwei Tram-Linien und Geschäfte sowie Kneipen in direkter Umgebung).
Der Kontakt mit Paula ist unkompliziert und schnell.
Wir empfehlen die Location bedenkenlos weiter!
Danke und liebe Grüße an Paula!
Alex und Mathias

Mijn vriend is hier verbleven en heeft een heerlijk weekend gehad in dit verblijf. In de rust, maar dichtbij leuke plekken. Merci à Michel pour son accueil.
Le logement est idéalement situé dans une rue calme. Le centre est accessible à 15min à pied.
Michel nous a laissé une liste de recommandation de restaurants et nous rendu visite pendant la semaine pour s'assurer que tout allait bien.
Certains meubles ne sont pas les mêmes et sont plus modernes par rapport aux photos.
Nous avons eu des soucis avec le frigo qui ne refroidissait pas assez.
Sinon, il y avait plusieurs bruits le soir dans le voisinage.
Ces inconvénients restent minimes !
Merci encore pour l'accueil Michel :) Lovely spot in a great neighbourhood. Great links nearby for airport bus and walkable to lots of great restaurants and places Das Studio von Michel ist perfekt gelegen, liebevoll eingerichtet und gut für einen Kurzaufenthalt in Kopenhagen. Es ist sehr klein, wie beschrieben, und schon etwas älter als auf den Fotos. Wir hatten Glück mit dem Wetter (im August), so dass wir auch die Bank vor dem Haus als “Terrasse” mit nutzen konnten. Michel wohnt selbst im Haus, er ist super freundlich und immer erreichbar und hilfsbereit. Michel is super kind and the place is ok. It was fairly dirty even after a cleaner came (bed sheets weren’t changed out) and we had to wait to check in even after confirming a time. It also is a little stuffy with the only window being the front door. It’s a decent place, we really enjoyed Michel, but a few issues throughout the stay were not always ideal. What a great space close to everything be it restaurants and coffee or the tram to get around. Easily walkable to most areas. A perfect cozy space for a getaway in Amsterdam. A nice convenient place to stay we had a really nice stay! Thanks for welcoming us ! It was a great trip We loved staying here! Great location to get around Amsterdam!

Fantastic spot very close to central Amsterdam ! Beautiful apartment - would stay here again! Appartement très cosy avec un vrai charme. Iris est très réactive et reste toujours disponible. L’appartement est idéalement placé dans Amsterdam et dispose de tout les équipements nécessaires.

Appartement très joli, très propre et bien situé. Les hôtes sont adorables et disponibles. Le point fort de ce logement est sa propreté, son espace et sa décoration. Je recommande sans hésitation. Merci à vous deux ! We had an amazing moment, the flat is really nice, the location is perfect and Floor is really kind. We loved the location and the accessibility. Mattia und Floor haben eine sehr schöne Wohnung. Ruhig gelegen und trotzdem sehr gut angebunden. Mit beiden war die Kommunikation perfekt. Wir haben uns sehr sehr wohl aufgehoben gefühlt. Simba (Katze) war super liebenswert. Auch die Möglichkeit gehabt zu haben beide ein wenig kennenzulernen war sehr schön. Kann ich nur weiterempfehlen, Immer gerne wieder. Great place in a really lovely area We had a great stay - the apartment was as described, beautifully furnished, super clean and cosy! Great balcony as well. Floor and Mattia were very friendly, responsive and gave us all the necessary info beforehand (and Simba the cat is a sweetie). Self check-in was easy and flexible. No complaints at all! :)
Definitely recommend staying here, especially if you like your airbnbs to not just be functional but look nice, too (and please support individuals renting out their places instead of commercialised, sterile-looking airbnbs...).
Super agréable

We had a fantastic stay in October. the location was perfect very close to the tram and the house fit our family very comfortably. The steps are steep to access the flat but the roof top views make up for that. The hosts were very quick to respond to our quesions. The house is an amazing place, real Amsterdam Hoi-Kee’s apartment was beautiful, spacious and clean. As hosts they were very attentive. We had a slight problem with the lock box but they were very responsive and resolved the issue for us. The neighborhood is quiet but close to several great restaurants. Would definitely recommend this listing! This apartment is lovely. It is immaculate and perfect to relax after a day as a tourist. The neighbourhood is an easy tram ride from downtown Amsterdam. There are nice restaurants nearby and a nice park. There is a supermarket close by. The hosts were very responsive when we needed some assistance. It is very quiet at night. Would highly recommend. If you are fortunate enough to stay in this lovely home, you are fortunate indeed. It is spacious, well designed, and has everything one could possibly need for a successful stay in Amsterdam. The local neighborhood is multicultural with great restaurants and easy shopping, all near public transport. In short—one of my favorite places I have enjoyed during my many travels. This place is amazing, with all sorts of touches that go above and beyond. I brought my almost 80 year old parents and when we were done checking out the sights, it was a perfect place for them to relax. I cannot recommend this place enough. The communication was great, and they even accommodated an early check in for us. Wonderful people! Es war ein Traum! Eine Wohnung mit Seele, in einem Viertel, dass einem das Gefühl gibt, Teil davon zu sein. Schnelle und unkomplizierte Kommunikation mit Hoi-Kee. Gerne jederzeit wieder! Nous avons passé un merveilleux séjour chez Hoi-Kee et Daniel ! Quel plaisir de loger dans un vrai chez-soi, chaleureux et vivant, où l’on imagine sans peine les dîners partagés entre amis ou en famille. On s’y sent tout de suite comme des habitants du quartier, animé et agréable, avec tout à portée : commerces de bouche ou restaurants.
La localisation est idéale : un peu à l’écart de l’agitation touristique, mais à seulement quelques minutes en tram, train ou bus du centre et des incontournables.
L’appartement est parfaitement équipé, la literie confortable, les espaces bien pensés. Mention spéciale pour la terrasse : si, comme nous, vous avez la chance de profiter du soleil, vous y passerez des moments précieux avec une vue magnifique sur les toits.
La communication avec nos hôtes a été simple, rapide et agréable. Un logement que nous recommandons vivement pour un séjour en famille à Amsterdam ! Our family absolutely loved staying at Hoi-Kee and Daniel's home. It was so beautifully decorated, very comfortable, and kid-friendly. Highlights included the king-sized bed, the peace and quiet, rooftop, and well-appointed kitchen. Their home is even better in real life; photos don't do it justice! We wouldn't hesitate to book again! We really like how their place was also away from central Amsterdam and we got to understand what a neighborhood without tourists felt like.
Do know that the stairs are very narrow - their apartment is on the top two floors of a building and it might be hard to stay here with young toddlers or if you have mobility issues. We had a wonderful time at Hoi -Kee and Daniel’s family home. Lovely apartment, great roof terrace and we love the location as we really like Amsterdam East. Perfect for families.
Also grateful for the kind communication and flexibility. ❤️
Thank you!

Great stay! The location was excellent! Close proximity to markets, cafes, and a park; and it's a close walk to the city center. The apartment was spacious, bright, with great amneties, it also has a lovely terrace.
Martin made sure our check in process was smooth, and communication was always easy. It was a wonderful stay, and would definetly want to stay at this apartment again.
Would highly recommend! Martin's house is a must stay. It is spacious and located very well in the city. it is well worth the price. Wonderful location and house. Martin was accommodating and friendly. Would definitely visit again. This is the second time my friends and I get a chance to stay at Martin’s place. The apartment is fantastic, very spacious and is located in a great area, very close to the city center and less than a 5 minute walk to westerpark
The apartment is very spacious, clean, and we would definitely want to stay there during our next visit This was a terrific place for our vacation. The location near Westerpark, proximity to the city center … all within walking distance. Plus, plenty of restaurant options on the same street. These are some good reasons to stay here.
The place was well maintained, clean and comfortable. The kitchen has everything you need. The washer-dryer was super helpful since we stayed for a longer time.
Martin was great as a host. Friendly, very helpful and d very responsive. We would definitely stay here again in the future.
P.S.: As is the case with most places in Amsterdam city center, the unit has several flights of narrow stairs. So make sure you travel light and use caution on the stairs.

Friendly host, his recommendations and tips on how to get around were very helpful. I recommend for a short stay. Perfect place to stay for a weekend in Amsterdam! Has everything you need and right infront of the metro, which makes getting into Amsterdam center super easy. Plus, the host is always there to help out of needed. Would definitely come back! I had good experience living one night in this place. The location is perfect and the owner was quite responsive. The only thing to notice is that you can hear the sound of the ventilation even the room door was closed if you are quite sensitive to any sound. Una estancia con todas las comodidades ofrecidas a precio justo, efectivamente la estación del metro a 2 min Caminando lo que facilitaba los traslados hacia el centro y otros lugares, tuvimos flexibilidad para las horas de check in y check out previa solicitud . M muy amable y pendiente de nosotros. Clean room, extremely easy to get around. Host was very attentive and good location A very convenient place if you want to stay away from the noisy city centre. Die Lage ist sehr gut, man ist zu Fuss in ca. 20 Minuten im Zentrum, alternativ kann man sich für wenig Geld ein Uber nehmen.
Eine weitere Besonderheit waren die zwei Katzen, die uns jeden Abend begrüßt haben und sich dann genüsslich von uns kraulen ließen.
Alles in Allem eine 100%ige Empfehlung.

Μόλις 3 λεπτά με τα πόδια από το Vondelpark και ένα βήμα μακριά ότι μικρό εστιατόριο μπορείς να φανταστείς , καθώς και καταστήματα με ότι χρειάζεσαι να αγοράσεις και να καλύψεις όλες τις ανάγκες σου. Μια γειτονιά που τα έχει όλα.

Le quartier n'est pas touristique mais très calme, à 15mn à pieds des premières rues du Centre Historique d'Amsterdam . Commerces de proximité à 10mn. Maria, son propriétaire  est un hôte proactif toujours disponible pour vous aider en toute circonstance. A conseiller ! Lovely apartment would recommend Super logement proposé par Maria, situé dans une rue et un quartier calme et très jolie ! Maria was very welcoming and informative from the get go.  The property looks recently renovated, with modern, up-to-date amenities.  Everything was clean and tidy.  Availability of a washer was definitely a plus for folks who travel light and need to do laundry.  The property is far away enough from the bustle,  yet with close access to public transportation, supermarkets, and restaurants.  Our first trip to Amsterdam was super enjoyable.  I would definitely recommend Maria's property. This apartment was perfect for our 3-day stint in Amsterdam. While it was a little cramped for 3 of us (tiny bathroom, small beds), we used it mainly as a place to sleep - the location cannot be beat! Maria was incredibly responsive and easy to work with. She was an excellent host! My only caution is that the other reviews about the staircase are accurate: it’s a traditional Dutch staircase which means the steps are very small and very tall - very easy to have an accident if you’re not familiar! Those with accessibility issues should take caution. Otherwise an excellent stay. Dikke prima, heel fijn

A beautiful spot with great hosts! 10 out of 10 would highly recommend! We had great time Clemens and Mariam's apartment is fabulous. Staying at Clemens and Mariam’s beautiful home was a perfect beginning to our European vacation!
