We’re so grateful—thank you both so much! 很感谢房东刚一入住就贴心、热情的介绍周边环境和我们想要去旅游的地方，包括怎么坐车，到哪里坐车等问题，都在一张小小地图认真的帮我们标记，中途还根据我们要去风车村的景点，贴心打印路程导航和站点等信息。每天的早餐都准点送到房间里，搭配合理营养，颜值还高，总之这次入住是一次非常棒的体验，以后还要介绍朋友来此住宿，真心感谢两位房东！ Loved our stay at Wouter and Zu’s place during our time in Amsterdam! Perfect location and they are so helpful with suggestions of things to do in the city. Also the fresh breakfast each day was amazing. Highly recommend for 2 travelers. Super vriendelijke hosts, lekker ontbijtje, alles netjes en schoon! (Wel in de basement, daardoor ietsje donker). Goed met OV te bereiken. We komen graag nog een keertje terug! Great hosts . Went out of their way to accommodate our early arrival and went above and beyond too .We would highly recommend this place to anyone Nice sized, comfortable room, and tasty breakfast. Thank you, Zu! Redelijk

I can say that this was one of the best experiences I’ve ever had on Airbnb. Douwe met us right on time, showed us the apartment, and gave us valuable tips about visiting museums, walking around the city, and nice local restaurants. He is a very attentive host and it’s clear that he welcomes his guests as truly wanted visitors. The apartment is very charming and authentic, with everything you need for a comfortable stay — just as described. And the best part is the neighborhood! Beautiful, quiet, and peaceful, even though the apartment is right in the heart of Amsterdam. I’m truly sad that this trip is over — I would gladly come back to Amsterdam and stay with Karin and Douwe again. We were incredibly lucky! I wholeheartedly recommend this place to everyone. Karin’s place is at the perfect location, close to the canals, citiy centre and good transportation to all Amsterdam attractions. Her apartment is well equipped, comfortable with complimentary amenities. Karin was a flexible, communicative host and made our stay easy and fun even on short notice. We booked at the last minute and she welcomed us right away, and even held our luggage on the last day when we needed extra time. We would definitely stay here again the next time we’re in Amsterdam! A very good flat centrally located in a quiet street by one of the canals. Karin and Douwe were really helpful and kind and we had a very pleasant stay. We hope to be back! Nous avons été très bien accueillis par Douwe qui a fait preuve d'une grande flexibilité. Le logement était très propre et bien équipé. Le quartier est très beau et tranquille. Nous avons passé un excellent séjour dans cet appartement. Very nice place in great location. Super friendly host. Everything perfect. A great location and great apartment, Douwe was friendly and very helpful. Highly recommended 👍 Agréable petit appartement dans une rue calme bien que proche du centre ville et de la gare. Hôtes très accueillants et généreux sur les produits mis à disposition. À conseiller aux amis. a great first visit to Amsterdam. my husband and 2 older boys were v happy with the accomodation. Douwe was v friendly and helpful. location wonder ful, v quiet. short walk from station. would highly recommend. Thank You. Modest apartment in a great location. Walking distance to all major sites (Zoo, Nemo, Jordaan, Rijks). Being it is a 'garden-level' apartment, you will not get a view or a ton of light, but we knew that going into it.
It was clean. DVD selection was strong. Anne Frank Museum paired well with Inglorious Bastards.
Host stocked the fridge with beer and wine which was appreciated.
Fun city, fun place. Douwe es un gran anfitrión, contesta muy rápido y nos recibió con gran amabilidad. El apartamento limpísimo y funcional.

I highly recommend Norah’s place!
Her space was exactly as described - bright, clean and comfortable. It is in a lovely area of Amsterdam, with lots of restaurants and coffee shops nearby. It also has a couple grocery stores very close by. It is outside of the touristy part of Amsterdam, but with local transit very close it was super easy to get to any location in Amsterdam with ease.
I wouldn’t hesitate to book Norah’s space next time in Amsterdam and thank her for the stay.

Très bel appartement avec un deco design. Il se trouve dans un quartier tranquille proche du centre grâce à l’arrêt du tram, au pied de l appartement .
Hébergement idéal pour découvrir Amsterdam .
Nous avons passé un excellent séjour. Amazing location, coffee shops up the street plenty of restaurants near by including vegan places. The inside is absolutely spacious and very pleasing to the eye with a home away from home feeling. Such a lovely stay in a beautiful apartment! We absolutely loved our time here, the place is spacious, stylish, and super cozy. The beds were great, the kitchen had everything for a nice meal at home, and the sunny morning balcony was a real treat.
The location couldn’t be better! Quiet and peaceful, yet just a short walk to nice cafés and restaurants. And the tram stops right in front of the building, which makes getting around so easy, though we loved the neighborhood so much we hardly left.
Our hosts were warm and helpful, and everything felt both relaxed and really well taken care of. We’d come back in a heartbeat! We had a wonderful stay. The apartment is very spacious and clean, and the bed was incredibly comfortable! The location is also fantastic — a peaceful oasis in Amsterdam, with all the facilities you could wish for nearby. Nicole's house really feels like a home away from home.
very spacious and there is everything to make your stay comfortable.
Great location, very easy to get around and plenty of cafes and restaurants in the area.
The way the house is divided is amazing, especially with kids, they can sleep with no disturbances.
Overall a wonderful place and we can definitely recommend staying there :) This was an absolutely perfect stay. Nicole was a wonderful host—so attentive and helpful throughout our stay. She was a pleasure to communicate with and made everything so easy. The home itself was incredible- clean, beautifully decorated, and perfectly set up for a relaxing trip. As a hypersensitive audiophile, the Sonos system and record collection made the biggest difference and truly enjoyed amsterdam from the apartment itself. The thoughtful touches really showed how much care Nicole puts into her home. Thank you for a wonderful stay!
Everything was great. Location was very nice, and getting to public transportation was very easy. Would definitely recommend. Host was great and very friendly.

Wonderful place to stay alone or as a couple! near city center and very cozy Diese Unterkunft war absolut fabelhaft, luxuriös eingerichtet, sauber und gemütlich, mit viel Liebe zum Detail.
Alles entsprach den hier gezeigten Fotos. Die Küche war voll ausgestattet mit allen Utensilien, sogar Kaffeetabs oder Tee standen zur Wahl. Das Badezimmer war ebenfalls vollständig mit Handtüchern und Pflegeprodukten ausgestattet.
Die Kommunikation mit Britt verlief sehr unkompliziert und freundlich und auch die Flexibilität beim Ein- und Auschecken war großartig, somit konnten wir unsere Zeit in Amsterdam voll und efektiv ausnutzen.
Wir können diese Unterkunft jedem nur weiterempfehlen! Loved your flat Britt. Would definitely stay there again. Very best wishes, Alfredo. We stayed at Britt’s place for a week and fell in love with the apartment and neighborhood. Highly recommend Liked it very much. And the host was also very kind. Britt is een super fijne host die het appartement in hele goede staat heeft klaar gemaakt en altijd beschikbaar is voor hulp, alles wat ik zoek in een goede host! Heb niets te klagen gehad.

We had a wonderful stay at this charming Amsterdam apartment! The location was ideal, allowing us to easily explore the city’s sights and enjoy the local cuisine. The apartment itself was clean, cozy, and well-equipped with everything we needed for a comfortable stay. The host was very welcoming and helpful, providing us with great tips to make the most of our visit. Would definitely recommend for anyone looking for a home away from home in Amsterdam! Marc was an exceptional host! He was a wonderful clear communicator from the time of booking onward. Upon arrival we found a lovely welcome note with restaurant recommendations for brunch and dinner with neighborhood locations. This was very helpful while we were out and about exploring. The note also included activity recommendations. Some of the best were a 7 minute walk! He also left us some welcome treats! The neighborhood was peaceful yet had good food and shops. The apartment… Windows with amazing light and view of the square. It is cozy, comfy and it felt like home! It was perfect for the 2 of us. I hope we will be back in the future. Thank you Marc! Beautiful apartment in great spot in Amsterdam - highly recommend! We really loved the apartment - great location, clean, cozy and conveys the atmosphere of Amsterdam. This is the BEST Airbnb I have ever stayed in! It’s very homey, there’s lots of natural light from huge windows, the bathroom is very nice, the bed is very comfortable, the location is great…I could go on and on and on. What I most appreciated was that the kitchen was fully stocked - not just with cooking supplies like knives and pans but also oil, vinegar, spices, condiments, tea, and so much love that made cooking so accessible. Marc was incredibly flexible with check-in and check-out and was kind enough to leave us Dutch treats and a letter including local recommendations for our arrival. This place is absolutely perfect and made our stay in Amsterdam really wonderful. Thank you Marc! Un mot tout d'abord concernant notre hôte, Marc, avec lequel la communication a été facile et qui a gentiment pu mettre l'appartement à notre disposition un peu plus tôt que prévu. L'accès au logement a été organisé dans ce sens et a été tres facile.
Sur la table, se trouvaient un mot d'accueil comprenant des recommandations de restaurants notamment dans le coin.
L'appartement est conforme aux photos, bien équipé, charmant et calme.
Un vrai petit nid où nous avons eu plaisir à rentrer chaque soir.
Nous avons beaucoup marché mais utilisé aussi les quelques lignes de tramways qui passent à proximité. A proximité également un supermarché et le samedi un petit marché en bas de l'immeuble vaut le détour (tourtes à la viande, poissonnier, fromager et primeur notamment , extra frais).
Marc, merci encore de nous avoir confié votre appartement qui a participé au succès de notre séjour. Nous espérons revenir bien vite. El apartamento precioso y muy hogareño. En todo momento nos sentimos como si estuviésemos en nuestra casa. Es muy luminoso, muy bien equipado y se encuentra en una zona tranquila, muy cerca del Museumplein. Hay varias paradas del tranvía muy cerca, por lo que moverse por la ciudad fue fácil. También está cerca la parada del autobús que te lleva al Aeropuerto de Schiphol. La llegada al apartamento genial, ya que Marc nos dejó las llaves justo al lado del apartamento. Está en un primer piso, sin ascensor y las escaleras son empinadas y estrechas, por lo que hay que ir con cuidado con maletas grandes. Marc estuvo pendiente de como nos iba en el viaje y a la llegada nos dejó una nota de bienvenida con recomendaciones de cosas que hacer y de restaurantes, además de dejarnos varias delicias holandesas para que las probáramos. Hemos tenido una maravillosa estancia y si volvemos a Ámsterdam, que seguro que sí, ya que nos ha encantado la ciudad, volveremos a este apartamento. This apartment is very cute and in a really great neighbourhood! Marc is a kind and welcoming host. I would recommend to anyone visiting Amsterdam :) My partner and I were in Amsterdam for the bank holiday weekend and Marc’s apartment couldn’t have been more perfect for our stay. The location is brilliant, with lots of great bars and restaurants but also not too far from the centre and also very peaceful! The apartment had everything we need and our check in was super simple. I’d really recommend you stay here for your next visit! Wonderful location, short walk to museums and Concertgebuow. Warm and friendly host, extremely helpful.

Very cosy apartment in an excellent location. Close to central station and all the attractions. Tons of excellent restaurants close by Super Unterkunft mitten in Amsterdam. Süß eingerichtet und sehr wohnlich. Normale Gebrauchsspuren, aber insgesamt perfekt für unseren Wochenendtrip. We loved our stay at Jim’s place! It’s tastefully decorated and the location is fantastic Great location and the flat has everything you need. Jim war ein guter Gastgeber. Top Service, flexibler Check in, super Lage und saubere Wohnung. Perfekt für einen Städtetrip. Appartement très bien placé. Hôte très sympathique et réactif. Lovely space and very conveniently located. The area is busy as would be expected from a city centre location, with tonnes to do within easy walking distance. Wir hatten einen großartigen Aufenthalt in dieser wunderschönen Wohnung in Amsterdam! Die Lage ist unschlagbar – mitten im Geschehen, perfekt um die Stadt zu Fuß zu erkunden. Wer das lebendige Stadtleben mag, ist hier genau richtig.
Die Wohnung war geschmackvoll eingerichtet, sauber und mit allem ausgestattet, was man braucht – man fühlt sich sofort wohl!
Unser Gastgeber Jim war hervorragend: super freundlich, hilfsbereit und jederzeit erreichbar.
Insgesamt eine ganz klare Empfehlung für alle, die zentral wohnen und Amsterdam hautnah erleben möchten!! Jim is a very responsive and thoughtful host. He even came from work to help us get into the apartment and had prepared a bag of ground coffee along with some nice drinks in the fridge. He also shared a helpful list of local recommendations.
The apartment is sunny and feels like an artisan’s home, with a lovely shelf of unique artistic drinkware. The bedroom is clean and the bed is very comfortable. The shower and toilet are in separate rooms, which can be convenient.
At first, I was a bit concerned about potential noise since the apartment is located among lively shops, but it turned out not to be an issue at all. With a little background white noise, I slept perfectly!
I would definitely recommend this place.

Amazing find in central Amsterdam. The flat is amazing outside/inside and Colby is very good at communicating. I've been to lots of AirBnBs and this ranks in the top 3. We loved staying in this apartment! It was clean, spacious, and had great views of the canals! Colby was an excellent host and great with communication! This is a beautiful apartment with a great view in a central location. Great kitchen. Note it is a three floor walk up with bedrooms one more flight of stairs. Colby was very helpful host via message. The location was perfect, vibrant, and peaceful. There was plenty of space in the apartment, the place was clean, comfortable and felt very much at home. The stairs up to the apartment are steep, but when you get inside the apartment, the climb is worth it. Colby was very responsive. I would highly recommend this location for anyone looking for a place in Amsterdam. We had a great time in Colby's appartment. It is located in a nice calm neighborhood. Everything is as it is described and we really couldn't ask for more.
5/5 would recommend :) “Fantastisk opphold hos Colby!”
Jeg hadde et utrolig flott opphold hos Colby. Alt gikk som smurt fra start til slutt. Leiligheten var akkurat som beskrevet, ren og svært komfortabel. Colby var en utmerket vert som var enkel å kommunisere med, og han svarte raskt på alle spørsmål jeg hadde. Beliggenheten var perfekt, og jeg følte meg hjemme med en gang. Alt i alt en kjempefin opplevelse – jeg vil definitivt anbefale å leie hos Colby igjen! I had a wonderful stay at this accommodation in Amsterdam. The place was spacious and beautifully designed, with two floors offering an excellent layout and plenty of room. The cleanliness was impeccable, adding to the overall comfort of the stay.
The accommodation is located on the third floor, and as is common in Amsterdam, the staircase is quite narrow and steep. If you have large suitcases, carrying them up to the third floor might be challenging, so keep this in mind when planning your trip.
Overall, I highly recommend this place for anyone seeking peace and comfort during their stay in Amsterdam. It’s a fantastic option for those who appreciate quiet and relaxing surroundings. Absolutely amazing apartment in a great location. Our family had a phenomenal stay here. Really wonderful host. Made our weekend feel like home.

Hallo, Das Air BnB biete eine grossartige Aussicht auf diesen schönen Teil von Amsterdam.
Natürlich ist es durch die wundervollen grossen Fenster schnell, warm in dem Zimmern, aber die Aussicht war alles wert.
Ganz toller freundlicher Gastgeber, wir haben uns wie zu Hause gefühlt.
Vielen Dank und hoffentlich bis zum nächsten Mal. We had such an amazing stay here. Location was fantastic and Maarten, our host, was the most friendliest and helpful person. Dream host, magical location and beautiful house. We loved every minute of our stay here. An amazing home! Our host Maarten took really great care of us and we definitely plan to come back only if his house shows as listing! A beautiful home on a canal in Amsterdam North, in a peaceful area away from the noise of the city center.
Maarten was an excellent host and will absolutely be making a return trip in the future! L’appartement est conforme à la description, très spacieux et lumineux, les vues sur le canal sont splendides. Le quartier est calme et charmant, parfait pour se reposer mais bien connecté au centre d’Amsterdam en bus + tramway ou vélo. Nous avons passé un très bon séjour. Nous espérons revenir. Un site incroyable, paisible
Tout y est Lovely host, very accommodating. Very pretty area with a great park near by. This is a bright and beautiful place to stay overlooking the water in a lovely area of Amsterdam. Die Wohnung war etwas ganz besonderes, schöner Ausblick und alles da was man braucht. Die Kommunikation war super. Wir wurden von Maartens Hund freundlich begrüßt und auch mit unserem Hund gab es keinerlei Probleme. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und können die Unterkunft weiterempfehlen. Mit den öffentlichen Verkehrsmitteln ist die Innenstadt auch gut erreichbar. Vielen Dank für den leider zu kurzen Aufenthalt. Wunderschöne authentische Wohnung im DG einer umgebauten Lagerhalle

On a passer un très bon moment dans cet appartement magnifique. Je recommande. Really stunning top floor apartment in a quiet but bustling area. Close to Vondelpark and an easy walk or tram to the centre. The apartment was very tastefully decorated and the rooftop terrace was stunning. Staying in this area, a little out of the centre is highly recommended. Great host, very helpful. We will return one day. The hosts were incredibly helpful and responsive, always replying promptly to messages. The location of the house was perfect, and it was a very comfortable place to stay. Overall, we had a great experience and felt right at home. Highly recommended! It was an amazing holiday in a gorgeous house. The neighborhood is full of nice cafés and restaurants, a few steps far from Vondel Park. The house was clean and with everything needed, with a spectacular rooftop. I can’t wait to get back here! Thank you very much for the beautiful stay and for the help you gave me! Juliu's & Noor place was a dream come true and exactly what we were after for our trip to Amsterdam; I feel that no matter how well I try to describe our experience there, words will fall short.
The location is unbeatable: The neighborhood has the classic Dutch vibes without all the extreme touristy crowds. It is also well-connected and close to the city center, while being plagued with amazing gastronomic options, which makes choosing between all of them a true challenge. The apartment itself is hands-down one of the nicest places I've had the chance to stay in. It has not only all the amenities you can need, but also a stunning, authentic style that is almost impossible to reproduce; you could tell as soon as you got in that the design of the place was something else. Granted that having to take the stairs to the apartment, or the bathroom a bit far from the bedroom, are not my favorite things in the world, but I would still choose this place every time for my next visit. Hands down the best place I've ever stayed in via Airbnb and such 🙌
Other than being super comfy, it felt "alive" and real - not like most places where apartments are meant only for rent and feel like a movie set, completely artificial and fake. At Julius', I've felt more like I'm visiting a friend than renting a place. Great vibes, I'm sure I'll be back if I ever want a place to stay in Amsterdam again 👌

What a wonderful gem. Centrally located in a great neighborhood filled with cafes, restaurants, bakeries and more.
The apartment was very well laid out and we had everything we needed. Nathan was incredibly communicative and provided great advice. Great location, nice apartment! Très bon séjour. Le logement est très agréable ale et bien situé Nathan was the best. Great place. Roomy. Full kitchen. love the neighborhood. The good: convenient location, lively neighborhood
The not-so-good: the place is not professionally cleaned and maintained; pillows had stains on them
The bad: neighbors partied all nights until 5am for 2 consecutive nights and we could hear everything from their music to their conversations. The noice plus summer heat kept us up all night. We messaged the host about the heat after the first night but didn't hear back for a whole day so we decided to move out after 2 nights of stays. The host refused to refund us for the remainder of the trip, so we ended up paying $1,608.69 for 2 nights of miserable stay :) Nathan war sehr freundlich und wir dürften sogar früher einchecken. Was wir nicht erwartet haben, dass der Eingang in die Unterkunft eine sehr steile Treppe hat. Ausserdem hat die Wohnung sehr dünne Wende (bzw Decke), sodass alle Geräusche von oben zu hören waren. Drei Tage waren Kinder im der Wohnung von oben an da. D.h. wir könnten nur so lange schlafen, bis die Kinder von den Nachbarn geschlafen haben. Der Rest der Zeit war das Getrampel, worauf unser Hund die ganze Zeit bellen müsste, da er sich es nicht gewohnt war.
Das Wasser in der Dusche war sehr heiß und kühler konnte nicht umgestellt werden.
Die Lage der Wohnung ist sehr zentral. Ein Park ist gleich um die Ecke und viele Restaurants.

Allgemein wirklich eine Schöne Unterkunft Preis Leistung Top!! Leider zu weit weg vom Zentrum da ÖV nicht ganz Bilig ist und auch ca. 15-20 min entfernt ist.
Uns wurde nichts empfohlen von der Rezeption Ihr könnt dies oder das.Muss ehrlich sein wir hätten auch fragen können aber ich finde das verlange ich nicht viel mindestens eine Frage wie zb. Was habt ihr vor ect. Naja :) Très bon séjour . Belle chambre If you’re looking for a space with all the amenities (laundry, kitchen, etc.) then this room is great! The hotel itself is secure and felt high-end. Our only complaint was that not all rooms happened to be on the same floor and because of how secure, you couldn’t easily go from one floor to another which was a bit inconvenient. You would have to go to the ground floor then back up to the floor of your choice but only with the person who had the room key with access to that particular floor. Also, be sure to request a second key as one of the keys will be needed to use all the lights. If someone in your party were to leave, you’ll be left in the dark or would have to meet them in the lobby to let them in.
However, while it’s not in Amsterdam Centraal, it is very close to the public transit which was incredibly easy to use and affordable. Would stay here again.

Loved this spot, a little oasis! Perfect for a trip to Amsterdam, right next to a bus and tram line. Just outside the city for quiet, but close enough to feel immersed. Will be staying again! Appartamento meraviglioso, a pochi passi dal centro. Consigliassimo

Sehr schöne, gemütlich eingerichtete Wohnung. Klein, aber fein und trotz zentraler Lage mit prima Anbindung an ÖPNV ruhig gelegen. buen alojamiento para pasar unos dias mientras conoces Ámsterdam, es tranquilo y Ania es encantadora muy buena anfitriona. Amazing apartment not far from the city center and well connected. There is also a supermarket close so you can find everything. It is perfect fo couples that would like to visit Amsterdam. Clean and cute as it would be your house. La ubicación muy buena cerca de supermercado y restaurantes, cómodo para transportarse. Anfitriona responde rápido y muy amable. La casa queda en segundo piso por escalera muy empinada. Considerar que es un sofa cama en el living, sabanas de baja calidad. El resto muy bien. Close to public transportation and very walkable. I had an amazing stay at Ania’s place! It was beautiful and clean. It’s easy to find and walking distance to public transportation and some local food spots and stores. Ania gave some great tips and recommendations! I highly recommend staying! Bon séjour dans le logement d'Ania pendant un long week-end. Tout s'est bien déroulé et nous en garderons un bon souvenir. Je recommande !! Great place in a quiet neighborhood very close to the main attractions! Anias place was beautiful and comfortable, in a lovely area and very neat and organised. we had a lovely stay and Ania was kind, responsive and provided great information. 5 stars all round I loved staying in Ania's apartment that it almost hurt when I had to check out. It was cozy and clean. So well located. Walking distance to supermarkets, trams and busses, a lovely park and if you're up for it a long scenic walk into the center.  Her home made me feel like I was living in the Netherlands again and would definitely book again with her on my next trip back. :)

房屋位置非常好，附近100米有几个大型超市，有公园，公交站步行2分钟可以直达central station，去哪都很方便.房东热情好客，回复及时.屋内设施齐全。 Wir hatten wunderschöne Tage in Amsterdam. Die Wohnung von Yannik ist so wie im Inserat beschrieben. Sie ist hochwertig eingerichtet, die Ausstattung der Küche ist sehr gut und alles ist sehr sauber. Von der Wohnung sind Bus und Tram zu Fuß in wenigen Minuten erreichbar. Im Zentrum von Amsterdam ist man mit den öffentlichen Verkehrsmitteln in 15 Minuten. Die Wohnung liegt in einer sehr ruhigen Gegend. Die Kommunikation mit Tigist und Yannik war sehr unkompliziert. Wir kommen sehr gerne wieder. Very nice apartment in a quiet area. The one and only downside was the tiny sink in the bathroom, and that's nothing to complain about.
Great place and host. Fully equipped kitchen, big shower with towels, soap and everything. Recommended! We had a great stay at Yannick’s place. The apartment was well-located and had everything we needed for our trip to Amsterdam!

Beautiful apartment surrounded by nice restaurants and shop. The apartment is in a courtyard which is great when staying in Amsterdam. Nienke is very friendly and responsive. I highly recommend her place if you are staying in Amsterdam. Lovely apartment with a quirky layout, very central and easy to get wherever you want to go, responsive and friendly hosts - highly recommend! Lovely and peaceful apartment in a fantastic location, with lots of friendly cafes and bars within just a few minutes walking distance. We felt right at home Great location, lots of restaurants and easy transportation, but this place is pricy. It's smaller than the photos make it look. It was also noisy. You'll be staying in the same place as the owner and her son and a shared courtyard with other residents that can be noisy. Our stay here was lovely ! Der Aufenthalt bei Nienke war gut. Die Wohnung ist kleiner als erwartet, die Ausstattung war ok. Auf den Bildern ist ein Parkettboden zu sehen, jedoch ist ein Teppich drin.. für Allergiker wie mich nicht so toll. Der Fernseher funktionierte auch nicht.. Preis -Leistung stimmte für mich nicht. Great stay right in the middle of amsterdam! Amazing location- restaurants and grocery store within just a few steps. Everything in Amsterdam we wanted to see was less than a 2 km walk. WATCH THE BICYCLES!!! The flat itself was what we expected for the location. If you are older or have difficulty with stairs, this is not the place for you. Despite being in the middle of everything, it was very quiet- we had no issues with falling asleep. We loved Amsterdam and would definitely choose this rental again. Wonderful!
Beautiful apartment next to the Vondelpark. There are a lots of cute cafes and restaurants nearby. The bed was very comfortable.
We explored the whole city by foot. We really enjoyed our stay in this lovely and cozy home in Amsterdam. The room was very comfortable, and both my friend and I felt very relaxed here. The sunlight coming into the living room was beautiful, making the place feel even more welcoming. We truly loved our time here!

we loved staying at Marga's place. location was perfect and the place worked really well for our family. This is a very well designed and well located family house in Amsterdam. Just know about the steep and narrow steps, which some may have problems with. Marga's home was wonderful. The kitchen had all the necessities and the outdoor space was great. Easy to walk to the tram and many cute places nearby Marga's home was lovely. The Oud-West neighborhood was walkable to all of the tourist attractions but far enough away that there was no noise at night. There were lots of restaurants nearby and easy to access tram/train.
We would happily stay here again. Our family loved staying at Marga’s house! The location was great, the house was beautiful with plenty of space (pictures in listing accurately depict the house) and very clean. Not far from a tram stop but we were within reasonable walking distance from most things (and we like to walk). Foodhallen very close by is a good choice for a quick meal and open late. Would definitely recommend. Beautiful Home, very confy and cozy, in a true Dutch spirit neighborhood. Food street market and Food Harlem around the corner. Very easy to get everywhere. Beautiful home in a fun neighborhood - we loved the family feel. Very clean, cozy and spacious accommodations for our time in Amsterdam. Kitchen was well-equipped and our family of 4 had plenty of space throughout. Marga was always quick to respond to our messages and made us feel very welcome.
Many good options for food and groceries nearby: particularly nice were the Foodhallen and a lively street market a block away that was open most days.

La ubicación es muy buena, con tranvía y autobús a 5 min. del apartamento. Te puedes mover perfectamente por Amsterdam desde aqui. El barrio es muy tranquilo y agradable, y al estar en planta baja, te evitas subir escaleras empinadas.
Ha sido una estancia muy agradable. excellent emplacement et très calme .

Renee our host was super responsive, the apartment was perfect for us and in a good neighbourhood.. We visited for 4 days during ADE and the marathon, so it’s was at the higher end of the price bracket, but we had no issues , Renee was lovely and we were very comfortable, thanks for everything Renee! See you in Scotland some time! Renee estava lá na hora do check in, ela foi tão simpática que antes mesmo de entrar no apartamento eu já me sentia em casa…. Ela foi extremamente atenciosa, mostrou os cômodos da casa, explico como se usava os eletrodomésticos…. Foi uma conversa tao agradável que parecia que nós conhecíamos há muitos anos, o apartamento é exatamente como nas fotos, há coffeeshops perto, bem como mercado e farmácia… tudo há menos de 5 minutos caminhando… um ótimo lugar que com certeza voltarei. The apartment is very clean and in a neighborhood with lots of restaurants and bars. We always felt very safe.
It is a 3 minute walk to the tram and then a 20-25 minute ride to all the sights and the central train station.
For those with accessibility issues, there are 2 full flights of stairs. The stairs are narrow and the flights are steep.
We had fun in Amsterdam! Renee’s place was wonderfully located just to the east of the Amsterdam tourism hubbub. Renee was always responsive and was amazingly flexible about our check-in and departure times!

« La Maison du bonheur » à Amsterdam la ‘’Venise du Nord’’ :
ARIE, UN HOTE EXCEPTIONNEL: Arie mériterait d’être un superhôte,
car passionné par sa ville et heureux de partager son super-superbe duplex.
Arie est disponible, attentif, réactif, intelligent parlant bien anglais, généreux, … à notre arrivée avec une bouteille de Champagne sur la table.
BEAU DUPLEX TRÈS FONCTIONNEL ET BIEN EQUIPÉ :
ainsi dans la cuisine nous avons préparé des diners, dans le salon on a regardé des films avec notre clé USB. Des superbes plantes et fleurs décorent la maison.
BONNE SITUATION DU DUPLEX: D’Amsterdam Centraal Station, la gare et le centre de la ville, le bus 21 améne au logement en 17 minutes.
Bien situé à l’Ouest donc avec un accés par tram aux Rijksmuseum et autres musées, et au superbe Vondelpark.
Beaucoup de commerces à coté dont Albert Heijn un très beau et bon supermarché à 200m de la maison et qui est ouvert jusqu’a 22h. Le Ping Pong bar à 300m.
Nous aurons un grand plaisir de revenir. We had a wonderful stay at Arie’s place. It was super clean and beautifully designed. The terrace was definitely the highlight for us, perfect for enjoying a coffee or just relaxing after a long day exploring the city. Arie welcomed us very warmly and was kind enough to let us check in early. which made us feel instantly comfortable. Everything we needed was available and it is close enough to public transport. Would definitely recommend if you’re looking for a cosy, authentic Amsterdam experience. Loved our stay! The apartment is beautiful and unique. I enjoyed being able to do my laundry, cook and sit on the Terrace. It’s a little far from center center, but the neighborhood is cute. Amazing place to stay in Amsterdam - So well connected and beautiful park just right on your doorstep with amazing coffee shops! Arie was an amazing host! Replied quickly and the house had everything we needed!
Overall was the best stay and would recommend Arie and his apartment to anyone coming to Amsterdam! Arie
hat uns Tipps für Unternehmungen gegeben. Die Wohnung war sehr sehr schön und der Empfang sehr freundlich.

El apartamento es increíble está todo al detalle muy bonito y muy bien decorado limpio y nuevo
tiene una pequeña terraza muy linda .
La comunicación con el anfitrión siempre fue súper agradable , rápida , resolutiva y dispuesta .
La zona inmejorable a una calle del Vondelpark y todas las tiendas a los pies.
Sin duda volvería a repetir con mucho gusto!
Gracias por dejarnos vuestra hermosa casa fue un grandísimo placer . Incredible location - easy to walk around and take the public transport to get anywhere in the city! Very clean beautiful well-lit apartment. Would definitely recommend and would stay again! Een heerlijk verblijf in een authentiek Amsterdams huis op de eerste verdieping (via steile trap zoals je dat ziet in films en series). Fijne ligging vlakbij Vondelpark en bij voorzieningen als restaurants, openbaar vervoer en supermarkt. De straat is druk en geeft een heerlijk stadsgevoel. Heel veel leefruimte in woonkamer, eetkamer en keuken. En er is een ruim buiten om te vertoeven! Echt luxe. Een aanrader voor stadse bezoekers die van een city buzz houden We really enjoyed our stay at Merel and Fabian's place! We weren't aware that Merel and Fabian are renting their own home and they are relatively new renters however considering how well equipped the house is, they did not feel like new renters.
It is a big, spacious apartment and true to the pictures shown.
The apartment is on the first floor and Merel and Fabian were kind enough to help us with our bags.
We also wanted to drop our bags before check-in and they were accommodating enough to let us leave our bags.
There is a station right opposite the house so the connectivity is great.
They are really warm and kind hosts renting a piece of their heart.
Definitely recommend staying here. Had a great stay! Merel was very proactive through the app and Fabian was incredibly helpful in person at checkin, very good hosts! the location is amazing, great place with easy access to tram, the park and some great restaurants in the neighborhood. would definitely stay again if I get the chance. Our stay with Merel was amazing! We were able to check in early with a last minute booking, & the hosts were super responsive regarding our questions. Beautiful apartment with all amenities, perfect location next to vondelpark. Would stay again, and have been to Amsterdam 5 times & this was the best!

Interesting concept for an accommodation, never lived on a boathouse! A lot of grocery stores in a few minutes of walking. Very large and spacious! A cute cat onboard! Péniche très grande très bien aménagée , la place disponible est surprenante , très beau séjour avec cuisine très bien agencée et très grandes chambres
Chatte très mignonne et câline … We had a lovely stay on Marlie 1. It was incredibly spacious and homely, and so peaceful away from the busy centre of Amsterdam. We had a beautiful friendly cat for company - it felt like home! Swimming in the canal from the boat was an extra treat! Thank you for a wonderful stay and for sharing your houseboat with us 😊 Awesome unique experience! Thank you!

A lovely house with sunny garden, well located and easy to get around the city from. We had a good stay here and would recommend. The hosts were away so their friend let us in but the communication was great and everyone was kind and welcoming. We really enjoyed our stay there. Very central, house is great. Had a wonderful stay at Noortje’s apartment in Amsterdam, the place is perfectly located near the Jordaan area with super markets and amazing local shops just a short walk away. The apartment is very spacious and well distributed and has everything you need to enjoy a wonderful stay in the city. Would definitely recommend. Perfect for an Amsterdam mini break! Great place, very nice and welcoming host, great communication .
The place was charming , good beddings and nice kitchen.
Close from the city center .
Perfect stay.
Warmly recommend

Un coup de coeur absolu pour l’appartement de Stijn!! 🩷Un appartement sublime et très douillet où il est facile de se sentir à la maison. L’emplacement était incroyable entouré de bons restaurants, cafés et un marché très mignon. J’étais seule et je me suis senti en sécurité dans le quartier et l’appartement! Stijn a pris la peine de m’accueillir chaleureusement et était à l’écoute de mes besoins. I would definitely stay here again ~
Very nice location & studio & host! Everything was seamless and Stijn was a wonderful host. Made everything easy and enjoyable. It’s a lovely cozy home! We really enjoyed our stay in Amsterdam in this De Pijp apartment! The place is very spacious and equipped nicely, super comfortable and amazing location! The stairs going up to the floor was quite a new experience for us but not too difficult if you dont have mobility issues. A perfect spot! Thank you! Stijn's place is absolutely lovely and exactly as described - this was the perfect location and apartment for our five-day stay in Amsterdam. It's on a quiet street in a very cool and beautiful area, removed from the busiest parts of the city but very close to the center. Stijn was extremely communicative despite being on vacation himself, and the check-in and check-out process was as smooth as could be. The little balcony was an added bonus - we sat out there almost every morning! 10/10 would recommend. Very nice place, very responsive. Great neighborhood Good location, couple of stops on the metro to central. Nice, bright apartment. Stijn was swift to reply to communication. We enjoyed our stay The place is exactly what you expect. It has a great homey and clean atmosphere. It was spotless when we arrived. All the basics from kitchen to laundry products to towels are available. Personally I would have liked some better bedding, but it did the job!
Stijn was responsive and available for anything, very easy going and helpful.
The neighborhood was fantastic. Very large yet very commutable. Busy yet relaxed, not hectic and has a great restaurant scene. Seems family based but also a good number of young adults.
Reaching it is easy as it’s a very short walk from the De Pijp station. Which traverses many lines, so also great to go from there, anywhere.
Overall great stay and great apartment. Private and open space, no direct sunlight but always felt well lit, no noisy neighbors and a very nice simple balcony. We had a lovely stay at Stijn’s place. The apartment felt cozy and had adequate space. The location was perfect - with just a 5 minute walk to local transportation. Our host was able to accommodate us last minute and ensured we had everything we needed to make our stay enjoyable!

Amazing. Lovley people, and a unique and fun place to stay. It was extreamily relaxing and 1000× better than staying in a hotel! Vielen Dank für die super Unterkunft! Die Kommunikation mit Karuna und Ed war hervorragend. Sehr freundliche und hilfsbereite Hosts! Wir waren 6 Nächte auf dem Hausboot, es hat uns sehr gefallen. Die Gastfreundschaft war unglaublich. Die Vermieter sind super freundlich und zuvorkommend. Der Hund Molly war auch toll. Von den Vermietern kriegt man tolle Tipps und Empfehlungen für Ausflüge und Sehenswürdigkeiten. Wir kommen gerne wieder! Nous avons séjourné à quatre, deux adultes et deux enfants de 13 ans et 9 ans, dans le logement de Karuna. Nous sommes ravis de notre séjour à Amsterdam et de notre hébergement. Nos hôtes ont été très accueillants et nous avons adoré loger sur l'eau dans leur appartement-bateau, original, confortable et bien tenu. Notre jeune garçon a adoré nourrir les cygnes et les canards venus nager près de nos fenêtres! Nous remercions encore nos hôtes pour le prêt de vélos qui nous ont permis de rejoindre en 5 mn la zone d'embarquement du ferry pour la gare d'Amsterdam. Dans cette même zone se trouvent des restaurants et un supermarché, très pratiques pour nous restaurer. Accueil très sympathique de la part de nos hôtes,
Le concept de boat and bikes nous a énormément plu, c’est très pratique pour se rendre au centre d’Amsterdam
Le lieu est superbe, l’accueil des cygnes chaque matin restera un très beau souvenir
A conseiller vivement! Karuna and Ed were very nice and friendly hosts.
The accomodation was very clean and tidy.

Thanks for the wonderful time in Amsterdam They were super friendly and helpful. We actually planned our according to their recommendations and got to learn some fantastic new places! The place is very cosy and clean. We could easily find a place to park our car right in front of the boat. Will definitely want to visit again! La casa e' piccola ma splendida. La zona e' tranquilla ed in poco tempo utilizzando i servizi pubblici si e' in centro ad Amsterdam. Bellissima esperienza. This bot house is a bit far from the city center. Karuna and her husband were friendly. Unterkunft wie beschrieben,

Alles unkompliziert.

Well kept, spacious apartment with very responsive hosts The place has everything you need and is centrally located with short commutes to the central station. Wir wurden von anfang an mit viel Herz und Freundlichkeit empfangen. Wenn es Fragen gab wurden diese schnell beantwortet!
Die Unterkunft war sauber und gemütlich wir haben alle auch super geschlafen.
Es war wie ein 2tes Zuhause.
Danke für alles wir kommen gerne wieder! Easy check-in, friendly people, apartment as described and a super cozy backyard :) Absolutely love the decor and very special interior! The host is very helpful and responsive. Definitely recommend! It’s very good place Benno was a lovely guy who welcomed us and helped us to park our car. Unique accomodation. I stayed in Benno’s apartment for a few days, I had to wait 2 hours for check-in to be organized, hard to get in contact with ppl managing property, unexpected rule saying we can’t use the only outdoor area after 10 pm 😂 rest was ok. No one is like benno , he is very kind and helpful , for sure i will book his place again ,,
Every thing about his place was wonderful Was a great stay. The different art pieces also gave the accommodation a unique vibe. Benno was also a great host, really helpful and tons of interesting insights. Highly recommend! 😄

Love love love this place! Gerben was so helpful and met us at the train station to walk with us to the property. Property is very well stocked with all the amenities needed for a comfortable stay. The boat is in the perfect location on a quiet street but in walking distance to all the major sites of the city. Can’t wait to stay again! Great place! I would recommend. It was the perfect place in Amsterdam tout était parfait We had a fantastic 3 night stay on the boat, centrally located, spotlessly clean and absolutely everything we needed. Sitting on the deck in the sunshine watching the boats go by was just wonderful, really special accommodation. Our stay at Gerben’s place was excellent. The location was great. We were able to drop off our luggage early and returned when the cleaning was done. Sitting on the deck chairs was a highlight, particularly in the evening. Would definitely stay again. I had a lovely night here. The hosts are extremely responsive and helpful. I really enjoyed sitting on the patio overlooking the water. I will definitely be back! We were absolutely impressed by the space on the boat. It was spacious and totally functional and tastefully decorated.

I will give this experience 11 out of 10.

Nous avons passés 4 nuits dans ce chalet, qui est parfait. Calme, paisible. Joli environnement. il nous manquait juste nos vélos, pour pouvoir en profiter (dommage que l'hôtel n'en loue pas).
Superbe communication avec Lex, reactif sur nos demandes.
Le chalet est propre, literie au top qui sent bon la lessive. Tout est fonctionnel. Sehr schöne Unterkunft mit super Anbindung, falls man mal einen Tagestrip nach Amsterdam unternehmen möchte. Endroit très paisible et calme au coeur des waterlands avec une accessibilité à Amsterdan (30 mn en vélo) et autres lieux sympas Marken, Edam, très facile par pistes cyclables très sécurisées.
Le logement est très fonctionnel propre et agréable, quoique peut être un peu petit, Petit deck extérieur pour prendre le soleil couchant
L'hôte est très réactif pour répondre. Sehr saubere und gemütliche Unterkunft, perfekt gelegen. Kommunikation mit dem Gastgeber war schnell und unkompliziert. Absolut empfehlenswert, würde jederzeit wiederkommen. Nous avons passé un très bon séjour chez lex qui nous a fait un accueil très chaleureux. Accès Amsterdam facile en bus. Merci beaucoup Die Unterkunft ist perfekt, wenn man nicht im Stadttrubel sein möchte, jedoch nahe am Geschehen sein will. Man erreicht Amsterdam mit regelmässig fahrenden Bussen. Der Kontakt mit Lex war super, er ist freundlich und hilfsbereit. Très bon séjour, c’est un logement pas très loin du centre ville (+-20 minutes en voiture) hôte réactif et très aimable, je recommande fortement. Awesome place to stay and relax after busy town centre entertainment.
However,easy access to public transport then 15 minutes away from town centre.
Natural reserve park surrounded.
Would fit healthy style people living.
5 starts
Hosted by friendly and respectful people.
Many thanks Wir hatten einen wunderbaren Aufenthalt im schönen Häuschen von Lex in Broek in Waterland. Das Haus ist modern, sehr sauber und liegt idyllisch direkt am Wasser – perfekt zum Entspannen. Lex war unglaublich nett, zuvorkommend und hat all unsere Anliegen sofort erfüllt. Wir haben uns rundum wohlgefühlt und können dieses Häuschen absolut weiterempfehlen! Super séjour dans le chalet de Lex, nous avons été très bien accueillis et surtout le logement était parfait !
Propre, très bien équipé, cosy et super apaisant.
Une vue magnifique, on s’y sent très très bien je vous le recommande à 100% !

This place is at Ground Floor, very well tastefully designed with all modern facilities. The location is good and close to Ceintuurbaan tram station which goes to Centraal Station. Even being away on holidays, they provided clear instructions and made sure that check in/out and our whole stay at their place was as easy and comfortable as possible. Will definitely recommend to my friends going forward. good apartment！ The apartment is excellent, it’s modern and spacious and is located near the center and is very well connected by the nearby tram stops. Perfect place to enjoy the city just by walking thanks to the central location. Highly recommend! Stunning home in the best neighborhood in Amsterdam! Mark and Anna's place has everything you need for a comfortable stay and is close to fantastic restaurants, cafes, and transportation. We felt so lucky to have found this place and hope to come back.

Hermoso! Pasamos una estadía comoda y lo mejor fue la ubicacion y el trato del personal. Volveria Very nice, clean, good people & great location. Wir hatten ein sauberes, kleines Zimmer mit Aussicht in einen Lichtschacht. Dafür war es ruhig. Das Zimmer war mit allem Notwendigen ausgestattet. Freundliches Personal war hilfsbereit.
Vom Hotel ist man schnell am Bahnhof und im Zentrum. Had a great stay thank you so much great hotel, would highly recommend as a central place to stay in Amsterdam. staff friendly and helpful. Hotel muy bien ubicado, en barrio tranquilo y céntrico a la vez. La pieza estaba en excelentes condiciones y el personal fue muy amable. Great location. Amazing place to stay. Friendly and helpful staff. We loved our stay at the Singel Hotel! The staff were incredibly friendly & our room was super clean. Right opposite a beautiful canal and in walking distance to lots of shops, cafes, pubs and more. Was nice to be only a 10 minute walk from the train station too. Highly recommend :)) Sentralt, rent og stille. Hotel très sympathique.
Accueil très convivial.
à proximité de la gare centrale et de nombreux points d'intérêt.

De accommodatie was precies volgens de omschrijving. Niets meer maar zeker niet minder. De host daarentegen was super. Voor heb niet 6 sterren maar minstens 8!!
Als je met z’n 2 en bent en goed ter been en uitsluitend een (rustige) slaapplek zoekt;100 punten!! We had a great stay! The apartment was exactly as described: comfortable and in a great location. Charlie & Keeva were incredibly kind and responsive, always quick to answer any questions and very helpful throughout. I really appreciated their hospitality. Would definitely recommend staying here! Abbiamo passato quattro notti da Charles e Keeva e siamo stati benissimo! Padroni di casa splendidi, molto gentili e disponibili. Molto consigliato! Todo excelente!! Charlie siempre muy amable a todo, el lugar está súper perfecto para moverse en Amsterdam, porque el metro, que está muy muy cerca, conecta directo con todos los lugares principales.
Gran lugar sin duda. Communication with Keeva was clear and easy and the location of the apartment is in a nice calmer neighborhood close to the city centre. The place has a nice terrace and good amenities. We had a great stay! Muy buenos anfitriones,
Tomar en cuenta que la terraza se comparte y las ventanas de ma habitación dan a esa terraza… y se tiene muy cerca las demás habitaciones One of the best experience i have had staying at their place. Its felt like I’m living in a hotel. Very nice location for public transport. Host is really nice and friendly. I would definitely recommend everyone to stay at their place if visiting Amsterdam.
10/10 ett bra boende hyfsat centralt i amsterdam Charles and Keeva’s airbnb is situated at a cozy neighborhood in Amsterdam. The room makes one feel at ease, and the amenities are a nice touch. Charles and Keeva were really friendly, responsive, and helpful regarding local recommendations. Charlie was extremely welcoming and made sure we had all the information we needed to make the most of our stay in Amsterdam. The location was absolutely perfect and the room was clean and comfortable. Thank you for being so welcoming, we would definitely return :)

amazing space. apartment was tastefully decorated. toilet was super clean. will definitely stay here again if I'm in Amsterdam. What a lovely place near centre of Amsterdam. Will definitely be back! Everything was going well. Eva was there when I checked out and check out was smooth. But 11 days later I got a $33 reimbursement request from Eva saying there is a minor scratch damage on the upper part of footboard. In order to cause this scratch, someone has to lift chair and hit the footboard. I do not think I did this feel as I never move or lift chair or any furniture. Amazing experience with Eva as a host, the place was cozy, cute and had everything needed for a 4 days stay! Will come again Had a wonderful few days in Eva’s lovely flat. It was really clean and tidy, and had everything I needed. Very comfortable and homely. I had a great stay at Eva's place, the apartment was clean, comfortable, and its location and neighborhood were great, especially on sunny days. Eva was very welcoming and responsive for checking in and out.

Such a charming experience! We loved being in the heart of the city and would stay here again. The houseboat slept two adults and two kids well, though my teenager was likely a bit too big for the bunk. The boat also had some mustiness to it, but that’s to be expected when you have a house on water. Very comfortable houseboat directy on the water (outer mooring). Well appointed. Lovely area. Our stay on this houseboat was absolutely perfect and a great surprise for the kids! The location is fantastic, just a short walk away from great shopping and restaurants, yet it felt like a peaceful retreat on the water. It was the ideal base for exploring the city.
The houseboat itself was surprisingly spacious, offering a truly unique and comfortable lodging experience. Waking up on the canal was a highlight of our trip.
Tijmen was an excellent host. All communication was easy, and he was always very quick to respond to any questions we had. I would highly recommend this houseboat to anyone looking for a special place to stay in Amsterdam. Such a lovely houseboat! Our family of four loved our stay. It’s nice and roomy (whilst also feeling cosy) on the inside and the outside seating area is the perfect place to sit and watch the world (and all the other boats) go by. It’s a great place to feel like you’re part of one of the things that makes Amsterdam special - its canals. It’s also well located to walk to loads of sights. And our hosts were really responsive and friendly too. A Dam fine place to stay! 🌟 Superbe voyage. La péniche est magnifique et proche du centre ville. Les enfants (et nous) ont adorés leur séjour. This is the perfect place to stay in Amsterdam. Right on the canal so you feel like you are part of the action. Only downsides are the canal and train noise (bring earplugs if you are sensitive to that) and the boat entry is a bit tricky with heavy bags. Inside the boat is larger than we expected with a nice kitchen, large bathroom and living room. Our stay was absolutely amazing.
It was my first time in Amsterdam and staying on the houseboat made the trip very special.
It was a perfect location.
Far enough out of city center to have a quiet evening, but close enough to walk to everything.
It was very clean and met all my expectations.
I would definitely go back to the 1923 houseboat again. Great location, great space. I would stay there again. 10/10 rating from me! Great place. Very central yet very quiet. Accommodation was large with comfortable beds. The best stop along our European travels. This boat sits on the outer edge of another boat so I would recommend not bringing a large suitcase / wheels won’t help / several steps. Very spacious! Incredible bathroom. We loved the area and the house. Two bedroom very spacious , zen on a canal but the area is wonderful. We were only 15 minutes from the heart of Amsterdam. Such a nice contrast Sissi was great in communicating everything we needed. Even though we did not get a chance to meet Sissi, she was very helpful with making sure we knew how to get to the center using the tram which is only 15 minutes away! and easy to get there! and also made sure we knew were the supermarket was. we loved our stay, i would recommend this great house to everyone wanting to visit Amsterdam ! wifi was great, comfortable beds, lovely living room and a beautiful view. i will visit again and will want to book this place again! Sissi also had a cat in the house (DJ) lovely and playful cat. i would like to thank Sissi for her hospitality and kindness. Sissi's place was wonderful. We arrived a little late for our check in but she left us notes on how to handle our accomodations. We were very lucky to have such a nice place for our time in Amsterdam Nous sommes arrivés l'après midi du jeudi 5 mai dernier.
Sissi était absente mais elle avait pris le soin de nous laisser sur la table de cuisine une fiche avec ses recommandations et des informations pratiques (numéro du taxi, ligne du tramway etc).
La description de la maison était conforme à nos attentes, très jolie et agréable. Nous nous sommes tous sentis comme à la maison. Nous avons bien profité de la terrasse. Quartier très calme.
Nous garderons un très bon souvenir de ce séjour. Merci encore. Was a nice visit.. sissi is a great host . everything was perfect. we thank you Wir hatten eine schöne Zeit bei Sissi und unser Hund war auch willkommen! Direkt hinter dem Haus konnten wir sehr schön spazieren gehen. Vielen Dank Great place for a peaceful and comfortable stay. Beautiful home, easy to find and very comfortable beds. The only cons were the pet hair and location was very far from the city center. The Ubers were about €26-36 or a full hour by tram.

Absolutely wonderful home. Very comfortable and spacious. The kitchen was fantastically stocked with good pans and utensils. Couch was excellent as was the bed! Pillows were good quality.
My only complaint, and it is minor, is that there was very limited space for my toiletries in the bathroom. Since this is their primary home much of their personal items are in the home but they did create space in the wardrobe and fridge.
Either way I highly recommend this place and I hope to come back in the future! Diese Unterkunft kann man nur uneingeschränkt empfehlen! Top Lage, direkt an einem Park, tolle Aussicht. Special mention must be made about Kobe and Eva, who are just the most lovely people, they not just helped us with check in and check out, but gave so much useful information and tips about Amsterdam. I would definitely recommend this place.

Our family love this house and we were a party of 6. It’s a little out of the way from the city but that’s what we wanted. The house is beautiful decorated, very clean and sits in a quiet neighborhood. It had 3 bathrooms which worked out perfect for us. I love how the local supermarket was literally a few steps away and made it very convenient for us. I highly recommend this immaculate home! Lovely house in a very nice location.
Everything you need and more is there.

Die Anweisungen von Marc zur Anreise und zum Check In waren hilfreich. Marc is a very nice host. His house boat is huge and comfortable, 15 minutes by walk from the ferry pier. We do recommend this place. Le contact avec Marc a été tres facile . Il a toujours été réactif lors de nos diverses demandes .
La péniche était en cours de rénovation mais cela ne nous a pas dérangé. L espace à l intérieur du bien était relativement spacieux .

Superb! Rutger and Carla’s place was stunning, even better than the photos. Very tranquil with a beautiful garden and sun room, we stayed here for 8 days and wished we could stay even longer.
We loved the location, in a quieter neighborhood but a short walk from food options, bike rental and a tram stop that makes it easy to get around pretty much anywhere in Amsterdam in 15-20 minutes.
Rutger and Carla were also very helpful in answering questions in advance of our trip, and met us upon arrival to let us in and show us around. Excellent hosts! Rutger and Carla's lovely home was one of the highlights of a beautiful trip to Amsterdam. The apartment (plus garden studio!) is simply gorgeous - beautifully furnished with lots of sun, plants, garden, record player (and a perfect record collection), fluffy cozy bedding, beautiful fixtures, and unique collectables.
Rutger met us at the door and showed us around, check-in could not have been easier or more pleasant. As others have mentioned there were homemade preserves and a walnut liqueur, lovely touches. Small things like plenty of hangers and great shower pressure were so appreciated.
The location is in a quiet neighborhood with easy access to transit and central Amsterdam. We appreciated the quiet family neighborhood and tried a few wonderful restaurants recommended by our hosts.
I hope I have a chance to come back soon and play more records, eat Dutch cheese, and covet the furnishings and lovely chill space. Rutger und Carla sind sehr herzliche, unkomplizierte und großzügige Gastgeber. Rutger stand vor und während unseres Aufenthaltes für Tipps und Fragen (Parken, öffentliche Verkehrsmittel) zur Verfügung. Carla stellte uns selbstgemachten Likör und Marmelade bereit, worüber wir uns sehr gefreut haben. Zudem war die ganze Wohnung wunderschön mit Blumen dekoriert.
Wir konnten die Zeit dort vollkommen genießen. Die sorgfältige und geschmackvolle Gestaltung der Wohnung hat es uns leicht gemacht, uns sofort wohl zu fühlen.
Um die Ecke befindet sich ein gutes Fischgeschäft, was wir zusammen mit der voll ausgestatteten Küche sehr geschätzt haben. Cafés, Supermärkte, der Park Frankendael und die Straßenbahnstation sind ebenfalls in unmittelbarer Nähe. Alles ist mit öffentlichen Verkehrsmitteln sehr gut zu erreichen.
Im Garten kann man beim Frühstück herrlich die vielen Vögel beobachten. Unsere fast erwachsene Tochter hat sich im Gartenhaus sehr wohl gefühlt und so ein eigenes Reich gehabt. Myself and two others stayed at Rutger and Carla's for a long weekend. This was one of the best Airbnb's we have ever stayed at. We truly felt at home in their carefully curated house filled with natural light, plants, amenities, and a lovely back garden.
The space was excellent for three people as the 'garden house' was a delight and provided privacy for our third guest. Their neighborhood was quiet, near many green spaces , and was the perfect biking distance from the busy Amsterdam city center.
After long days adventuring we honestly couldn't wait to get back home to relax and enjoy the comforts of their home. We would come back to Amsterdam just to stay at this house again! It has provided us with inspiration and creativity. Thank you Rutger and Carla! We had an amazing time at Carla and Rutger’s home.
The place is absolutely beautiful, it’s like a little peaceful gem in the city. The garden is luxurious and it was so practical to have the room at the end of the garden to work.
Carla and Rutger were extremely responsive and adapting. We met Carla when we arrived, and they were really thoughtful (homemade jam and fresh flowers bouquets were waiting for us and we listened to a lot of Rutger’s extensive music collection!) and it was a pleasure to experience Amsterdam’s life from a very personal and cosy home.
We had picnics at the park minutes away from the house, the neighborhood is really practical in terms of food shopping, there is a bike rental place 5 minutes away by foot. Everything went really smoothly!
We actually can’t wait to come back! We had the loveliest time at Rutger’s and Carla’s stunning flat. The locations is perfect for a bit of quiet at the end of the day. The neighbourhood has everything one needs, from supermarkets, to restaurants, wine shops, bakeries, parks, bike rental and a very convenient tram stop that took us everywhere in approximately 20 minutes. The flat is beautifully laid out, with a large living space facing the amazing garden and a fully equipped kitchen. When we arrived, we had fresh flowers in every corner of the house, jars of delicious home-made jam, basic cooking ingredients (oil, coffee, milk, etc) as well as toiletries. Check in and out were the easiest, and Carla and Rutger were always responsive, also offering lots of tips on how to enjoy our time in the city. A truly special place. Thanks to our hosts for sharing it with us. This is a lovely garden apartment(and I mean garden with a plethora a beautiful flowers)
In a very quiet residential street. It was great to be away from the hectic tourist scene. there were many amenities even a homemade bottle of gin. Fully stocked kitchen.
A beautiful nearby park suited us very well. All in all, I would highly recommend this space as long as you were not into being in the middle of the tourist scene. Great host, awesome house and location, quiet neighborhood, few minute walk to coffee shop, bakery, grocery, park, as well as public transport to city center, if I make it back to Amsterdam will definitely stay here again. We had a lovely stay at Rutger and Carla’s place. Extremely nice apartment and neighborhood as well. Rutger was a very responsive and friendly host. Highly recommendable! We had an absolutely wonderful 9-day stay at Rutger and Carla’s Airbnb in Amsterdam! From the moment we arrived, everything was smooth and welcoming. The check-in was easy, Rutger was there already to welcome us. Rutger was very responsive, friendly, and helpful throughout our stay.
The house itself was spotless, beautifully maintained, and exactly as described. Loved the devote and fresh flowers all over the place. We especially appreciated the comfortable bed, fully equipped kitchen, stylish décor, spacious living area, and beautiful backyard. After long days exploring the city, it truly felt like coming home.
The location couldn’t have been better—close to tram, grocery stores, restaurants, and attractions like the canals, and museums, which made getting around the city incredibly convenient. Despite being so central, the place was quiet and peaceful at night. Overall, this was one of the best Airbnb experiences we’ve ever had. We’d love to come back on our next trip to Amsterdam.?

Très bon séjour !
Bonne communication avec les hôtes.

Laura's place was perfect for a week in Amsterdam! The house was clean and i felt like home. The location of the house was very good, there was everything for shopping around the house. Thank you Laura for letting us check in early since we had a early flight arrived in Amsterdam ♥️ Very good I would recommend it. Thanks

Can really recommend this place. The room was located close to the city center and the station. Nice and clean. Rebecca was helpful and had a good house manual with healthful tips. Quartier calme malgré la Gay Pride toute proche !
Tout est à proximité. Rebecca’s home is just as she described it. Very cozy, right on the canal, and everything you would like to do in the city is within walking distance. Thanks Arjan! Arjan‘s Place was Great.  It looked exact the same as in the picture. Arjan was very friendly and helpful and gave us some cool tips for spots to looking up. I would absolute recommend to stay for my next trip to stay again there 😊 Wir hatten einen wundervollen Aufenthalt bei Arjan in Amsterdam! Die Unterkunft war sehr gemütlich, sauber und gut ausgestattet. Die Lage war perfekt, um die Stadt zu erkunden, und wir haben uns vom ersten Moment an sehr wohl gefühlt. Wir können Arjan nur wärmstens weiterempfehlen und würden jederzeit wiederkommen. Vielen Dank für die tolle Erfahrung! appartement spacieux avec joli déco asiatique. petit patio très agréable. un peu au sud d'Amsterdam dans un quartier vivant, nous avons tout fait à pied avec nos enfants. belle expérience ! John是非常友好的房东！长得超级帅👾!如果早上时间能对上都会给我们打咖啡！就是我非常抱歉居然没认真阅读退房政策！忘记了移除自己的床单👾有点内疚感了 公寓非常有设计感。我们在短短的行程里逛了梵高博物馆、荷兰国立博物馆、人体博物馆等。想特别介绍一下，租自行车领略这个城市是一件非常棒的事情，因为整个城市不大，骑车随意慢行，可以充分感受这座城市的历史、多元文化、艺术气息和运动精神。我骑着车穿梭于河岸边、甚至来到了国家奥林匹克体育场，真是意外的发现。此外房东非常友好、热情，他非常开放地拥抱世界各地的文化、乐于于来自全球不同地方的房客交流、介绍附近的各种文化、饮食、时尚、历史体验场所，每天早上给我们冲咖啡买面包，让我们有宾至如归的感受！这是一次非常有意思的旅行！ Ubytování bylo moc příjemné, cítili jsme se dobře. Tím, že jsme měli krásné počasí a mohli využívat venkovní terasu, nevadil nám malý soukromý pokoj. Everything great. Arjan lovely, helpful.  Apartment has fun and unique decor, comfortable and very clean setting. But our space was a squeeze for all 4 people. I would recommend for 2 people only. My other note is that the breakfast situation is slightly confusing. Arjan offered us some cheese and crackers throughout the stay but there didn’t seem to be a clear plan or offering for this so don’t feel it’s fair to call the apartment a B&B. Other than this everything was great. Wir waren sehr zufrieden mit Arjan. Er gab uns sehr hilfreiche Tipps und Tricks zur Umgebung, war immer sehr freundlich und für jeden Spaß zu haben. Gerne wieder. :) Lovely apartment, felt very warm and welcome. Arjan was especially helpful and knowledgeable. Great location to city centre

This place is great - we thought it had everything that you need, but nothing that you don't!

Definitely staying here next time we are in Amsterdam! schnelle Kommunikation.
kamen um 13.30 Uhr dort an und wir konnten direkt auf das Zimmer obwohl erst check in um 15 Uhr war.

Ein Wasserkocher, Tassen, Tee & Kaffebeutel sowie Zucker gab es auf dem Zimmer.

Sehr freundliches Personal, sauberes Zimmer, tolle Umgebung mit einem großen Park der direkt ins Centrum führt. parfait Absolutely amazing! The room is super clean and has a cute setup. Everything was neat and easy! Great value for what you pay for. Right next to a very good public transit spot. Can get to Amsterdam central relatively quickly.
Lovely staff. Was able to check my bags before we checked in and after check out on our last day.

I had an absolutely amazing experience at this Airbnb! The rooms were not just great—they were stunning! Spacious, beautifully designed, and spotless, they provided the perfect mix of comfort and luxury.

Highly recommend—I’ll definitely be back! Wonderfull place to stay 👌🏽 ... Incredible stay!! Séjour très agréable dans un cadre calme et reposant. Location was centralized and everything was accessible! The host was super responsive so it didn’t add stress to our travel plans. Would book again when visiting in the future! Zohal es una excelente anfitriona, siempre estuvo en constante comunicación. La zona es muy bonita y muy bien ubicada. Obecně příjemné, všude kousek, klid, čisto, vybavené i ledničkou a fénem, což jsme velice ocenili :) Uvítali bychom druhou deku, je k dispozici pouze jedna. The area is exceptionally lovey, safe, with well maintained beautiful facades and bustling. A really excellent location for a stay in Amsterdam! Zohal was very communicative and helpful and provided clear instructions and personal recommendations for restaurants, bars, museums, etc. Also appreciate the coffee and tea to start each morning Very nice place Great little place in Amsterdam near the center of town, perfect for a couple or solo traveler looking for an easy option characteristic of the Netherlands architecture. Lovely Room woth a very friendly and courteus host. Everything was adequately described as in the pictures, very clean and beautiful house!

Bente‘s place was very cute and cozy. I stayed at Puck and Dennis' place with my wife and six month old daughter for the month of April. Their apartment is great, and Puck and Dennis were amazing hosts. Big and pleasant appartment, with a gorgeous rooftop.

Would highly recommend this place for anyone travelling to Amsterdam! Beautiful appartement with all we need. Pepper and Soul are also very lovely. The experience was great! cats were adorable and very friendly, would love to stay again :) We loved our stay at Sandra’s home in Amsterdam. It was easy to get to and the street and neighbourhood are lovely; very green and leafy and quiet. The living area was comfy and cosy and the bathroom absolutely beautiful. The main bedroom is huge, the second has a bed and study area, the third is a child’s room; not suitable for an adult to sleep in. We used the lounge as a third bed which was more than comfortable. There was plenty of linen, pillows and quilts.
I stress that this isn’t a negative review but have to mention for any future guests that the stairs up to the apartment and in the apartment are very steep and very narrow. On our last morning there I broke my foot and tore ligaments carrying my luggage down, and spent the rest of my holiday in a moon boot. My advice is go down the stairs sideways, and do not carry anything big, have your hands free. In hindsight I should have just let my bag slide down to the landing! Die Wohnung von Sandra ist sehr schön ruhig gelegen. Man kann sie sehr gut erreichen, nicht zu steile Treppen, die Dachterrasse ist ein Traum! Sehr schönes Badezimmer und auch die Schlafräume sind geräumig, schöne Küche, hell und freundlich alles. Wir haben die Gesellschaft der zwei Katzen sehr genossen,auch wenn überall Haare sind. Das muss man natürlich wissen, wenn man Katzen mag. Uns hat es jedoch nicht gestört. Wir kommen gerne wieder. Beautiful apartment made extra special by the very cute cats.

Ideal location in the heart of the city. Joanneke was friendly and quick to respond. very flexible with our check out. Highly recommend. Amazing location and beautiful little flat. I can’t recommend enough, we’ll definitely be back. Garden is really private and peaceful, it doesn’t feel like you’re in the centre of Amsterdam. Great location, with a view to match! I needed another apartment as Iended up staying in Amsterdam longer than anticipated. Amit's place was perfect, and his approach to guests made the move from one place to another, whilst working much easier and stress free!
Highly recommend Amit's apartment, should you just want to explore the city; are in town on businss or just a quick weekend away. This property is suitable for all these needs. Hope to see Amit again soon! Really beautiful view. Great location. Amir was an excellent host. A fabulous location with great views and easy access to everything. Amit was very accommodating. The house was super clean, easy to find, perfectly located at the heart of the city and with beautiful views!! Would definitely recommend it and if I were to go to AMS again I’d definitely try to stay here!
Make sure to bring a small bag though, cause you’re gonna have to carry it up some steep stairs! 🫢 Super cute apartment, fantastic location and great communication! Amit was very responsive with any questions or concerns that we had, made recommendations for local attractions and restaurants, and left us a very nice welcome gift. The appartment is in great condition in a very central place. Highly recommend! Amit’s spot is in a great location right in the middle of it all. The living room has the best views of the canal and lots of natural light from the windows. The bathroom is very small and not a lot of room to sit and use the facilities. It can be a bit noisy outside some nights, to the point where it woke us up, but not horrible. The stairs to get to the apartment are tiny and steep. Amit was a responsive and communicative host. He doesn’t hide the imperfections of the apartment. The stairwell is narrow if you have big luggage but is manageable. The back bedroom is quiet but the living room can hear the people down on the street.
The location is great and there is a great buzz of energy in the area. Great shops and restaurants all around.
I would go back again. It worked for us! Det var en super god oplevelse at bo i Amits lejlighed, der ligger lige i centrum af Amsterdam.
