Helen and her home are truly wonderful. This was a highlight stay during our honeymoon Europe tour - our favourite Airbnb of the trip for so many reasons.
Helen is a lovely and welcoming host, receiving us warmly and going above and beyond to make our stay special. So many thoughtful touches and we opted for a private boat tour, which was just perfect for us, especially with Helen’s local insights.
This place was also so beautiful as people who love water and the outdoors, with lots of natural surroundings, the sounds of water and birds, and visits from ducks and swans during our stay.
The location in the city was perfect, with several fantastic restaurants within walking distance and a tram station nearby to unlock easy access to central areas. I can’t say enough good things about it, we loved it and dreamed of what it would be like to live this way in Amsterdam. Would come back and recommend it to others! Great experience
It couldn’t have gone any better
Thanks to Helen who made our journey wonderful Helen war eine super nette Gastgeberin und hat einem jeden Wunsch erfüllt.
Besonders die private Grachtenrundfahrt mit ihrem Boot war toll.
Super preiswert und unkompliziert zu erreichen ist das Park and Ride auf Zeeburg 2.
Uneingeschränkt zu empfehlen!!! Tekne evde kalmak güzel bir deneyimdi. Teşekkürler Helen🌸 Ich kann mich den bisherigen Kommentaren nur anschließen. Das Hausboot ist ein echtes Schmuckstück und Helen eine unglaublich sympathische Gastgeberin, die sehr hilfsbereit ist und immer mit Rat zur Seite stand. Die Kommunikation mit ihr war super, und das Airbnb ein richtig süßer Ort, um zu entspannen. Die Lage ist super: zu Fuß ist man super schnell an der nächsten Bahnhaltestelle, um schnell ins Zentrum zu gelangen sowie am nächsten Bootsverleih-Standpunkt. Zu Fuß gibt es Lokale in der Nähe, in denen man gut frühstücken oder zu Abend essen kann. Wir waren zu zweit dort und können das Airbnb nur wärmstens empfehlen. Danke Helen für den tollen Aufenthalt! Logement impeccable, Helen est adorable Unsere Tage in Amsterdam waren einfach so entspannt und super, auch Dank der herzlichen, super netten Helen, die uns auf ihrem Boot das Gefühl gegeben hat zuhause zu sein und keine Fremden zu sein. Helen hatte so gute Tipps fernab von klassischen Reiseführer Zielen und es war so angenehm mit ihr zu quatschen …zudem hat sie uns eine Bootstour durch die Grachten beschert, wir durften sie alles fragen und es war so entspannt und persönlich – einfach toll. Danke Helen für deine Gastfreundschaft. Das Hausboot liegt etwas außerhalb des Amsterdamer Zentrums, wodurch es schön ruhig ist. Es ist zwar klein, aber sehr charmant eingerichtet. Gastgeberin Helen war ausgesprochen freundlich und aufmerksam, hat regelmäßig nachgefragt, ob alles passt, und sogar den Kaffee nachgefüllt. Das Bett war bequem, ein Ventilator sorgte für angenehmes Klima – gut, dass es nicht heißer war. Besonders schön: die beiden zutraulichen Katzen, die immer wieder vorbeischauten. Insgesamt ein sehr empfehlenswerter Aufenthalt mit fairem Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis. Helen’s cozy room on a house boat was in a great local location quite and very easy to get to places around Amsterdam ….. we felt we had a cultural experience at Helen’s and highly recommended you take a boat ride with her it was a highlight. Bed and bathroom were good. Good Food restaurants are easy access. There is no facility to do any food accepted coffee at the house boat but plenty of options not far away. Helen is a born and bread local from Amsterdam and very knowledgeable and friendly if you wish. Helen ist eine sehr freundliche und engagierte Gastgeberin. Sie hat mich sehr herzlich empfangen und mir in Ruhe die Unterkunft gezeigt und alles erklärt. Die Unterkunft ist blitzsauber und liebevoll eingerichtet. Es ist alles da, was man benötigt und die Aussicht auf die Gracht ist wunderschön. Ich hatte dort sehr viel Ruhe und Privatsphäre. Helen kennt sich als Anwohnerin sehr gut in der Gegend aus und hat gute Tipps für schöne Restaurants und Unternehmungen. Es war ein großartiger Kurzurlaub. Vielen Dank noch einmal, liebe Helen!

Nous avons passé un excellent séjour.

It was such a pleasant staying at the west Amsterdam (green, calm area, so so beautiful, and only about minutes from city center - tram is just min walking from the house)! Nabila était présente pour nous accueillir et nous avons pu laisser nos bagages chez elle et les récupérer plus tard. Great place to stay while visiting Amsterdam!! Sehr ruhige Unterkunft am Rande von Amsterdam & in der Nähe des Flughafens - genau, wie wir uns das gewünscht haben. Gartennutzung & Sitzgelegenheiten am Wasser machen das Ganze sehr idyllisch.

Very kind and welcoming.

Pour faire simple, nous n’avons à redire ! L’accueil était excellent Agustina & Robbie sont très sympathique et prévenants. Le logement était très bien et sa localisation permettait d’accéder simplement au centre-ville en transport en commun.
Je recommande chaudement ! A perfect stay!
We had a wonderful time. The place was exactly as described, clean, well-equipped, and ideally located. The welcome was warm, and everything went smoothly from check-in to check-out. Thank you again for this great expérience !

Perfect quiet place, in a typical boat. Mirjam is really flexible and really nice. The instructions are really clear and the place is cosy. Thank you very much for everything ! I recommand 100% ! Un logement typique sur un bateau typique tel que le logement des locaux. Wunderschönes, romantisches Hausboot. Zentral gelegen. Wir kommen gerne wieder! This place is refreshing and extremely cozy. The bed and pillows are divine and the quietness of the water rocks you to sleep. it's close to everything, I highly recommend it Hi Mirjam
Thank you again for letting us use your lovely houseboat.
We loved it and it was such a nice way to finish our European holiday.
You live in a beautiful part of the world.
Robyn and Wayne I absolutely loved staying on Miriam’s quaint houseboat. She was a friendly and accommodating host, and offered local suggestions. I also enjoyed how quiet and peaceful the location is, while still being walkable to lively neighborhoods. I would definitely recommend a stay here! I had been in Africa for a month and needed a space to decompress for a couple of days before flying home to Canada. Mirjam’s place was perfect.
She accommodated my early checkin with grace. In our pre-checkin chats I mentioned I was looking forward to sipping wine and eating stroopwaffels on her deck patio - she left me a bottle of wine and stroopwaffels on the kitchen table.
The place was small, quaint, and perfect for one or two people needing a quiet getaway, literally minutes away from Amsterdam Centraal. We really enjoyed this lovely housebout and the terrace was so nice for relaxing in the evening, just to sit there and see the boats passing by. And having our breakfast there in the morning. It was a calm and quiet area but still near to the centre and Joordan central station. The districts nearby were our favourites when it comes to restaurants and just to take a stroll by the canals and the lovely areas. Miriam lived up to our expectations as a host. Communication was easy and the room was very nice and practically arranged. We were offered clean towels everyday. We can recommend this houseboat to others. But be aware that the stairs down from the terrace to the room is narrow and steep. We took a swim from the boat, it was nice but the swim ladder is a bit tricky, when to get up. Overall, we’re very satisfied with this accomodation. I had a fantastic stay on this barge. It’s clear that it’s really well looked after, everything was spotless and in great condition, which instantly put me at ease. You can tell a lot of care goes into maintaining it. It felt like a home away from home
This space is the best side of cosy. Full of little touches that make it feel homely without trying. You feel safe here.

Highly recommended if you’re after something peaceful, well kept, and just a bit different.
An amazing host! Thank you for hospitality! Alles war sehr gut, angefangen von der Lage: wir waren zur Sail dort. Vom Boot aus direkte Lage...Klein, aber fein. Me and my partner came to stay for a holiday over the New Year and loved Dave’s place 😊 He was very flexible with checking in/out which was great. He made sure to drop a message to see how we were getting on which was greatly appreciated. We also met the neighbour who was really lovely and helpful too!
The place itself is in a lovely quiet neighbourhood which we enjoyed walking around. You’re very close to public transport also so it’s easy to get about in and around Amsterdam. The flat has been renovated beautifully and had everything we need for a comfortable stay. We happily could’ve stayed longer! 😊 Dave was extremely helpful and available at any time. His place has matched the description. Very nice and comfy apartment. Area is very nice to have long walks and safe during the days and in the evenings. Public transport is very easy to find and well connected.
I truly recommend staying at Dave’s place! Molto bene! The apartment was wonderful, and the garden was lovely. There’s a skylight in the living room that adds a beautiful, relaxing vibe to the space. Beautiful apartment in nice part of town. Just note this is a one bedroom apartment Wouter was a very communicative, great host and his appartment was beautiful & very clean. His friend Beau took care of picking us up at the tram station next to the apartment and led us to the apartment. He was an extremely nice and caring host.
Antonio also left brand new towels, shower gel and shampoo for us to be used, plus a nice collection of perfumes :-)
All in all, we had a great time and we felt like home, and Antonio proofed to be a super host in our eyes. Muchas gracias! Perfect for couples ! The apartment is well located and the street is very calm.
The appartement is very clean and you can find everything you need!
Antonio was very welcoming and kind,
Thank you Perfect place to stay in Amsterdam!! Just around the corner from markets, easy walk into town centre and only 25 min walk from Vondel park! Interior was beautiful and well kept. Location was close to so many shops, restaurants and the tram. Fern was very helpful and always responsive. Pepper was easily my favorite part of the stay though 😊 🐈‍⬛ ❤️ Savoir que le chat dort sur votre lit même si vous fermez la porte de la chambre ! Really loved our stay in a very unique houseboat! Great walking distance to tons of restaurants and Vondelpark.

What an incredible stay. The apartment is ultra luxurious and looks even better in real life. 10/10 would recommend and would definitely stay here again. 非常好的入住与体验，空间十分宽敞，房东还给我们准备了小零食，并且非常热情的解决我们的需求。总体来说是一次十分满意的体验！ We had a wonderful stay at Samuel’s apartment for our holiday. It really felt like a luxury nature oasis within a perfect location of the city. So many great restaurants and cafes around, and easy accessible transportation. We loved the indoor plants and glass window patio overlooking the terrace and back door garden. It is very quiet, peaceful, and private.
We really liked the sparkling water tap feature and nice coffee machine in the kitchen.
The downstairs bedrooms are very spacious , clean, and super comfortable. The bathroom shower and bathtub were also amazing.
The house is so beautiful,
Definitely worth it and highly recommend! Words fail to describe how wonderful of a stay this was - an oasis in Amsterdam. Samuel has gona above and beyond in creating a safe and peaceful haven in Amsterdam. Suitable for any kind of traveler, but especially those looking to relax and recentre in an otherwise rambunctious city. Place was gorgeous and tranquil! It looked SO clean, minimalistic and modern! Huge kitchen with a gorgeous view of a bamboo forest and other plants and flowers.. beds were comfy and I have not one negative thing to report. The most important thing I thing I can mention is the host allowed us to check in early because we had a crazy early flight and we were all jet-lagged. his immediate response and flexibility was outstanding. Coffee on the corner and amazing restaurants close by. Can’t give it enough ⭐️! Magnificent stay. Samuel’s home is design forward and luxurious yet understated and serene. Communication was a breeze and Samuel went above and beyond to accommodate our needs. The home had everything our high expectation family of 4 needed and is conveniently located around the corner from the grocery store and one of Amsterdam’s best bakeries. Easy and enjoyable walking/biking distance to most of the major sites. We stayed during a heat wave and though the home does not have a/c both of the lower level bedrooms stayed perfectly cool. Would stay again without hesitation!

We had a wonderful stay at Tess’s apartment! The location is excellent, with easy access to the tram, making it super convenient to get around the city. The apartment is right next to Vondelpark where we were able to take daily walks, visit playgrounds and ride bikes! The apartment is also spacious, airy, and has great lighting, which made it feel so comfortable and relaxing throughout our stay. It was perfect for our family of four — plenty of room for everyone to feel at home.
The kitchen is beautiful and fully equipped, which made it easy to cook meals when we wanted to stay in. Everything was spotless and thoughtfully arranged.
Tess is an amazing host — responsive and kind, always quick to answer questions and make sure we had everything we needed.
We will definitely want to stay there time and time again. Highly recommend! We had such a great stay at this apartment. The location could not be better – it literally backs onto Vondelpark and sits in a warm neighborhood filled with unique restaurants and shops. The apartment was very spacious, spotless, and tastefully decorated – a perfect mix of classic Amsterdam charm and modern, cool design. We especially loved the treetop views of the park from the terrace, which were perfect for enjoying morning coffees and winding down from a long day of walking around the city. Tess was friendly, helpful, and super easy to communicate with, making the whole experience smooth and stress-free. We’d happily stay here again and recommend it to anyone visiting the city!

Nice location and apartment. Easy to communicate with Dries in the time before our arrival. Perfecte locatie! La stanza è in una posizione perfetta per raggiungere qualsiasi punto a piedi. I prezzi ad Amsterdam sono molto alti, ho scelto questa stanza perché ci permetteva di spendere meno in 4. Si tratta di una camera con 4 letti singoli adatta a chi sta fuori tutto il giorno e rientra solo per dormire. ringrazio per l'ospitalità.  La permanenza è stata piacevole

This is a really nice and special accommodstion in a great neighbourhood of Amsterdam, away from tourist masses but still central. Very much recommended! Great location and very clean accommodation, great value for money. Only thing we could fault it on was having to make the bed after a long day of travel when we checked in. Thankyou for having us ! Gepflegtes schönes Gebäude, gepflegte saubere Zimmer. Ruhig und nett. Uns hat alles sehr gut gefallen! Guter Bezirk. Ruhig und nicht weit vom Zentrum mit öffentlichem Verkehr. Danke für Süßigkeiten und Tee :) Alles wunderbar, wie in den vielen Rezensionen schon beschrieben, kann ich nur bestätigen! Kleiner Hinweis für "Frischluft-Fanatiker": Es lässt sich nur ein Fenster kippen. Wir würden wieder kommen! Todo súper bien excepto la entrada a la casa que estuvimos dos horas fuera esperando a que nos dieran la contraseña del candado para que pudiéramos coger la llave. This was a very nice place to stay while in Amsterdam. The neighborhood was quiet and safe with shops just a few minute walk away. The room was very clean and had everything we needed in it. Beds very comfortable! The room has large windows, letting in a lot of light. Would definitely recommend it and would stay here again! A lovely place to stay. A clean, spacious and quiet room and bathroom. It was nice to have tea and filter coffee in the room (and waffle biscuits!). Check in was easy. Staff were very helpful. I would stay again. Nb If you have mobility issues or heavy luggage be aware that the lift only goes to the second floor and the rooms are on the third floor up a stair. This wasn’t an issue for me. Es war alles sehr sauber, die Betten waren richtig toll (nicht zu weich und Matratzen fühlten sich an wie neu), es gab 2(!) dicke Kissen pro Person (MEGA!), Bettwäsche und Handtücher lagen bereit, alles super.
Der Raum war sehr hoch. Das Bad war sehr sauber, wir vermissten jedoch einen Klodeckel. 🙈
Was man wissen sollte, ist, dass es sehr, sehr warm im Zimmer ist. Direkt unter'm Dach und leider auch nachts nicht gut zu belüften, da 1 Fenster gar nicht zu öffnen war und 1 nur auf Kipp. Wir hätten gerne die kühlere Nachtluft herein gelassen. Das Fenster-Thema wäre aber auch bei vielen Hotels sehr ähnlich.
Was aber sehr positiv zu erwähnen ist, dass ein Turm-Ventilator schon eingeschaltet im Zimmer bereit stand. 😊 Danke!
Der Aufstieg zum Zimmer ist abenteuerlich (Treppe offen und sehr steil), das Schaffen von Helligkeit durch Nutzung von viel Glas lässt im DG leider einen Sauna-Effekt entstehen. Optisch cool, aber effektiv sehr "hot". 😅
Wir hatten aber eine gute Zeit! War spontan aber gut Bacho was kind and responsive, the spot is nice, clean and honest.

Alles hat gut gepasst nur war die Unterkunft, speziell das Bad, ziemlich verdeckt. Lage passt gut und freundliche Leute. Ich musste das Airbnb stornieren, da meine Zugverbindung ausgefallen ist doch leider konnte man das nur bis 11:00 Uhr stornieren. Deshalb habe ich woen yi jira geschrieben sie hat mir auch geantwortet. Doch dann hab ich gefragt, ob sie mir eventuell ein Teil der Summe zurückschicken kann, da ich es nicht in Anspruch genommen habe. Doch sie hat mir nicht mehr geantwortet, obwohl ich die Stornierung Versicherung hatte. Recommended :) Extremely good place for the price and location This room is convenient and affordable for anyone who is looking for a basic space without many amenities. Access to the city center (and other areas) is easy through nearby tram and bus stops, and Erasmus Park is only a block away. The room was reasonably quiet, as it is on a small side-street, and I always felt safe in the room and in the neighborhood. The room comes with a mini-fridge, fan, space heater, and electric kettle. The bathroom is shared with two other rooms, but it was clean and the shower had excellent water pressure/temperature control. Great place to stay, good communication, nice people, and it’s close to public transport. la gentillesse en personne, thank you ❤️🫰🏻 The room is in good area you have bike renting and a cafe downstairs, needs cleaning it was dirty and dusty Great place . Great location , gives you the right level of privacy . Such a lovely place to stay on my short visit to Amsterdam. The host was so lovely and friendly, creating a comforting energy with good vibes!

The houseboat is a lovely and special place to stay and Marit a wonderful host! We had a great time staying there and everything was to our delight. Thank you very much! stay in Amsterdam became much more comfortable when we stayed in these apartments!) very cozy, quiet and incredibly convenient location! thank you Marit for your hospitality ❤️ This place was Beautiful and cosy!
Marit is a nice host and a friendly cat in the neighbourhood soothed me. This is likely the best AirBnB I've ever had. When I return to Amsterdam I will stay here exclusively. This accommodation feels like home - the area is quiet and residential, but close to shops, grocery stores, and transit. I felt right at home, Marit is the PERFECT host. I cannot recommend this accommodation strongly enough for solo travelers or pairs. I had a wonderful stay at Marit's home - beautiful, quiet location and perfect for my work trip in Amsterdam for the week! Definitely would recommend! 9/10 ⭐️ Marit was so wonderful and Helpful! Was the perfect Airbnb for our trip with beautiful views and easily accessible to the city centre. Absolutely no complaints We had a great stay on the house boat. Everything was just as discribed and shown in the pictures. The tram or train station to get to the city are just 10 minutes walking distance and the journey from the airport is really short and easy.
Also Marit was the friendliest host. She provided all the necessary information in time and tried everything to make sure we have a great and uncomplicated stay. We could always reach her with questions and she was very responsive.
Everything was clean upon arrival and the little kitchen had everything we needed for our short stay.
Check in and Check out was uncomplicated. The place was very clean and looked exactly like the pictures. The location is convenient as it’s close to public transport, and the host was very friendly with clear instructions that made check-in easy. Would definitely recommend! Es war eine tolle Unterkunft. Alles was man braucht und sehr sauber. Und obwohl wir eigentlich erst aufgrund eines Notfalls stornieren wollten, konnten wir spontan doch noch anreisen. Die Gastgeberin ist sehr freundlich.

Very nice, cosy and clean apartment on a quiet location near canal.
Chretien was good host and answered every question.
Everything was great! I definitely recommend this place in Amsterdam! Cet appartement est magnifique et la lumière y rentre des 8h en hiver. Idéalement placé à deux pas des quartiers touristiques et de la gare. Quartier non fréquenté et très très calme. Un pur plaisir nous reviendrons ! Chretiens place is in a great location, easily accessible from the central train station. A very nice, stylish and well equipped flat. la casa es hermosa, el barrio es tranquilo y bastante cerca de la zona centro, volveria a arrendar este alojo. Fantastic stay and fantastic host! Interpret how you may but for the size, price and accommodation the host provided it was unmatched for the area!! L’appartement proposé par Chrtien était incroyable. Tellement pratique, lit confortable, propre et joliment décoré! Et surtout à 15 minutes à pied du centre ville 👌
L’hôte est très réactif pour répondre à nos préoccupations, et nous avait même suggerer des bons plans pour stationner la voiture, et à moindre coût, à quelques stations de l’appart.
Je voyage à travers l'Europe depuis quelques temps, et c'est certainement l'un des meilleurs hébergements dans lesquels j'ai séjourné. all great said my daughters great place perfect for a weekend very confortable Super ! Chretien's place is close to the city and very walkable. We loved the location and how friendly and easy going the host is. Thank you for opening your home to our family. Excellent stay, close enough to the centre of Amsterdam

Our family of 4 loved staying in this charming Airbnb in Rivierenbuurt for our one-week stay in Amsterdam. The neighborhood is safe, family-friendly, and close enough to the Metro/tram stations to get to the city center easily. We loved our hosts and their local recommendations and responsiveness. With two young children, having a washer/dryer in-unit and a bathtub was a huge plus. The hosts even left us a few snacks to enjoy (crackers and fresh fruit) so our stay would be easy.
The private garden was so charming and cute! We'd definitely recommend the area/place for anyone who's looking to stay awhile and feel like a local. We liked that it wasn't a bustling area but had lots of restaurant options and shops nearby. There is also a family-friendly park 5 minutes away (walking). Thank you for the stay!

It’s a beautiful apartment in a great location, communication was fast and easy, I definitely recommend Disappointed as the stay had the potential to be so much better. Checkin was not the smoothest, the process of going to central station and picking up the keys isn’t the best. As a positive yes it is a very large place as compared to others, however it seems to have been revamped in a hurry, I mean even the boxes used for packaging are still left in the balcony, and tags were still left on the chairs. Moreover, the place hasn’t been cleaned well, there are dirty rings left from tumblers all over the kitchen and the living room. The TV is just left on the table & it is for us to connect it and figure out how to make it work. As a positive, yeah, the location was incredible, but just felt sad that the place had so much potential but just wasted. Also the host isn’t the most cooperative, we had a small request to have extra towels as we were staying for 4 days, and we were provided 2 medium ones. But it was categorically rejected with a simple no not possible, so it didn’t make sense really to highlight other aspects. Also the left leg of the bed was broken, don’t know how this could not have been checked before we arrived. Anyway it could only be fixed for the last day of our trip, so it didn’t really help. Overall, wouldn’t recommend, unless they do a much better job maintaining the place. Everything was nice, the location and apartment is amazing and really viby. Only the key pickup spot is 20mins by foot or uber (12 euro one direction) from the apartment which is really annoying for an apartment with such a high standard. Simply amazing apartment! Lots of space perfect kitchen, location is on one of the best canals next to some of the best cafés in all of the Jordaan area and walking distance right into the Amsterdam city center and all the nightlife. The host communicates within minutes and we had more than everything we needed. We really felt like we were living in the city right on the canal and it was a magical stay. we will surely be back! Very spacious apartment in a great location - incredible neighborhood with lots of good restaurants close by. Also appreciated the incredibly fast wifi, hot water with good pressure in the shower, and the nice appliance touches including a dishwasher and washer/dryer. Check-in process is a little clunky as others have noted, but the hosts are very responsive communicators and happy to help with any issues. This listing title is "Luxurious Canal Apartment". I don't think I would feel so harshly towards this property if the manager Marcel hadn't been so rude & condescending.
There is no manual or information sheet whatsoever. I had to contact the management company (BnB Services) to get the wifi information & to let them know that the tv doesn't work. The reply was, "The tv should work and the wifi info is on the white box next to the tv:)" I shouldn't have to hunt for the wifi & NO, the tv does NOT work.
A luxurious apartment should have luxury bedding. Not the case in this apartment. We were cold the 1st night. There was only a thin duvet for each of us. So we opened the dresser drawer to find more blankets & found old, stained blankets & a pillow that is probably 50 years old. Marcel told me they are for the owner's use only. Again, no manual. How were we to know?
A luxury apartment would have coffee next to the coffee maker. And it would have hand soap & dishwashing liquid. Not in this apartment! When I asked about these items, I fully expected an apology & for someone to bring them right over. Nope. Marcel gave me a 10€ refund & told me to go out & get them myself.
The toilet seat is broken. The bedroom lamp is wobbly & leaning. There is no nightstand on one side of bed. It doesn't have a blow dryer.
In the kitchen, there are no water glasses... only mugs & wine glasses. The kitchen is not fully equipped to make meals. (No mixing bowls, no serving pieces, etc.)
The living room furniture is different from pictures & all of it is uncomfortable.
The listing says, "From the bedroom and kitchen you have door opening to a balcony where you can enjoy a morning coffee or a late afternoon cocktail." Well, the kitchen door is painted shut & the balcony furniture is old & broken. One of the previous reviews noted that cardboard was left on the balcony. It's still there.
Windows are also painted shut...this is a fire hazard. So I asked Marcel about it & he told me it's against the law to have operable windows along the canal. Funny, several neighbors had their windows open. I did some research online & found nothing about a law that prevents the opening of windows.
The listing says the backyard is an open space on property usually covered in grass. No. There is no backyard & there is no grass. There is a balcony, but it overlooks ugliness.
There is a no smoking policy, but there's an ash tray on the balcony.
Not all of the light bulbs were working. Marcel told me they'd replace them for the next guest.
There was enough lint in the dryer screen/filter to start a fire. I cleaned it the best I could, but there are no paper towels in this apartment. The dryer doesn't work. Our clothes never got dry.
No notes about recycling.
One reviewer commented that the bed was broken. I believe it's been replaced, but the old bed legs are still sitting in the bedroom.
The shower faucet continues to drip long after being turned off. It's virtually impossible not to get water on the floor of the bathroom when taking a shower. Be careful when turning on the bathroom sink faucet. You will get splashed if you turn it on all the way.
To ALL AMERICANS: This appt is on the THIRD floor, NOT the SECOND floor! And the stairs are steep, curved & shallow! Obviously we weren't the 1st people to think the 2nd floor was actually the 2nd floor. The lady on the 2nd floor yelled to us, "Wrong apartment! It's upstairs!"
The kitchen floor is about 1 1/2" higher than the rest of apartment. I nearly had a bad accident because of it.
My friend tripped and injured herself on the 12"high glass TV stand on wheels. Ridiculous place for a TV.
The "dedicated workspace" is 24" round table in the living room.
What is actually "Luxurious" about this apartment? I'm still trying to figure that out!!
If this were my property, I would fire Marcel immediately! And I would make all the necessary changes to make this a luxurious apartment & correct all the mistakes on the listing. Or I would lower the nightly rate, correct all the misleading verbiage in the listing & take out the word luxurious.
...SO disappointing. We loved our stay in Johannes beautiful apartment, equipped with everything you need for your stay.
The location is perfect in the Jordaan area, right in the center but quiet and peaceful. The view on the canal is amazing.
The communication was fast and easy.
We’ll definitely come back, thanks for everything! Perfect place to nest or actively enjoy the city. Beautiful canals cannot be beat! Exceptional place. Ideal location - beautiful canal, calm and serene, but a stone’s throw from the action of the center, as well as the canal district and the Jordaan for more refined tastes. Flat is bright, clean and open. Communication was quick and friendly.

Siamo molto contenti dell’ospitalità di Manita che ci ha accolti ed è stata estremamente gentile e disponibile sia per il check in che per il check out! Ha risposto con grande velocità alle nostre richieste ed è sempre stata amichevole e gentile. La casa era pulita, ordinata e fornita del necessario per il nostro soggiorno.
Il contesto del palazzo purtroppo non è molto curato. Ma questo non dipende dall’host. La posizione è buona per esplorare Amsterdam con le bici o i mezzi. Noi ci siamo spostati a piedi perché siamo dei camminatori, ma la città offre la possibilità di muoversi agevolmente e senza inquinare!

Sorry to say this houseboat was the low point of our great vacation. We have stayed on a different houseboat last trip, and it was much nicer for the same price (it wasn’t available this time).
The positive is the location, it was very convenient to everything. Now the negatives…. Host said to give 15 minutes notice for our arrival. We have had to wait for an hour sitting on our luggage. The interior doesn’t look as good as the pictures when you see it up close, everything is un-level. We had to put magazines under the bed frame to try and help. And a towel under the shower door so it didn’t flood the bathroom. We found some trash in the couch cushions…… and there were a lot of bugs getting in from somewhere. I killed about 20 of them the first night and it wasn’t bad after that. We found an electric fly swatted at the front door, but there were no batteries. In short,we wished we had stayed longer in our previous hotel room. Great place for anyone visiting this beautiful city! We were there with our 15 months old baby, so glad we chose this place, excellent location and when you come home, a nice outdoor deck to watch the boats pass by and just pause.
Host was amazing:)
This will be the place to stay whenever we come back to Amsterdam. We loved the houseboat! It’s bright and cheery and spacious enough to spread out and relax in. It’s conveniently located to lots of restaurants ( 3 great ones within 1 block) , fun neighborhoods to explore, the park, and the museums. We especially enjoyed sitting on the deck watching people and ducks cruise the canal. It’s a great spot!! Absolutely beautiful place and canal view, out the windows or in from the porch-like end of the ship. You can walk around nearby through lots of beautiful canals. Nice art and decor inside Amazing place in a great part of town. To hang out on the deck and watch the boats go by is worth the trip from anywhere. Great host communication and accommodated everything so nicely. Would highly recommend! A perfect location for exploring the streets of Amsterdam! The outside porch is also great for watching the boats go by. The boathouse is comfortable and very stylish. We would highly recommend! 5 stars in everything!! We absolutely loved our stay here! This house boat was wonderful! it is located within such close distance to shopping, museums, and places to eat all while still being on a peaceful street! We absolutely loved waking up and being able to see the water, boats going by and even swans! This unit is also very functional it has a nice kitchen and the bathroom is also quite spacious! The deck was our favorite little space for sitting drinking coffee and watching the water. Für diese relativ kurze Zeit wo wir in Amsterdam waren echt eine top Unterkunft;) Perfect cozy place , on the water and in the center . Perfect host
I felt like home . I Can’t wait to come back ^^

Loved Eva’s place, super central to a bunch of restaurants and the market is right around the corner. Eva was super helpful with check in and out and very accommodating. Highly recommend Had a great stay at Eva's place. The apartment is spacious, clean and nicely put together. The location is perfect in a great hip neighborhood thats walkable to everything. Eva was great and very responsive. Would definitely stay again.
(Just for completeness I'll point out that its 3 flights of tiny/steep "Dutch Stairs" so it may not be suitable for people with issues climbing stairs, but there's absolutely nothing else that doesnt make this apartment a great stay!) Place was great. Only thing negative to say is that there was no silverware and the pillows on the bed were not great. Otherwise great location and lovely place. El lugar está bien ubicado y puedes moverte a todos los museos a pie. Me and my boyfriend had the best stay in Eva's beautiful apartment! Eva was flexible with the check-in, the apartment was even better than the pictures and the location was perfect located in a cozy area with a lot of good cafes and restaurants. Can highly recommend everyone to stay here when visiting Amsterdam ❤️ Eva was an incredible host and her beautiful apartment made our trip! We would love to come back again! Eva is a very friendly and helpful host and her apartment is a jewel! Its bright, very cozy and located in the perfect area if you're planning on exploring amsterdam by just walking.
Would definitely come back if I were ever again in Amsterdam! The place was gorgeous and in the best area in Amsterdam. You have everything you need in the apartment for an extended trip!
Eva was a gracious, responsive, and caring host! You can tell she genuinely wants you to have a good time at her place. Prepared with a booklet with instructions for the house, local spots, and attractions you should go to. On top of that, she gave me spots and activities that she thought I'd enjoy through our conversation when I checked-in.
My trip was a dream come true and it wouldn't have been possible without Eva! 地理位置太棒了！就在巿中心。電車車站就在門前，地鐵站大概不用三分鐘，還會經過熱鬧的當地巿集、超市和餐廳。轉個彎就是運河，樓下有一排的餐廳，很晚回家都非常安全。房源內應有盡有，我和兒子各睡一個床。我們住了六個晚上，非常喜歡。Eva在第一天特別趕過來，親自接待我們，分享許多景點資訊。
唯一要提醒大家的，樓梯是傳統的荷蘭式陡峭型樓梯，每一個步階都是我鞋子的一半而已，可能不太適合老人家，而且，行李要走樓梯提到3樓喔！ It's a huge apartment in a great location. Eva made it very easy to find and get settled in. The only downside was the very small WC, but the shower room was lovely. And being so close to the Albert Cuypstraat market and tram stop was perfect. I would highly recommend staying here!

Petit coin de paradis permettant un accès facile en transports en commun au tumulte du centre ville. What a wonderfull family getaway in an absolutely amazing location.
The boathouse and all the amenities etc were just as good as promised (and in the info/pictures), and we especially enjoyed the fantastic activities (nature, water, sports facilities) that are located practically next door!
A very friendly, quick and helpfull assistance from our Hosts - thanks so much Joel & Florinde!
High recommendations from very happy guests. We had the good fortune to stay at Florindes houseboat for three nights. We have only good things to say about our stay. It was clean, it was quiet, bathroom and kitchen were top notch (although the stove was a bit hard to understand) and with all the flowers it was very inviting. Pièce de résistance however was the jetty in the back of the house. It was 28° C outside which made it especially good.
We had good communication with Florinde and aside initial problem finding were the keys were, everything went very smooth. We had such a wonderful time at Florinde’s house boat. The charm of the place itself and the private access to water just made our stay in Amsterdam so special. We have 2 kids and the bedroom was just perfect for them and they loved playing with the toys that were kept aside for them to play. We felt we stayed in a very happy home and enjoyed every aspect of it!

spacious great room with extra high celing makes it comfortable. close to Leylelaand tram/train station to go anywhere on the cheap with CC swipe. 7 minute walk to Lindl supermarket which has everything. Meike is super helpful and responsive. Great location and spacious house. Recommended place to stay in Amsterdam. We had the most wonderful stay with our 1.3 years old baby. The house is stylish, specious, has lots of games for the baby and space to walk around and explore. Being able to cook and do our laundry really helped alleviating our trip, and Meike was super nice and helpful as well.
We would definitely recommend to families traveling with babies to stay here. Très belle maison proche du coeur d'Amsterdam
restaurant et commerces à proximité
Meike s'est avérée être une hôte très sympathique Wir haben unseren Aufenthalt sehr genossen! Das Haus war genau wie auf den Bildern sehr stylisch und schön eingerichtet- wir haben uns sehr wohlgefühlt!! Vor allem für Familien mit Kindern ist es sehr zu empfehlen:)) Lovely place and great hosts! Sammie the cat is cute. We had an amazing stay at Meikes Townhouse. It is furnished with love and style and offers everything you need. The backyard is super nice and we enjoyed a coffee in the morning and watched the kids playing. We would rent it again if we come back to Amsterdam. This house was just perfect for what we needed travelling with a 1.5 year old. Host was so helpful with directions and checking everything was ok.
Our son was so excited by the play area and it was so nice to have access to a separate room with a cot and high chair/baby friendly plates/baby gate etc. we loved the open plan space downstairs and also having a separate room for him to sleep upstairs. our bed was super comfy. We also had plenty of space for him to play outside.
The house itself is really nicely located, a bit outside city centre but it was so easy to grab a tram/metro with a short walk. Also convenient from airport, one stop by train (6 mins). Locally we had shops/coffee shops and loads of parks/playground options. I’d say this place is ideal for a family but even if just adults, equally a tonne of options for you. We loved the city! Didn’t get to nearly as much as we planned so will need another trip back soon ☺️ Séjour parfait dans une maison magnifique . Super voisins avec qui ont a pu prendre l’apéro et passer une bonne soirée ! Notre fille était très heureuse ici. My, my wife, and two kids (8 and 5) did a 33 day, 7 country tour of europe, staying in airbnb's almost the entire time and this was easily the best airbnb of the entire trip by a mile. Comfortable beds, a huge place, comfortable furniture. In fact, i'll go on a limb and say this was the best air bnb i have ever had. Mostly due to the bed being so comfortable. Tabea was easy to interact with and readily met our needs. In summary, we'd stay there again. Had a lovely stay, great location, lovely views and felt right at home. Tabea was very quick to respond, and a very great host. Thank you for sharing your home! Tabea is a fantastic host, she is kind, helpful and accommodating. The apartment is beautiful, just like in the pictures. I felt right at home - it’s clean, cosy and very comfortable. Getting the luggage up the stairs was a challenge but it was totally worth it.
The location is perfect - it’s far enough from the center that it feels quiet but still walkable from the main attractions. There's a tram station right outside the apartment, lots of restaurants and coffee shops around, and just a short walk to Vondelpark. The trip from and to the airport was also really easy.
The only issue I had was the self check-in - the lockbox for the key is not easy to find so I would recommend keeping in touch with Tabea when you are arriving and letting her know when you are leaving the airport, so that she is available to help if needed.
Overall I had a great stay! Tabea’s apartment is lovely from the views from the balcony to the compact shape of the space and furniture it has a real homely feel and affords great light in all rooms of the building making it feel vibrant and excited about the day ahead !
Takes about 37 minutes to walk into the city centre but on a sunny day it goes very quickly ! There is also great transport links aswell with trams, busses and bike hire
Vondel park is literally around the corner aswell which is a great addition
Lastly, Tabea when we had an issue regarding keys (took the wrong ones out and had to ring her at 12:30am in the morning) she handled it with calmness and politeness and was great at getting us back into building
All in all a great place to stay in Amsterdam would highly recommend for any couples

We had good communication with the host. Convenient location for transport, Westerpark, etc. Spotlesslessly clean. Host inside but bell faulty. Host very pleasant; offered to carry suitcases upstairs. Flat very small and cluttered. Full of Host's personal possessions. Denise es una gran anfitriona.
Facilitó siempre las cosas y su apartamento es muy acogedor y bien ubicado, muy cerca del centro.
Gracias por dejarnos vivir una auténtica experiencia en Ámsterdam y estar como en casa. Really enjoyed our stay. Unlike so many AirBnBs today, this is actually someone's home. We found it comfortable and lived in and it was fun to see the photos, books, and travel memorabilia belonging to Elmer and Denise and their family. Denise was helpful and response. The location is convenient, easy access to the tram line into the city center, and next to the lovely Vondelpark. Good restaurants, not touristy, surprisingly quiet. Walkable to the museum quarter.
Do be aware that, like many buildings in Amsterdam, the 3 flights of stairs up to the flat are extremely steep. This didn't bother us, but I was glad we were travelling light, and it would not be suitable for anyone with poor mobility. The flat itself is quite small, with everything fitted in with remarkable efficiency. There were no doors on the two kids rooms. The double room is up a set of very steep steps (former attic, there's a hatch you can close but no door) that you have to come down to use the toilet at night. Hemos tenido una experiencia fantástica en el apartamento de Denise. Es una anfitriona agradable y comunicativa, siempre dispuesta a resolver las dudas. La casa nos ha encantado y ha sido perfecta para nuestra familia de cuatro. Las niñas han disfrutado con los juguetes y con la maravillosa colección de libros infantiles. La ubicación de la casa es inmejorable, junto a Vondelpark. En definitiva, ha sido un gran acierto alojarnos en esta casa para conocer la ciudad. Ojalá algún día podamos repetir, nos encantaría!!!! We hadden een aangenaam verblijf in het appartement. Alles wat we nodig hadden was aanwezig. We hebben ook gebruik gemaakt enkele van de vele gezelschapsspellen die er waren.
De hosts waren zeer vriendelijk en bereikbaar. We loved this cozy Amsterdam apartment which Denise and her family made available while they were on an adventure. We felt right at home. We played several board games from their collection in the evenings. And we enjoyed a drink on their new balcony. The nearby park was beautiful. The neighborhood was quiet. Public transit was only a few minutes walk away. The stairs up to the apartment are no joke...narrow and steep… so this place is not for you if that would be a challenge. We were so grateful for this home away from home while we were in Amsterdam! This is a great apartment for a small family to get a taste of authentic Amsterdam life. Elmer made us feel welcome when we arrived, and Denise's instructions provided lots of great tips for making the most of our limited stay in the city. Vondelpark is bustling with people making use of the green space, and the tram and grocery stores are close by while still preserving a quiet neighborhood vibe.
The disadvantage of the apartment is the bathroom set-up. The host's description was clear but the reality was relatively inconvenient: sink + toilet next to kitchen on first level, sink + shower up a steep flight of stairs adjoining the double bed. Note that the 'pink' child's room has limited headspace given the loft-style bed. We liked the quirky edges but it wouldn't appeal to all. A great little spot pretty much on Vondelpark and central enough to all the museums and other sights. Had a lovely few days with my wife in Denise’s apartment; she was incredibly responsive and helpful the whole time. The stairwell to get upstairs is kind of tight if you have very large bags with you, but the location (between the Vondelpark and all the restaurants on Overtoom) is amazing. The apartment was perfect for our family of four. We all enjoyed a taste of Amsterdam living in Denise’s home. The location was great near Vondelpark and tram access. Denise was a friendly, helpful host. The home was well equipped with everything we needed. Would recommend this home for families visiting. Nous avons passé un excellent séjour dans l’appartement de Denise et de sa famille. L’appartement est à deux pas d’un tram et au coin de la rue nous entrons dans le vondelpark! L’endroit est calme et l’accès au centre rapide.

We really appreciated our stay and would highly recommend it to others. Roy fut très réactif, le logement parfaitement fonctionnel et propre. Nice place for a one-night stay!
Pros:
Great walkability—close to the subway, with lots of beautiful spots nearby. The bathroom was nicely decorated, and the bed was very spacious. Washer was helpful too. Lida also sent us a list of good restaurants, cafes, museums, and places which we enjoyed!
Cons:
Unfortunately, the apartment and unit felt dusty and musty due to a lack of ventilation (no bathroom fan and no air conditioner). We tried using a small fan, but it was extremely dusty—almost as if it hadn’t been used in over 5 years. We kindly asked for help, and Lida said a cleaning person would clean it and return it to us, but we never received it during our 3-day stay.
We also noticed several spider webs, some spiders, and a lot of dust—especially around the windows, curtains, and TV. Also, the dryer had a bad smell, so we chose not to use it. We highly recommend having the cleaning staff clean it thoroughly. Comodo, confortevole, ben arredato, tutto secondo descrizione The accomodation is super close to the center of the town. We never used the public transportation because everything is at 10-15 minutes walking distance (museums, restaurants, markets,...). Lida gave us great tips where to eat and was super helpful. The room is a bit on the smaller side but the bed is big and super comfy and everything was really clean so we were more than happy with our stay.
We would definitely stay here again and hope that we will.😊 Lida was a fabulous host with excellent recommendations and very helpful instructions for navigating the area. Our room was very cozy. The bed was comfortable. The bathroom was very nice. The tea station was an extra plus.
The location was perfect for us. Tucked away from the more touristy central areas but very easily walk-able to many great things. Plus the public transport nearby was a dream.
We had a great time. A little room in the most beautiful location in Amsterdam. Gorgeous neighbourhood. Easy check in and very responsive. Thank! Great location. Very clean. Will return. Die Wohnung war sauber und es gibt eine zusätzliche Luftmatratze zum schlafen, wenn sie zu Dritt reisen. Un lugar muy agradable, en una zona muy tranquila cerca de estaciones para poderse mover. Buen sitio aunque en el barrio no habia muchos holandeses... Por el resto genial

Helpful responsive host. Marrigje gave clear instructions and recommendations. Location is great, away from the noise yet very close to the city center. The host is generous and shared their bike. The inside of the house will make you feel right at home, comfortable and cozy. With the back yard perfect for a cup of coffee. I would come back for sure.

All good .. host is excellent
We stayed 4 nights.. enjoyed our stay in Amsterdam
Place is 15 mins away from centrum.. accessible by bus..which is connected to metro. The beds were very comfortable and there was everything we needed for our 4-night stay. The location is in a quiet residential area and easy to get to by public transport from the centre of Amsterdam. There's a supermarket within 10 minutes walking distance. We enjoyed our stay very much. We loved staying here! It had everything we needed and felt like a home. It was in a pleasant part of town and easily accessible by bike to get to and from the central part of Amsterdam. Our kids especially loved the garden and we loved eating our meals outside! The apartment looked exactly as shown in the pictures and everything was clean. I liked that it was not central so it was quiet in the evening (about 15 minute walk to metro station and then about 5 minutes by metro to reach central station). The backyard was also a nice extra and the trees provided privacy despite the big window. The hosts replied fast to any questions we had and were really friendly. I would recommend this place to anyone who prefers a place to stay in a quiet neighborhood! Die Unterkunft von Arno hatte alles was man für ein paar Tage zu zweit in Amsterdam braucht. Klein aber fein, und der Garten war ein absolutes Highlight. Arno war sehr freundlich und hat uns beim Check-In persönlich empfangen. Die Lage war ruhig - es gab zwar wenig in der Nähe zu unternehmen aber man kam relativ schnell in die Innenstadt von Amsterdam - ca. 20-15 Minuten. Das Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis auf definitiv gepasst. Danke für den Aufenthalt! The Airbnb was just like description/pictures. The metro is just 7 mins away and two stops away from downtown Amsterdam. It’s nice quiet neighborhood, stores and restaurants just five minutes walking distance. We truly enjoyed our stayed here. Checkin hat hervorragend geklappt.

Sowohl Annabel als auch Arno waren freundlich und hilfsbereit.

Wir können Annabel und Arno als Gastgeber nur weiterempfehlen. El alojamiento estaba correcto, cerca de la estación de metro, pero muy caro para lo que es la habitación. Los dueños muy amables y muy bien localizado y con buena comunicación para llegar a Ámsterdam Host gentili ed accoglienti Hello, It was super cozy place to stay. Thank youu

Lovely place in a great location. Good for families. The big open lofty feel was very nice. Big windows and doors, front and back of the Apartment. Quiet part of town, but just around the corner from the Restaurants and buzz. Park also not too far. Grocery store is just down the road.
The lift into the Apartment was also quite cool and comfortable.
I would happily stay in Jasper and Susan’s flat again. Great location. Walkable to the center of tourist interests, or an easy tram or bus, but a quiet residential street. Big windows to street on one side and balcony over canal on the other was great. Friendly hosts. Beautiful apartment in a great location. Helpful recommendations for restaurants and things to do. Loved the large main living space - comfortable and amazing art and design. Bedrooms were comfortable and great for kids, may be less comfortable for groups with more than 2 adults. Guests should be aware that the listing says 2.5 bathrooms but there is only one toilet and we were advised not to use one of the showers. Beautiful apartment in a wonderful family-friendly area. Jasper & Susan were extremely helpful in ensuring our stay was as smooth as possible, providing recommendations and even supplying a pack-n-play, high chair, and children’s cutlery for our family.
As a family with young kids, there were a few too many things our kids could get into for us to be too comfortable (we want to be respectful of their home & their things!) and we noticed dust since we have a crawler but overall a clean place and great location. Incredible space, we loved our stay.
Location is super nice as well. Jasper and Susan are very friendly people and provided us with all the help we needed. We will be back! Our stay at Jasper's apartment was nothing short of amazing. From the moment we stepped in, we were greeted with a sense of style and comfort. The master bedroom was incredibly cozy.
The open format of the living room and kitchen was stunning. It wasn't just a place to stay; it felt almost opulent, making every moment spent there truly special. We kind of didn't want to leave the apartment.
One of the highlights of our mornings was sipping coffee on the balcony, overlooking the channel. A serene escape from the bustling city. In fact, The apartment made me contemplate staying there forever, just disappearing into Amsterdam.
Jasper proved to be the epitome of a perfect host. Accommodating and thoughtful, he went above and beyond to ensure we felt at home in his space. His hospitality truly made our stay memorable.

Public transportation is out the front door or if you prefer to wander by foot, everything you need is a quick stroll.
Thank you, Jasper, for sharing your home. Jasper’s place was beautifully decorated in an amazing central location. We enjoyed the art in the place.
Jasper and his partner were helpful and responsive.
We enjoyed the place in most of the aspects. It even had nice fresh flowers. We thought the sofa + blankets could use some deep cleaning and that some items were missing, like hand towel in the toilet or hand soap in the bathroom.
Recommend for short stays. First of all, Jasper’s house is like an art house and was carefully designed, but we encountered problems from the very first moment;
- I am traveling with my family and we have 4 large suitcases. There is a very steep staircase at the entrance of the apartment, this is not stated in the listing description
- When we first enter the house, we hear a strong smell.
- All the wardrobes were full of clothes. We could only open our suitcases and not put our clothes in them.
- In the video Susan sent us, there was a large screen TV in the living room, but when we arrived there was a very small TV, which was disappointing.
- Living room furniture is very deformed and dirty
- Finally, it is stated that there are 3 bathrooms in the house, but there is only one toilet!
We are a family of 4 and we couldn't find a hotel nearby, otherwise I wouldn't stay in this house with my children.
My humble advice is to give clear information to future guests. We’re a family of four and the space and accommodations were perfect for our needs. Location was quiet and private but easy to get to anywhere in the city. Jasper and Susan were great and responsive host. Would stay again.

Perfect space in the perfect place. Enough room for our 5 day stay and close to metro and trams. Great bars and restaurants in de pijp too. The beautiful apartment is in a popular neighborhood of Amsterdam. The check-in was managed smoothly via a friend of Renee who organized everything perfectly remotely. On top Renee provided recommendations also based on our vacation‘s intention (e.g. parking possibilities, etc.)
The living room is nice and has an „open“ kitchen connected. The interior follows a nice and kind of individual style.
The only little bummer was the lack of a wardrobe for our clothes. Hangers were there, but not really options to hang them. A potential easy enhancement for the future :)
All in all we felt very welcomed! Very nice cosy apartment very well decorated. I felt at home! The location is absolutely great, very quiet, charming area, with a nice park at 2mns. For those having seminar or shows at the RAI , 30 mns peaceful walk. I do recommend.

Perfect in the right location for everything you need This was our second stay at this Airbnb, and once again it was a great pleasure to book this accommodation. Just like the first time, we loved everything about it – the location is perfect and we felt very comfortable. We’re already looking forward to coming back again someday! Lovely studio flat, very close to Amsterdam Central station so very easy to get around from! Clean and quiet but with lots of restaurants near by as well! Enjoyed our stay! Très beau séjour chez Julia je recommande à toute les personnes qui veulent vivre l’expérience Amsterdam Excelente ubicación, limpieza , y muy bien atendido. We had a great time at Julia's. Overall I would recommend because the place is clean, comfortable and spacious and the hosts were excellent. I have just got home from a amazing place , it was a easy check in , lovely view ,near everything, can’t wait to go back , thank you for having us Per quanto mi riguarda Julia dovrebbe fare manutenzione alla casa . Noortje’s apartment was very nice, and in a great location that was close enough to all of Amsterdam’s attractions, but far enough away from the noise and busyness. A short 5 min walk to the metro or 20 minute bike ride to almost anywhere in the city. Also very close to Vondelpark. Noortje was also a kind and accommodating host. Would definitely recommend. Really enjoyed my stay at Noortje’s place overall. Das Apartment von Noortje ist sehr schön, modern und groß. Noortje hat uns empfangen und das Apartment gezeigt. Sie ist sehr freundlich und hat uns alles gezeigt was wir wissen sollen. Die Zeit im Apartment von Noortje war super und wir haben uns total wohl gefühlt.

Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt ☺️ We had a great stay. The host was extremely helpful and answered all my queries. I would definitely recommend the place to friends and family in future!! Noortjes Wohnung ist wirklich sehr schön. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und Noortje war sehr aufmerksam. Die Wohnung ist groß und vor allem der Balkon ist super. Tive um probleminha após ir embora, pois esqueci de deixar as chaves no apartamento, o que gerou um pouco de transtorno para mim e para ela e tive que pagar por isso, claro. Então NÃO ESQUEÇA DE DEIXAR AS CHAVES kkkkkkkk We had a wonderful stay at this Amsterdam Airbnb! The apartment was spotless, fully equipped, and very comfortable. We were welcome by lovely Monique in person. The flat is very nice and exactly like on the pictures. Very comfortable. We really enjoyed the area (rent a bike!) with many options for meals in modern surroundings (work in progress!), just a ten minute ferry ride from Centraal Station and (very busy) central Amsterdam. The apartment is just as pictured and very cozy! Monique is a kind and responsive host and I would definitely recommend her place. This apartment is absolutely amazing! My husband and I thoroughly enjoyed our stay. Monique helped us to feel right at home and she really went above and beyond with the extra details for us. The location is in a chic neighborhood just moments away from the NDSM. Beautiful art and great restaurants in the area. Thank you for the wonderful stay! Monique’s place is beautiful!
Quiet, comfy and comfortable. I loved staying here and would definitely recommend, it was perfect. Exactly as described and more. Walkable distance from a ferry across to Amsterdam centre. Overall the Air BnB was clean and cozy. We would definitely book it again! Monique was an Amazing Host and the place was amazing. It was our first time in Amsterdam and she made the experience even better than what we expected. Monique and her husband were very friendly and helpfull.
The place is really amazing and clean.
It is just 10 min away from the ferry that takes you to the center. My husband and I had an excellent stay at Monique’s Airbnb. It was easy to get to from the ndsm ferry in a quiet area outside of the city which was really nice to escape the crowds end of day and relax taking in the late beautiful sunsets. Very clean and comfortable and close to great restaurants/cafes/grocery. Would highly recommend and stay again!! Monique was an amazing host – super generous, helpful, and easy to communicate with. A nice and clean apartment. Close enough for an enjoyable bike cruise to downtown, and far enough to get a break from the tourists. Very accomodating host. 5/5 Lovely apartment, exactly as a shown in the photos. Easy communication with host. Would recommend for a quiet stay away from the centre. I really enjoyed staying at Stanislava’s place. It’s a very nice apartment equipped with everything one would  need. Stanislava is very friendly and flexible, an exceptionally great Host. Accoglienti è differente Très accueillants merci Great spot for a short/temp stay. They offer clean linen everyday, take out the trash, and the bathroom comes with all the amenities you need. The shower was a joy to wash in and the lighting in the whole room is great. This accommodation was good, furniture and decor not as in pictures, there was no desk but it was fine for my needs, fridge and microwave/combination oven. Elektonisches Türschloss hat nicht immer funktioniert. Heizung hat auch nicht funktioniert, hab dafür ein Upgrade bekommen. Very friendly staff. Easy location. Clean, basic room with everything you need. Even coffee :) Je suis très déçue de mon séjour. Все было здорово! Спасибо 😊 Great location! Just FYI one bed is a regular bed (very comfortable), and the second bed is an air mattress. The place is fantastic and perfectly located in AMS, with quick access to all transportation, and so close to many local amenities.
I would rate this apartment as the perfect city pad, thank you so much, Marc.
We will definitely stay again :) L'appartement de Marc est très agréable. Au niveau transport est super bien servi, avec plusieurs lignes de TRAM proches. Marc est quelqu'un de disponible et de sympathique. Je recommande. I stayed, together with my 2 teenage daughters in Marc’s apartment for 4 nights. The apartment is lovely, clean, and very modern. A perfect stay for a couple of days sightseeing in Amsterdam. The location is great – very close to the city centre with a tram station just outside the front door. Marc is a great host, very attentive and service minded. I would highly recommend Marc’s apartment and I will book again when I am coming back to Amsterdam next time. Great location, easy to find, spacious and cosy - even though one of the rooms is an airbed it's very comfortable. Warming welcome by the friend who met us in the apartment.... Amazing check in and check out times! Amazing place! Beautiful apartment in a great location! Spacious. Very clean and modern. On a street with loads of shops and restaurants and only minutes’ walk to the Vondelpark and Museum area. Really friendly and responsive host. Highly recommend! Lovely apartment in a great location. The host was friendly and always available. Great location, walking distance to everything in Amsterdam. Marc was a great host and went above and beyond!
Would highly recommend this place to anyone that is visiting the central area of Amsterdam. 非常温馨的房子，干净整洁。地理位置优越。房东热情。在我最后时刻订上了房子。非常感谢🙏

Book immediately before others find this gem. Lovely home in a quiet neighborhood with beautiful greenery and architecture, 2 markets within walking distance and a great shopping area. The train is less than 10 minutes walk and tram is even closer. The tram can take you to nearly all parts of the city and has a stop just for all the museums. The train stop for the house is just one stop away from Amsterdam Centraal but takes you to a much quieter/calm location, away from the touristy crowds so you can get a proper rest. Really a wonderful location and clean and comfortable home.
Pamela was very kind and generous, met us at the house on the first night even though we were delayed several hours, was very responsive to all our questions including restaurant and bike rent. She volunteered to pick up dinner since we were delayed and supplies when she found out our luggage was lost and walked us to the market - a wonderful introduction to Dutch hospitality. Would absolutely book again Maison idéale pour un séjour à Amsterdam en famille. confort, espace, proximité du réseau de tram et de train. En outre Pamela est très prévenante, elle s'assure du confort et de la satisfaction de ses hôtes. Vraiment je recommande fortement cet endroit. Pamela was a wonderful host. She communicated well and helped us with local recommendations. Her apartment was lovely and very comfortable. We were able to cook a meal and do laundry quite easily. The beds were really comfortable and the bathroom was spacious. The location was great and a 10 minute walk from the train station. We would definitely stay again! Pamela was a gracious host. The home was spacious and met our needs. The location was perfect! The neighborhood was nice and we were able to get into the city easily by train or tram. Pamela left great local recommendations for restaurants and shopping. The neighbors were friendly as well. Pamela’s location is excellent. It is in a peaceful neighborhood on the city outskirts, with downtown being very easily accessible on the tram and bus system. And Pamela had very clear instructions and suggestions waiting for us on the table when we arrived. She was also very responsive on the Airbnb app leading up to and during our stay. This property made our first stay in Amsterdam very enjoyable. We’ll definitely be contacting Pamela again for our next trip. Pamela’s home was perfect for our family. It was clean, comfortable and had plenty of space. You can walk to the train/tram stop in less than 10 minutes. The rooftop patio space is amazing.
Pamela is very communicative and friendly. She was a delight to meet. And we appreciated the welcome basket. Lovely place to stay. Clean and comfortable. Pamela left clear instructions. Would definitely stay there again. Pamela’s home is stellar. It’s beautiful, clean, spacious, has many “extras” such as an espresso machine, coffee/tea, condiments, herbs/spices. The beds and bedding are extremely comfortable. The main bathroom is large and has a great shower as well as a tub. Pamela was incredibly helpful before and during our trip, she was flexible with check-in and out time, and she was there to let us in and show us around, which was very helpful. She is also a warm person and made us feel completely welcome. As the listing says, there are many steep stairs so if you have mobility issues, this may not be the right fit, but that is the only potential issue I can think of. It’s also in a lovely neighbourhood with amenities and train/tram station close by. We (two couples and two young adult kids) had a wonderful stay! We had a wonderful 5-day stay at Pamela’s place. Everything was very smooth and flexible, and it gave us the unique chance to experience Amsterdam life as if we were locals. The multi-level house is fully equipped and original in its design — it was fascinating to see and to live in such a typical Amsterdam home. We really enjoyed the neighborhood, the atmosphere, and the feeling of being part of local life for a few days.
Many thanks to Pamela for giving us this opportunity — it was a special and memorable experience!

Helena was a great and attentive host! The flat was great and in the best location, I would absolutely recommend to anyone as a wonderful place to stay. Wonderful location. Right on a canal on a quiet street with easy walks to museums and central Amsterdam. Spectacular area to walk around. Helena is an exceptional host and is very available as she lives right upstairs. This is a 350 year old home in a crowded city with strict regulations on modifying property. Within those constraints Helena does everything possible to create a welcoming environment with many little nice touches added. But you must accept that you are in a basement apartment in an historic building and there are some downsides to that. The entry door is less than five feet high and the entrance to the unit less than six. The bathroom is completely renovated but is so tiny that the toilet and shower overlap. The kitchen is makeshift but workable. None of this takes away from the wonderful four days we had there but it might not be for everyone. Helena was extremely welcoming! The place was just as described and very well located. I highly recommend this space and Helena! Many thanks and hope to return! On my way to a bike tour of the Netherlands, I added several days in Amsterdam - I had a family member join me for a couple of those, and we both agree, the location, the charm and Helena herself, were a real treat. The basement apartment might not be for everyone, as there are a few quirky things, but for us they added to the charm of this historical home. You would need to be quite mobile to be happy here. Honestly we loved the space. It was clean and welcoming, and the location was wonderful; walking distance to practically everything -
I know I’ll be back to Amsterdam and hope Helena’s place is available when I do, because I want to stay there again.
For reference I am female, in my late sixties and my guest in her mid fifties. We are both world adventurers, and love all things unique.
Thank you for your hospitality, Helena and Oliver. Amazing host, fab touches for us with great recommendations. It was a little over our budget for the space but would defo stay again for sure x Charming basement apartment with easy access to Metro. Helena was a very nice host, there to greet us, give local recommendations, and to tell us goodbye. The location is amazing, you can walk nearly anywhere or there is easy access to the metro. Also very quiet at night. Thoroughly enjoyed our stay! We really enjoyed the pleasant stay at the 969 Prinsengracht mini studio downstairs from the house beautifully maintained by the host, Helena. Right smack in the best part of the canal district, it was a pleasure to walk around the location. Fabulous location with an extremely warm and helpful host. Accommodation was very comfortable and stylish in a lovely neighbourhood. Helena’s place is tucked among a beautiful neighborhood of Amsterdam, the atmosphere was beautiful and people were kind.

Trini is a super host! Beautiful apartment and fantastic location. She is kind and knowledgeable with information about the surrounding area. Upon arriving in Amsterdam from the US we discovered our original accommodation had a mechanical issue and was uninhabitable so we were temporarily stuck without a place stay. Trini's place was available and within minutes she responded to our request to book it. That took us right back to the low stress vacation we were looking forward to!
As for amenities, we like to eat out but we also like to eat in. The kitchen has all of the basics, including a microwave, toaster, pots, pans and the little stuff that's a hassle to to grab, like olive oil and vinegar, salt and pepper, etc.
As for getting around: EASY! The trams are a 3 minute walk and there are several bike shops. We rented for the week at A-Bike Rental and parked them at the racks outside our front door. We rode everywhere. As long as you pay attention and follow the basic rules it's really quite easy.
And then there's the communication, Trini is one of the best. No long periods of silence, and service above and beyond! our stay was absolutely amazing. not too far from the city center, and the neighborhood we stayed in had a lot to offer. we would definitely stay here again We had a lovely stay at this spacious and light apt. On the canal. (Pack lightly as the stairs are traditionally steep.) We loved it. Terrific space & lovely neighborhood. Would visit again in a heartbeat! The apartment is comfortable and quiet. The location is perfect, walkable to basically everything without being in a super touristy area, and just a few steps away from multiple tram lines. The host, Trini, is friendly and responsive.
The stairs are steep, but that's part of the historic charm. Take it slow and it's not a big deal. We enjoyed our stay at this cute apartment. It was close to transportation, restaurants, shopping, cafes- all you might want to do while on vacation. The hostess, Trini, was excellent in communicating and very hospitable during our stay. Thank you for sharing your home with us- we felt like we were locals! This is a great place. It is located in a neat neighbourhood, with lots of food, drink and shopping options within a few hundred metres. You get your money's worth just watching - from the balcony - the locals socialising and boating on the canal. The apartment has a very good layout. Would definitely stay here again.
Do note though that there are two flights of very narrow very steep stairs up to the apartment, which could be a challenge with large heavy suitcases. Очень приятная в общении хозяйка, дружелюбная и милая. В квартире было всё необходимое и даже больше, чисто, комфортно. Апартаменты меблированы и декорированы со вкусом, выглядят даже лучше чем на фото. Ощущалось как у себя дома, очень уютно. Рядом с домом находится множество кафе, ресторанов и магазинчиков. Центр города расположен примерно в 30 минутах ходьбы от дома. Мы не пользовались общественным транспортом, а прогуливаясь пешком, наслаждаясь красотой архитектуры и каналов. Я очень рекомендую Трини как хозяйку и эти апартаменты как место пребывания в Амстердаме! Приятного отдыха! Trini a été vraiment très réactive lorsque je lui ai envoyé des messages. Elle m’a également renseigné sur les différentes questions que je lui ai posé. Un classeur avec les instructions est également à votre disposition dans le logement, ainsi qu’une carte papier de la ville très pratique pour le tourisme!
L’appartement est conforme aux photos, assez typique d’Amsterdam. Il est très lumineux quand les volets sont ouverts.
Les rangements dans la chambre sont appréciables, le lit est très moelleux, mon compagnon et moi y avons tous les deux bien dormi.
La salle de bain est très lumineuse également, adaptée.
Dans la cuisine, bien que petite, il y a de quoi se faire à manger.
Pour conclure, nous avons passés un très agréable séjour dans ce joli logement, je recommande!

Splendido appartamento in una elegante zona centrale di Amsterdam, ricca di ottimi ristorantini, caffè e negozi. Al tempo stesso, molto tranquilla e per nulla rumorosa. Agevole raggiungere il centro città sia a piedi, sia con i mezzi pubblici. L'appartamento si trova in un edificio dei primi Novecento per cui il contesto è molto caratteristico ed autentico. L'alloggio è luminoso grazie a delle grandi vetrate, curato, funzionale e dotato di tutto il necessario. The little shared deck was so fun to hang out on and watch people and boats go by. It is a smaller space, I wouldn’t recommend more than 2 people, and if you have any mobility issues climbing into bed or using the bathroom may be a bit tricky, but it was perfectly reasonable for us :) We could have stayed at a hotel or apartment, but staying in Barbara's iconic converted sea barge made our Amsterdam visit special.

好👍👍！ Cees was very helpful and warm. Due to unfortunate circumstances, we had to do some changes to our plan and Cees very kindly accommodated those requests. Will totally recommend this place. Bonjour .

We have previously stayed in the area and found the flat to be in a perfect location for the tram stop into town, plus the flat was within few mins walk to shops, restaurants and the amazing Vondelpark. 公寓附近就有一個公車、電車站，去市中心或是機場都很便利，房內的設備應有盡有，是個非常便利、溫馨的公寓，只是有些細節的部份可能在打掃時要再注意；像是膠囊咖啡機，我們使用自己的膠囊時，才用了兩顆就發現咖啡機裡已經堆滿了至少4、5顆別人用過的膠囊…他們不知道為什麼沒有被清理掉。我們入住的日子剛好是熱浪來襲的日子，公寓裡很遺憾的只有一個不會轉的電風扇，雖然能理解因為是偶然現象，所以房內沒有任何多餘的電扇或是空調設備，但如果房東能提供一些額外的幫助的話，我們會很感謝的，因為那兩晚真的很難熬。總體來說這個房源是個性價比還不錯的選擇，交通方便、附近也有超市和餐廳，所以值得推薦給來阿姆斯特丹旅遊的人。另外還有一點，如果是「沒有退房前把房子恢復原狀（打掃乾淨、將所有床單換好）」的習慣的人，房東也有提供60€的退房後清潔服務，這一點在我預約時，房東就有和我說了，只是我當時還是遲疑了一下，因為一般的飯店、Airbnb 都是默認退房後把自己的東西、垃圾帶走就好，我想這60€可能就是像其他房東已經明列出的清潔費，只是房東希望給房客自己選擇，是要自己打掃乾淨、還是付錢讓清潔人員替你收拾。希望這則訊息可以幫助未來的房客，因為我也不太確定加上60€之後，這個房源的價格是否比其他選擇還要划算？ The place was nice and reasonably close to transit making it nice to visit various locations.

Really great stay in an amazing central location, host was really helpful with check in and the accommodation was exactly as described We had few issues that could not get resolved during our stay: WIFI and fridge not working . Alex zijn appartement is top en ligt in een hele fijne buurt. Het is echter niet meer in dezelfde staat als op de foto's. Wonderful houseboat experience in Amsterdam! So fun to stay on this houseboat on the Amstel River. Suzanne and Louk made this an easy and wonderful stay Nice location on the river. good for shorter stays, a little cramped  and remember no kitchen for longer stays. They communicated well, everything else was fine. Lovely host and incredible stay! Boat watching from the deck was fantastic. Would absolutely be back Louk and Suzanne's boat is a peaceful oasis on the Amstel River.  Many hours were spent up top on the deck watching the kayakers, ducks and clouds go by.  The accommodations are satisfactory, with everything you'll need to have a good stay.  Bedroom is cozy and washroom is large with a double sink and good water pressure.  This being a boat primarily, the experience will be authentic rather than luxurious.  Lower ceilings for tall persons like myself and steep steps but the daily river views and peaceful surroundings are what makes this special.  Had a great stay. Neither of us can remember having slept so well, the gentle rocking of the boat was like being in a baby’s crib.
The location is insane, quiet and yet right near everything. The boat itself has a lovely roof terrace to sit in and watch the occasional boats go. I’ve been to Amsterdam 20+ times and this is hands down my favourite place to stay.
Lotty welcomed us, she added some beers and cheese to our fridge to enjoy our stay. An extremely uncalled for but appreciated touch.
Bravo, can’t wait to stay again. 10 out of 10 Nos hospedamos 3 en este hermoso barco que realmente es una experiencia maravillosa. El barco cuenta con 2 cuartos (con cocina, mesa y cama cada uno) y un living con otra cocina y estufa muy encantadora. Hay dos duchas y dos baños lo cual hace todo mucho más cómodo. La ubicación es ideal y las dueñas fueron super amables con nosotros. Cuentan con la cocina equipada, lavarropas, microhondas, horno, pava electrica, todo. Volvería sin duda alguna :) Tutto perfetto, siamo stati benissimo. Il posto è splendido, i letti ti avvolgono in un abbraccio, sembrano nuvole.
